rows.original:
Invalid attempt to spread non-iterable instance.
In order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.
rows.translation:
尝试扩展非可迭代对象失败。
要使一个对象具备可迭代性，非数组对象必须拥有 [Symbol.iterator]() 方法。
rows.raw: "Invalid attempt to spread non-iterable instance.\nIn order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method."

Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.
In order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.
rows.translation:
尝试分解非可迭代对象时出现错误。
要使一个对象具备可迭代性，该对象必须拥有 [Symbol.iterator]() 方法。
rows.raw: "Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.\nIn order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method."

rows.original: "Tell me about the corruption in your hive?" Azyrran sighs. "I've barely been back since the storm, and when I have, I see the hive more and more changed from what I remember. My sisters are turning into sex fiends, losing their reasoning. My mother's no longer the glorious warrior queen of her youth, but a..." Azzy struggles to find the right word. "A bimbo! All she thinks about is spreading her eggs throughout the forest, whether anyone wants them or not. The honey reserves are overflowing, and it's like it's triggered her to go into some sort of breeding frenzy." She steels herself, clenching her chitinous fingers. "But I have a plan. Or the makings of one, anyway!" [pc.dcb |You arch an eyebrow. "Is that right? What do you have in mind?" |You grin at her. "That's great news! What do you have in mind?" |Yay! "What's the plan, cutiebuzz?" you ask. ] Her wings twitch behind her, and you can see Azyrran's fingers dancing across the hilt of her great lance as she thinks. "The hive has a single main pool of nectar we keep for the winter where it's all stored once the pollen has been refined. My sisters have been taking corrupted pollen home in huge amounts. I fear that has become the ongoing source of the corruption. If we can purify it, there's a chance the damage may yet be undone to my sisters..." "So we just clear the rot out of the larder? It's that simple?" Azzy's smile falters. "I... I don't know. I hope. I have hope. The damage to the other hive knights and workers isn't permanent, I know that much. I shrugged off the start of the curse and fled when I first came home and realized what was afoot. Purify the source, and my sisters will recover... slowly. The only problem is..."
rows.translation: “跟我讲讲你们蜂巢里发生的这些腐败现象吧？” 阿兹兰叹了口气：“自从那场风暴之后，我就几乎没再回来过。而每次回来，我都发现蜂巢变得和我记忆中越来越不一样了。我的姐妹们简直变成了性欲狂，完全失去了理智。我的母亲也不再是年轻时那位辉煌的战士女王了，而是一个……”阿兹挣扎着想找到合适的词语，“一个荡妇！她满脑子想的就是把她的卵传播到整个森林里，根本不管别人是否需要。蜂蜜储备已经过剩了，这似乎让她陷入了一种疯狂的繁殖状态。” 她强忍住情绪，紧紧握住自己那层甲壳质构成的手指。“但我有一个计划。或者说，至少是有计划的基础！” [pc.dcb |你挑了挑眉毛：“是吗？你打算怎么做？” |你对她笑了笑：“这可是个好消息！你到底有什么打算？” |“太好了！快告诉我吧，小甜心！”你问道。 ] 她的翅膀在身后微微颤动，你可以看到阿兹兰的手指在思考时不停地敲打着她那柄大长矛的矛柄。“蜂巢里有一个专门用来储存花蜜的主要仓库，等到花粉被提纯之后，我们就会把花蜜存放在那里过冬。我的姐妹们一直在把被污染的花粉大量带回家中。我担心这正是导致这些腐败现象的根源。如果我们能够净化这些被污染的花粉，或许还能挽救我的姐妹们……” “所以我们只需要把仓库里那些腐败的东西清理掉就行了？真的这么简单吗？” 阿兹兰的笑容顿时消失了。“我……我也不确定。但我希望如此。我还有希望……”我还有希望“我知道，对其他蜂巢骑士和工蜂造成的伤害并不是永久性的。当初我刚回到家，意识到发生了这些事情时，我就立刻逃离了。只要净化了污染源，我的姐妹们就会慢慢恢复过来……唯一的问题是……

rows.original: You press her. "The problem is?" She sighs. "My mother. I can't turn my lance against her, but she can't be allowed to feed the hive from her own breasts once we purify the reserves, as she's become even more corrupted than the rest of my sisters." The caramel cuddlebug looks a little... embarrassed to continue. "She's a veritable honeypot now, and drinking from her addles the mind even more severely than the tainted nectar from the pool. I fear we must... you must subdue her." So in summary: find a way to purify the hive's honey reserves, defeat the queen, find a way to purify her too. Sounds easy, right? "Where do we start?" The Hive Knight’s face opens up into a warm smile again. "I knew I could count on you! So, first, a way to purify the hive. We hornets are children of Lumia, beloved of the Sun Queen, and I am sure that one of her lightbringers could see us through this trial. Someone well versed in her most powerful rituals and rites. I've heard that the little hamlet to the south is where a great arch-paladin of the goddess retired to many years ago. Ser Riordan Sanders! If you could convince him to help us..." [flags.SANDERS_MET |"Brother Sanders? I know him! I can go talk to him." |"Right, I can ask around." ] Azzy smiles. "That would be a great help." Back to town, then.
rows.translation: 你追问她：“问题出在哪里？” 她叹了口气：“是我的母亲。我无法对她采取行动，但一旦我们清理了储备物资，就绝不能让她继续用自己的‘乳房’为整个群体提供‘养分’——因为她已经变得比我的其他姐妹们还要腐败。”那只焦糖色的抱虫看起来有些……为难，似乎不知道该如何继续说下去。“她现在简直就是个‘蜜罐’，喝她的‘蜜汁’只会让大家的头脑变得更加混乱，甚至比那些被污染的花蜜还要糟糕。我担心，我们必须…… 你 必须制服她。” 那么，总结起来就是：想办法净化蜂巢中的蜂蜜储备，击败蜂后，然后再想办法净化她。听起来很简单，对吧？“我们从哪里开始呢？” 蜂巢骑士的脸上再次浮现出温暖的笑容。 我就知道我可以信任你！首先，我们需要找到一种方法来净化蜂巢。我们黄蜂是卢米娅的子民，也是太阳女王的宠儿，我相信她那些掌握着最强大仪式与法术的人中，一定有人能够帮助我们度过这个难关。 我听说南边那个小村庄里，住着一位多年前退休的女神大圣骑士。里奥丹·桑德斯爵士！如果您能说服他帮助我们的话…… [flags.SANDERS_MET |桑德斯兄弟？我认识他！我可以去和他谈谈。 |好的，我可以去打听一下。 ] 阿齐笑了：“那可真是帮了大忙了。” 那么，回镇上吧。
rows.raw: ' You press her. "The problem is?" She sighs. "My mother. I can't turn my lance against her, but she can't be allowed to feed the hive from her own breasts once we purify the reserves, as she's become even more corrupted than the rest of my sisters." The caramel cuddlebug looks a little... embarrassed to continue. "She's a veritable honeypot now, and drinking from her addles the mind even more severely than the tainted nectar from the pool. I fear we must... you must subdue her." So in summary: find a way to purify the hive's honey reserves, defeat the queen, find a way to purify her too. Sounds easy, right? "Where do we start?" The Hive Knight’s face opens up into a warm smile again. "I knew I could count on you! So, first, a way to purify the hive. We hornets are children of Lumia, beloved of the Sun Queen, and I am sure that one of her lightbringers could see us through this trial. Someone well versed in her most powerful rituals and rites. I've heard that the little hamlet to the south is where a great arch-paladin of the goddess retired to many years ago. Ser Riordan Sanders! If you could convince him to help us..." [flags.SANDERS_MET |"Brother Sanders? I know him! I can go talk to him." |"Right, I can ask around." ] Azzy smiles. "That would be a great help." Back to town, then. '

rows.original: "I had worried about what happened to the hornets of Queen Nyzerrah's hive," Sanders says after you explain the situation, and Azzy's request for aid. "I would not have called them friends of the village, but they were good neighbors before this demon of yours began her rampage. Now they attack folk on the roads, implanting eggs in anyone they capture. It's truly saddening to see proud warriors fall to temptation so utterly as they have." [pc.dcb |"So is that a yes, or...?" |You wish that weren't so true. "So, can you help?" |"So like... can ya help?" ] "Ah, were I younger... and still a crusader of the Sun Queen! I don't think I'm the man you want for this, [pc.name]. My best years are behind me, and I haven't been a devotee of the hornets' goddess since you'd have been in swaddling!" You frown. "There has to be something you can do!" "Not me," Sanders says, "but you're in luck: there's a woman beloved by Lumia visiting the valley south of here right now. An old comrade-in-arms from my crusading days, whom I'd not heard from in many years. She's on her way to the town of Maidenbridge, down across Lake Tarahugan, to take over the church there. She sent a letter asking me to meet her in the valley, but with everything going on here in the barony, I'm hard pressed to get away to fraternize." "Right. So there's a paladin of Lumia in the valley?" "Should be, yes. I doubt she'll be in a hurry to leave; I'm sure she's noticed the chaos plaguing the land too, and is doing what she can there. You can't miss her — Lady Lyana is a woman whose elegance and beauty is as radiant as the sun itself!" You thank the priest for his time and turn to leave. Somewhere down in Harvest Valley, huh?
rows.translation: 在你解释了情况以及阿齐请求援助之后，我一直在担心尼泽拉女王的蜂巢里的黄蜂们会怎么样，”桑德斯说道。“我本来不会称它们为村庄的盟友，但在你提到的那个恶魔开始肆虐之前，它们确实是很好的邻居。现在，它们在道路上袭击人们，还会把卵植入被捕获的任何人体内。看到那些曾经骄傲的战士们如此彻底地屈服于诱惑，实在令人痛心。 [pc.dcb |“那么，这是肯定的回答，还是……？” |你真希望事实并非如此。“那么，你能帮忙吗？” |“就是……你能帮忙吗？” ] “啊，要是我还年轻些，依然是一名太阳女王的战士该多好！我想我并不是你所需要的那个人，[pc.name]。我的最佳年华已经过去，而从你还在襁褓中的时候起，我就再也不是黄蜂女神的虔诚信徒了！ 你皱起了眉头：“肯定有办法可以做的吧！” “我没办法，”桑德斯说，“不过你运气不错：现在正好有一位深受卢米娅喜爱的女性正在我们南边的山谷里。她是我昔年并肩作战的老战友，我已经很多年没有她的消息了。她正前往塔拉胡根湖对岸的梅登布里奇镇，去接管那里的教堂。她写信邀请我在山谷里与她见面，但鉴于现在领地里发生的这些事情，我实在抽不出时间去赴约。 对了，山谷里应该有一位卢米亚的圣骑士吧？” “应该是的，她肯定不会急着离开的。我敢肯定她也注意到了这片土地上发生的混乱，肯定正在尽自己的一份力。你肯定能认出她的——莱安娜女士是一位优雅而美丽的女性，她的光彩简直就像太阳一样耀眼！ 你感谢牧师抽出时间，然后转身准备离开。应该是去收获谷的某个地方吧？

[pc.dcb |"So is that a yes, or...?" |You wish that weren't so true. "So, can you help?" |"So like... can ya help?" ] "Ah, were I younger... and still a crusader of the Sun Queen! I don't think I'm the man you want for this, [pc.name]. My best years are behind me, and I haven't been a devotee of the hornets' goddess since you'd have been in swaddling!" You frown. "There has to be something you can do!" "Not me," Sanders says, "but you're in luck: there's a woman beloved by Lumia visiting the valley south of here right now. She sent a letter asking me to meet her in the valley, but with everything going on here in the barony, I'm hard pressed to get away to fraternize." "Right. rows.original:
Just as you're passing through the village gates, you hear a cry of pain from just off the road, followed by a flash of light and a blast that sends you stumbling back. You turn just in time to see a pair of centaurs stampeding southward, racing away from the town as fast as their shaggy black hooves can carry them. One is clearly injured, clutching to a bloodied stallion-flank. 
    
    A woman follows them onto the road, hefting a bronze poleaxe onto her shoulder with a faint smile. "What was that about plowing both my holes, now? I can't hear you over the whimpering!" she calls after then, stifling a laugh.
    
    She laughs and plants her free hand on her hip, drawing your attention to a very short tunic covered by a solid bronze breastplate emblazoned with a sunburst on one breast. 
    
    Well that was a short search.
    
    "Oh, I hope I didn't startle you," she says, coming around to face you now. "Are the Marches always this dangerous? Two kinds of horsefolk and a topless moth-woman have been accosting me since I arrived. I'm thankful for the Dawn Maiden's blessings, or I'd likely be a broken woman by now."
    
    [pc.isCunning
        |"Yeah, it's really bringing down the property value," you laugh. "Maybe you could help?
        |You shake your head. "It's a recent development. Maybe one you could help us solve?
    ] I'm [pc.name]. Brother Sanders sent me to find you."
    
    "Ah, and manners, too! I— wait, Brother Sanders?"
    
    You nod. "He said a comrade of his was down here. Honestly I thought you'd be older..."
    
    The woman laughs. "Oh, gods, he must mean my mother. I'm Liaden! Paladin of the Oriflamme. So what is it you need, friend? I'm happy to help if you have need of me."
rows.translation:
当你刚穿过村庄大门时，突然听到道路旁传来一阵痛苦的呼喊声，紧接着是一道闪光和一声爆炸，吓得你连连后退。你及时转过身，看到一对半人马正向南狂奔，以它们那毛茸茸的黑蹄子所能达到的最快速度逃离小镇。其中一只显然受了伤，正紧紧抓住自己血迹斑斑的马侧腹。


 


 一个女人跟在他们后面上了路，她把一根青铜长柄斧扛在肩上，脸上带着一丝淡淡的微笑。“刚才那是什么声音啊？我的耳朵都被那些呜咽声盖过了，根本听不清你在说什么！”她边说边忍住笑声。


 


 她笑着，把空着的手搭在腰上，这时你才注意到她穿着一件非常短的束腰外衣，胸前还戴着一块刻有太阳图案的青铜胸甲。


 


 哎，这次搜寻可真快啊。


 


 “哦，希望我没有吓到你吧。”她转过身来面对你，“这些边境地区总是这么危险吗？自从我来到这里，已经有两种马人族和那个半裸的女妖不断骚扰我。要不是有黎明少女的庇护，我现在恐怕已经变成一个残废的女人了。”


 


 [pc.isCunning
 |“是啊，这些事情真的让这里的房产价值大幅下降了。”你笑着说，“也许你可以帮帮忙呢？”
 |“你摇摇头说：“这是最近才发生的事情。也许你可以帮我们解决这个问题吧？”
 ] 我是[pc.name]。桑德斯兄弟派我来找你的。


 


 “啊，还有礼貌也是必不可少的！我——等等，桑德斯兄弟？”


 


 你点了点头。“他说他有个朋友在这里。说实话，我本来以为你会年纪大一些呢……”


 


 这个女人笑了起来。“哦，天啊，他一定是说我的母亲吧。我叫莉亚登！是燃烧之旗圣骑士团的一员。那么，朋友，你需要什么帮助吗？如果你有需要，我非常乐意帮忙。”

rows.original:
"Ah, I see," Liaden says, leaning against the village gate and running a cloth over her bloodied axe. "A corrupted hive of hornet-folk, a demon on the loose, and folk being assailed by monsters. I was kiddin' when I asked if things were always like this — thought it was my bastard's luck showing its face again, but it seems there's a genuine crisis afoot in the Marches."
        
        You laugh. [pc.dcb
            |"Yeah, no shit."
            |"You can say that again!"
            |"Totes. Like, real bad."
        ]
        
        Liaden sighs. "I actually came out this way with my mom. We were hoping to get an audience with Ser Riordan Sanders. She's gone ahead to Maidenbridge to find help for what's going on here, but... ah, it seems this hornet hive deserves my attention. My duties to the goddess and all her flock supercede my own interests in all things. Ser Riordan did right to send you my way. I'm only a journeyman paladin, but rituals are my strong suit. I think I can pull this off! 
        
        "That's a relief."
        
        "I bet! I'll find my way to Lady Azyrran and wait for you there. Knowing anything about hornets, you might want to stock up on curatives before we begin our work. This sorta thing'll drain me dry, I can tell you that now, so I won't be much help fighting or healing after we get started. But the goddess rewards those who use their strength for the defense of the innocent! She'll lend me the power I need, I'm sure of it!"
        
        Hopefully Liaden's goddess feels as strongly about the situation as she does.
rows.translation:
“啊，我明白了，”莉亚登说道，她靠在村门上，用一块布擦拭着她那沾满血迹的斧头。“一群被腐蚀的黄蜂人，一个逃出来的恶魔，还有人们遭到怪物袭击……我之前开玩笑说这里的情况总是这样，还以为只是我那混蛋儿子的运气在作祟，但看来边境地区确实发生了严重的危机。”
        
        你们笑了。[pc.dcb
            |“是啊，确实如此。”
            |“你说得一点没错！”
            |“完全同意。情况真的很糟糕。”
        ]
        
        莉亚登叹了口气。“其实我是和妈妈一起来到这里的。我们原本希望能见到里奥丹·桑德斯爵士，她已经前往梅登布里奇去寻求帮助了……不过，看来这个黄蜂巢确实需要我的关注。对于女神和她所有的信徒来说，我的责任比任何个人利益都重要。里奥丹爵士让你来找我，真是做对了。我虽然只是一名普通的圣骑士，但祭祀仪式确实是我的强项。我相信我能解决这个问题！”
        
        “那可真是太好了。”
        
        “当然！我会去阿兹兰女士那里等你。既然你对黄蜂很了解，或许我们应该先准备一些治疗药物，这样在开始行动之前就能做好准备。这种战斗会让我精疲力尽，所以我一开始可能既帮不上忙，也治不了伤……但女神一定会奖励那些为保护无辜而付出努力的人的！我相信她一定会赐予我所需要的力量！”
        
        希望莉亚登所信仰的女神也能像她一样重视这个危机吧。
rows.raw:
'
        "Ah, I see," Liaden says, leaning against the village gate and running a cloth over her bloodied axe. "A corrupted hive of hornet-folk, a demon on the loose, and folk being assailed by monsters. I was kiddin' when I asked if things were always like this — thought it was my bastard's luck showing its face again, but it seems there's a genuine crisis afoot in the Marches."
        
        You laugh. [pc.dcb
            |"Yeah, no shit."
            |"You can say that again!"
            |"Totes. Like, real bad."
        ]
        
        Liaden sighs. "I actually came out this way with my mom. We were hoping to get an audience with Ser Riordan Sanders. She's gone ahead to Maidenbridge to find help for what's going on here, but... ah, it seems this hornet hive deserves my attention. My duties to the goddess and all her flock supercede my own interests in all things. Ser Riordan did right to send you my way. I'm only a journeyman paladin, but rituals are my strong suit. I think I can pull this off! 
        
        "That's a relief."
        
        "I bet! I'll find my way to Lady Azyrran and wait for you there. Knowing anything about hornets, you might want to stock up on curatives before we begin our work. This sorta thing'll drain me dry, I can tell you that now, so I won't be much help fighting or healing after we get started. But the goddess rewards those who use their strength for the defense of the innocent! She'll lend me the power I need, I'm sure of it!"
        
        Hopefully Liaden's goddess feels as strongly about the situation as she does.
        
        '

rows.original:
When you arrive in the outskirts of the garden, you find that Liaden's arrived safe and sound. She's sitting on the edge of one of the great flowers, deep in conversation with Azyrran. The caramel cuddlebug's giggling at some remark when she notices you, and quickly throws up a hand in greeting. "[pc.name]! You found a lovely paladin to help us, indeed! I'm grateful."
    
    Liaden rises and dusts off the hem of her tunic. "The goddess protects. Always. Unfortunately she doesn't take care of all our problems for us. Gotta make us work for it. And I've been watchin' the hive since I got here. Not gonna be easy getting in."
    
    You can hear the buzzing of them through the whole forest. No telling how many are in the hive itself.
    
    "We've got to get inside... but my sisters won't allow you [party.som
        |two
        |three
        |four
    ] to enter. Even I may not be allowed back, without my mind addled." 
    
    "Yeah, I met some of your sisters coming this way," Liaden adds. "Real friendly. If I hadn't beat 'em about with my axe I'd probably be as gravid as my sister-in-law. I know Lumia's the goddess of fertility, but you forcin' somebody to bear your children's anathema. Corrupted."
    
    Azyrran sighs. "I apologize for them. I... we weren't like this before."
    
    "We can take advantage of it, though," Liaden says, hefting up her axe. "No way we're fighting through that many, so we'll have to draw them off. And I need to reserve most of my power for purifying the, what'd you call it, nectar reserves in the pool? So seems to me like I ought to shake my ass at some hornets and go running for it. Lady Azyrran takes you across the ravine while the guards are trying to egg me, then you just sneak through and beat up the queen. That ought to call off the guards right quick."
    
    "Beat up Queen Nyzerrah?" Azzy looks between you and Liaden. "I can't... she's my mother."
    
    "We gotta deal with her somehow. I don't know. You'll think of something. Hopefully confronting her will be enough to draw the guards back to the hive so I can climb up. Got a rope and hook in my pack. I'll meet you in the pool room once Nyzerrah's dealt with."
    
    Sounds like a plan. Now you just need to commit.
rows.translation:
当你来到花园的边缘时，发现莉亚登已经安全到达。她正坐在一朵巨大的花朵旁，正与阿兹兰热烈地交谈着。当那只焦糖色的抱虫注意到你时，因为它听到了某些话而咯咯地笑了起来，然后迅速举起手来向你打招呼：“[pc.name]！你确实为我们找到了一位出色的圣骑士帮忙，真是太感谢了。”
 
 莉亚登站起身来，拍掉了她长袍下摆上的灰尘。“女神总是在保护我们。不过，她并不能为我们解决所有问题，我们还是得自己努力才行。自从我来到这里，我就一直在观察那个蜂巢……要想进去可不容易啊。”
 
 你能听到整个森林里传来的嗡嗡声，也不知道那个蜂巢里到底有多少只昆虫。
 
 “我们必须进入那里……但是我的姐妹们不会允许你们[party.som
 |two
 |three
 |four
]进去的。就连我，如果没有被弄糊涂的话，也可能无法进去。”
 
 “是啊，我遇到了一些你们的姐妹，她们也是往这个方向走的。”莉亚登补充道，“她们看起来挺友好的。要不是我用斧头把她们打了一顿，我现在可能也会像我的嫂子一样怀孕了吧。我知道卢米娅是生育女神，但你们强迫别人生下你们的孩子，这简直太糟糕了……真是堕落的行为。”
 
 阿兹兰叹了口气：“我为她们感到抱歉。我们……以前并不是这样的。”
 
 “不过，我们可以利用这个情况。”莉亚登说着，举起了她的斧头，“我们不可能与那么多的昆虫战斗，所以必须把它们引开。而我也需要保留大部分力量，去净化那个池塘里的‘花蜜储备’。看来，我得去对付那些黄蜂了。阿兹兰女士，你可以在守卫们试图攻击我的时候，带你们穿过峡谷，然后你们就可以悄悄地进去，打败蜂后。这样应该能很快吸引守卫们的注意。”
 
 “打败蜂后尼泽拉？”阿兹看着你和莉亚登，“我做不到……她可是我的母亲。”
 
 “我们总得想办法对付她。我不知道该怎么做，但你会想出办法的。希望与她对峙就能把守卫们吸引回蜂巢，这样我就能爬上去了。我的背包里有一根绳子和一个钩子，等尼泽拉被解决后，我在池塘边等你们。”
 
 这个计划听起来不错。现在，你们只需要付诸行动了。

            |You make a quick final check of your equipment. All good.
            |You turn to [companion.name] and make sure you're both ready to go.
            |You turn to your companions and make sure they're ready to go.
        ] After a deep breath, you tell the knights "It's time."
        
        Liaden claps her hands. "Alright! Let's do this thing."
        
        Azzy gets up and spreads her wings. "Follow me. I'll lead you to the hive."

        ] 深吸一口气后，你对骑士们说道：“时候到了。”
        
        Liaden拍手道：“好了！我们开始吧。”
        
        Azzy站起身来，展开双翼：“跟我来，我会带你们去蜂巢。”

rows.original:
"HEY! OVER HERE, YA OVERGROWN BUGS!"
            
            Across the river, a huge brown wasp hive hangs from the side of a stone cliff face, easily as big as the temple where you first met Kasyrra. The cloud of hornets buzzing around the hive, at least three dozen busty bimbo workers, all turn their attention towards the edge of the ravine as Liaden climbs up, aiming her axe towards the cloud of bimbugs. "Hey! I've got two holes ready for eggs — if you can catch me!"
            
            You watch from your hiding place a few yards off as the paladin slings her axe onto a shoulder and turns on a heel, dashing off towards the riverside fort. A general cry of alarm (and a few moans of desire) ring out from the horde of hornets, and they take wing in pursuit. You watch them descend into the Frostwood in hot pursuit, leaving a trail of honey and sexual excitement in their wake that's near as potent as as of the gaggles you've faced before. 
            
            Azyrran climbs up onto the cliffside and waves a chitin-gloved hand in front of her face, shaking her head. "My poor sisters... Don't worry, sweetlings. We'll find a way to save you from yourselves. I promise!"
            
            She turns and offers you a hand as you follow her up the cliffside, nearing the entrance to the hive. It's elevated over the ravine, but from this side, it seems like a pretty easy climb. [pc.hasWings
                |You and Azzy take wing up onto the wide open landing pad, drawing weapons as you plant your feet on the smooth, waxy surface of the hive.
                |Azzy flies up and once braced offers you a hand, pulling you up onto the waxy surface of the hive.
            ] There aren't any hornets outside now, but you can hear a faint buzz of activity from inside, through a pair of massive arches. 
            
            "Right. Well, onward ho!" Azzy grimaces, gripping her lance and adjusting her shield on her arm. "Truth be told, I still do not relish the idea of fighting my sisters, but... I will follow you, if you like. Just... please, do not ask me to turn my lance against mother. I cannot."
rows.translation:
“嘿！这边呢，你们这些长大的小虫子！”
            
            在河对岸，一个巨大的棕色黄蜂巢悬挂在岩石峭壁上，它的大小几乎和你第一次遇到卡西拉的那座寺庙差不多。成群的黄蜂在巢穴周围飞舞，至少有三十多只体型庞大的雌性黄蜂正朝着利阿登攀爬的方向聚集过来，她手持斧头，准备向这些黄蜂发起攻击。“嘿！我已经准备好了两个地方让你们产卵——前提是你们能抓到我啊！”
            
            你躲在几码远的地方观察着，看到这位女骑士把斧头扛在肩上，转身朝河边的堡垒飞奔而去。黄蜂群发出了惊恐的叫声（其中还夹杂着一些渴望的鸣叫），它们立刻振翅追了上去。你看着它们飞进寒冰森林进行追逐，它们身后留下的一串蜂蜜和性兴奋的气息，几乎和你之前遇到的那些情况一样强烈。
            
            阿齐兰爬上峭壁，用戴着几丁质手套的手在面前挥了挥，然后摇了摇头。“我可怜的姐妹们……别担心，亲爱的们。我们会想办法救你们脱离这种困境的，我保证！”
            
            她转身向你伸出手，你跟着她继续向上攀爬，渐渐接近黄蜂巢的入口。这个入口位于峭壁之上，但从这一侧看，攀爬起来似乎相当容易。[pc.hasWings
                |你和阿齐一起飞上了那片开阔的停机坪，落地后立刻拔出了武器，站在黄蜂巢那光滑、蜡质覆盖的表面上。
                |阿齐飞到上面后，停下来帮你上了巢穴的蜡质表面。
            ] 现在外面已经没有黄蜂了，但你可以透过两座巨大的拱门，听到里面传来的微弱声响。
            
            “好吧，那就继续前进吧！”阿齐皱着眉头，握紧长矛，调整了一下手臂上的盾牌。“说实话，我其实并不喜欢和我的姐妹们战斗，但是……如果你愿意，我会跟着你的。只是……请千万不要让我用长矛对付我们的母亲，我做不到。

rows.original:
"Of course I'll come with you," Azyrran reiterates, couching her lance under an arm. "These are my sisters... my family. I can't shrug off responsibility for their actions. Alright! Lead the way, [pc.name]. I'll be behind you all the way to the queen's chambers."
    
                [silly|Avaunt!|Onward, ho!]
rows.translation:
我当然会跟你一起去，”阿兹兰重复道，将长矛夹在臂下。“这些都是我的姐妹……我的家人。对于她们的行为，我无法推卸责任。好吧！你带路吧，[pc.name]。我会一直跟在你后面，直到女王的寝宫。”

                [silly|前进吧！|冲啊！]

rows.original: Azzy might not enjoy it, but you could really use the help here...

rows.original:
"You... you want me to go on ahead?" Azyrran says, relief palpable on her face. "I... thank you, [pc.name]. Not having to fight my sisters will do my soul some good. I shall meet you upstairs, near the queen's chambers at the top of the hive. Look for keys on your way. Nyzerrah may have changed the locks since I left."
                
                [azyrran.fucked
                    |You give her a quick hug, and give that bee-butt a squeeze, and tell her to take care. You'll see her again soon.
                    |You give the Hive Knight a clap on the shoulder and tell her to take care. You'll handle things down here.
                ]
                
                She takes wing and darts through the entrance, into the dark shadows pierced with sensual moans. You draw your [pc.weapon] and stride after her. Time to get to work!
rows.translation:
你……你是想让我先走吗？”阿兹兰说道，脸上明显流露出如释重负的神情。“我……谢谢你，[pc.name]。不用再和我的姐妹们打架，对我的心灵来说真是件好事。我们会在楼上的蜂巢顶端、女王的寝室附近见面。路上记得找钥匙，我离开后尼泽拉可能已经换了锁。”

"I need some time to get ready," you tell them. "Wait for me?"

        "'Course!" Liaden nods.

我需要一些时间来准备，”你告诉他们，“请等我吗？”

“当然！”利亚登点了点头。

阿齐紧张地瞥了一眼远处的蜂巢，“在你回来之前，我们会互相照应的。但请你一定要快点。

rows.original: You reach down into the pool and fish out the prince's discarded whip. It's still fragrant with the smell of honey and venom, enough that when you sniff it, your cheeks immediately flush. Striking someone with this thing is really gonna get 'em off. Grinning to yourself, your spool it up and sling it on your belt.
rows.translation: 你将手伸进池子中，捞出了王子丢弃的那根鞭子。上面仍然散发着蜂蜜与毒液的芬芳，闻起来甚至会让你的脸颊立刻变红。用这种鞭子打人，肯定会让对方感到剧痛。你暗自一笑，把鞭子卷起来，系在了腰带上。
rows.raw: "\n    You reach down into the pool and fish out the prince's discarded whip. It's still fragrant with the smell of honey and venom, enough that when you sniff it, your cheeks immediately flush. Striking someone with this thing is really gonna get 'em off. Grinning to yourself, your spool it up and sling it on your belt."

rows.original: The hive halls are abuzz here more than ever; moans and bimbo giggles bounce from wall to wall, drawing you toward one source in particular. A grand balcony overlooking a massive pool of honey, lined with stockades and hornet girls. All of them are bound at the wrists and neck, with more lithe sisters and the occasional drone male cusping at their heavy tits. Each one's breasts swing bigger and more heavily than any of the bimboes patrolling the outside, undergoing stimulation and constant massages to increase their production to the peak. And they're getting their nipples squeezed, sucked, and flicked by their hive mates, blissfully squealing whenever their orgasm hits. Every squeal accompanies an explosion of honey cascading out to the pool below, yet neither slows or breaks their machine-like pace of production. [party.has azyrran|"Azyrran! You're back... traitor! You should not have returned." Azzy tightens her grip on her lance. "Nyze, you spoiled child... just give me your key before I have to spank you. We're going to speak with mother."|"Oh? rows.translation: 你抽出了它。 [pc.cl thief|你拿起工具，开始忙活起来，试图撬开那把挂锁。其实这并不难——那些黄蜂似乎并不害怕窃贼，反而更害怕那些误闯这里的无人机，所以这个锁并没有那么牢固。你大概用一分钟就打开了它，那种成就感真是让人满意。 咔嚓一声 随着它的逐渐消失。|毒液法师的钥匙——这个钥匙似乎非常合适。你把它插进去，果然，不一会儿之后，就听到了令人满意的咔嗒声…… 咔嚓一声 锁一旦被拆开，一切就都顺其自然了。] 你推开门，看到一个房间里摆满了木架，上面堆满了长长的青铜战矛和青铜面制成的圆形盾牌，这些装备与阿兹兰自己的装备颇为相似。在房间靠近墙边的地方，还有一些架子上用蜡制的人体模型展示着胸甲、护腿和皮制裙装。看来你找到军械库了！
rows.raw: " You pull out [pc.cl thief|your set of picks and go about busily forcing the padlock. It's simple enough — the hornets don't seem to be afraid of burglars so much as errant drones getting in here, so the lock isn't terribly secure. You're able to pop it in a minute or so, and it gives a satisfying ka-chunk as it falls away.|the venom mage's key — this one seems to fit well enough. You slide it in and, sure enough, a moment later there's a satisfying ka-chunk as the lock falls away.] You push the door open, revealing a room full of wooden racks loaded down with long bronze war-spears and bronze-faced circular shields, not unlike Azyrran's own kit. Some stands near the far wall have breastplates, greaves, and leather skirts displayed on wax mannequins, too. Seems you've found the armory!"

rows.original: You reach towards the hornets' shrine and pick up the ancient shield from where it has sat for years uncounted. At first, you think that a thick layer of dust falls from its metallic surface, but you quickly realize that it's pollen, enough to make your eyes water and your head spin. Oh, that scent is powerful... You take the shield in both hands and examine it, eyeing the rose pattern engraved into its flat face, surrounded by a dozen tiny hornets. The scent of flowery fuck-vapors clings to the shield even as you step back from the idol, like it's coming from inside it. Enchanted, must be. Still, if you can ignore the potent pheromones the shield's letting off, your enemies might not be able to...
rows.translation: 你伸手去拿那面在角落里放置了无数年的古老盾牌。起初，你以为它的金属表面覆盖着一层厚厚的灰尘，但很快你就意识到其实并非如此…… 花粉这种气味简直强烈到足以让你流泪、头晕目眩。哦，这种香味实在太浓烈了…… 你双手握住那面盾牌，仔细端详它平面上雕刻着的玫瑰图案，周围还环绕着十几只小黄蜂。即使你从那尊雕像面前退开，那种浓郁的花香依然附着在盾牌上，仿佛这种香味就是从雕像本身散发出来的…… 内部 它肯定被施了魔法。不过，如果你能忽略那面护盾散发出来的强烈信息素，你的敌人可能就无法察觉了……

Oh, that scent is powerful... You take the shield in both hands and examine it, eyeing the rose pattern engraved into its flat face, surrounded by a dozen tiny hornets. The scent of flowery fuck-vapors clings to the shield even as you step back from the idol, like it's coming from inside it. Enchanted, must be. Still, if you can ignore the potent pheromones the shield's letting off, your enemies might not be able to..."

rows.original: The next room you enter is distinctive to the rest of the hive in several ways. The vesparans were once a warrior race, physically domineering. Even at their height you didn’t take them to be an academically-minded race, and yet, this room can only be described as a study: the walls of the normally-bare wood-pulp structure are dotted floor-to-ceiling with small, honeycomb-shaped indents, and inside many of those are scrolls, rolled into cylinders and sealed with wax. Many dozens more scrolls lie rolled up in piles around the room, presumably blank. One side of the room is also adorned with an elaborate scientific array: glass vials, attached to tubes, attached to more vials, swirl in a criss-crossing circuit atop a massive wooden table. From where you’re standing, you can see a sickly-purple concoction sludge its way from one vial to the other, coaxed forward by a homemade 'burner’ that’s really nothing more than a small, controlled campfire. But the second-most [pc.dcb|alluring|alarming|sexy] thing about the room is the smell: pheromones permeate the air thickly enough that you can taste them. The scent reminds you of sex, but subtly; it’s less like you walked in just seconds after a massive, heavy orgy, and more like you met someone in public and you can tell that they’re looking for some company. The most alarming thing about the room is that you aren’t alone. Tending to the table with the potions and vials is a hornet woman hunched over the edge, face-deep into a rolled-out scroll. At the sound of your approach, she looks up and over her shoulder to you. "Oh my," she whispers, her lips curling at the sight of you. Her black eyes narrow into slits, focused like a laser onto your own. "Visitors. A rarity nowadays." She turns her body towards you. She’s an atypical vesparan woman: she’s as tall as any of the warriors of the hive, but her form is far more slender and lithe, unlike the statuesque Amazonian bodies of her kin. Her coloration is off, too: her hair is black, while her body is more brown than golden. She’s wearing a robe made from fine, white, breathing silk, but it’s been stained with whatever tinctures are flowing atop the table in front of her. This particular hornet doesn't seem to have been entirely bimbofied like her sisters, though compared to Azyrran, this one has a significantly larger bust, pushing upwards of DD-cup breasts, and her abdomen is so swollen that it visibly beats and pulses with her heart. But what’s most visually striking about her is that her bare body is adorned with long streaks of dark purple in places: her overfull breasts seep with a deep purple juice, and two thin lines of dark purple go from her eyes to either side of her lower jaw. Her protruded stinger drips a more potent mix of the stuff, the droplets steaming when exposed to air and dripping in massive strands before splashing to the stained floor beneath her. "My name is Jyrranaz," she says, stepping toward you with the grace of a model on a walkway – or a predator stalking towards a victim caught in their trap. "Welcome to my study." Despite the obviously predatory look in her eyes, you don’t immediately assume the worst, since she hasn’t made any aggressive movements. You stay on guard and ask what it is she’s studying. Her eyes widen slightly at the question. "Goodness, nobody’s ever asked me that before. It’s refreshing to meet someone in this hive that has even half a penchant for study as I do." She smiles warmly at you. "I know it’s rude, but let me answer your question with a question. What is it, do you think, that makes a queen vesparan what she is? What separates her from the chaff?" That’s easy. It’s [pc.isBimbo| 'cuz the queen is the sexiest one, making all the others look plain next to her|her birthright; she’s only queen because she was born into it]. "[pc.isBimbo|In a manner of speaking, that’s correct. She was born into her looks; her status; her rights|Very perceptive of you." Her smile grows wider – it’s a little off-putting, honestly. "You and I are going to be fast friends, I think]." Jyrranaz motions to the small laboratory she has on her table. "I was recently inspired to look into whether the status of a 'queen’ vesparan could be... granted, instead of inherited. I’ve been mixing, boiling, experimenting, and toying with different mixtures of venom to see if an injection of any particular mixture could produce the same attributes as a queen." Unabashedly, she hefts her two leaking breasts in front of you, the purple mix leaking between her fingers as she spreads it over her mounds. "There’s been progress, as you can see," she sighs lustfully as she tweaks a hidden, leaking nipple, "but no breakthroughs." You ask her what could have inspired her into looking into that. It’s ambitious of her to want to overthrow the natural order of her kind. "Why, I met the most wonderful woman," Jyrranaz responds, her eyes wandering and her finger going to her teeth. She starts idly nibbling on her nail – sharper than most hornets, you only now realize – and her smile shortens to something less friendly and something more... fond. "Fiery red skin and pitch-black hair, with a powerful, commandeering," she stutters, then licks her lips, "stature...." You keep to your ready stance. Kasyrra...? "Yes!" Jyrranaz exclaims, clapping her hands a few times. "Have you met her? Isn’t she the most wonderful woman? If anyone was worthy of being queen, it’s our," she sighs wistfully as a light-purple strand of drool drips from her mouth, "My Kasyrra...." Maybe it’s time to cut the conversation off. It's clear that you've met at least one source of corruption within the hive. "So soon?" Jyrranaz asks, tilting her head to one side. "I was hoping you’d stay a spell longer. I could use a volunteer to test another batch of venom and see what the effects might be. I’d test it on myself, but I’m still reeling from the last test, and a fresher, less tainted body would be the perfect subject." You thank her for the offer, but you really should– "I insist," she says, flexing her fingers in your direction. The pointed tips of her sharpened nails drip with the deep purple venom excreting from the rest of her body. It's a fight!
rows.translation: 你进入的下一间房间，在许多方面都与其他区域截然不同。 维斯帕兰人曾经是一个崇尚战斗的种族，他们的体格也极为强壮。即便在他们最鼎盛的时期，人们也不会认为他们是一个热衷于学术的种族。然而，这个房间却完全符合书房的特点：通常由木浆材料构成的墙壁上，从地面到天花板布满了许多蜂窝状的凹槽，而在这些凹槽中，有许多卷轴被卷成圆筒状并用蜡封好。 房间里还有几十卷卷轴堆放在那里，想必都是空白的。 房间的另一侧还摆放着一套复杂的科学装置：玻璃试管通过导管连接在一起，这些导管又与更多的试管相连，整个装置在一张巨大的木桌上呈交叉分布，不断旋转着。 从你现在的位置来看，可以看到一种呈病态紫色的黏稠液体正从一个试管慢慢流到另一个试管里，这种流动是由一个自制的“燃烧器”所驱动的——其实那个“燃烧器”只不过是一个小型且受控制的篝火而已。 但是，第二重要的…… [pc.dcb|诱人的|令人担忧的|性感] 这个房间的独特之处在于它的气味：信息素在空气中弥漫得如此浓烈，以至于你甚至能够感受到它们的味道。这种气味会让你联想到性，但这种联想非常微妙；它并不像让你感觉自己刚刚参加了一场激烈而狂热的性爱活动，而更像是在公共场合遇到了某个人，你能感觉到他们也在寻找伴侣。 大多数 这个房间里最令人不安的地方在于，你并不孤单。那个正在照料装满药剂和小瓶子的桌子的女人，是一个弯腰驼背、脸埋在展开的卷轴里的妇人。当你靠近时，她抬起头，侧过头看了你一眼。 哦，我的天啊，”她轻声说道，看到你的那一刻，她的嘴唇微微上扬。她那双黑色的眼睛眯成了一条细缝，目光像激光一样紧紧地锁定在你身上。“来访者啊……如今可真是稀罕啊。” 她转过身来，面向你。她是一个与众不同的维斯帕兰女性：她的个子和蜂巢里的那些战士们一样高，但她的体形要纤细得多，动作也更加敏捷灵活，这与她那些身材魁梧的亚马逊族同胞截然不同。 她的肤色也不对：她的头发是黑色的，而她的身体则更接近棕色而非金色。她穿着一件由细腻、透气的白色丝绸制成的长袍，但这件长袍已经被她面前桌子上那些液体弄脏了。 这种黄蜂似乎并没有像她的姐妹们那样被完全改造过，不过与阿兹兰相比，她的胸部要大得多，属于DD罩杯级别，而她的腹部也肿胀得非常明显，甚至可以看到随着心脏的跳动而一起一伏。 但最引人注目的，还是她那裸露的身体上那些深紫色的条纹：她那饱满的胸部渗出深紫色的液体，而从她的眼睛延伸到下颌两侧，还有两条细长的深紫色线条。她那突出的螫针上更是滴落着更为浓稠的液体，这些液滴在空气中会蒸发成雾气，然后成股地滴落在她脚下的地板上，留下斑斑的痕迹。 我叫吉兰娜兹，”她说道，一边以模特在T台上行走般的优雅姿态向你走来，就像一只正在悄悄接近陷入陷阱的猎物的捕食者。“欢迎来到我的研究室。” 尽管她的眼神中明显带着捕食者的意味，但你并没有立刻往最坏的方向想，因为她并没有做出任何攻击性的举动。你依然保持警惕，询问她正在研究什么。 听到这个问题，她的眼睛微微睁大了。“天哪，从来没有人问过我这个问题。在这个到处都是热衷于玩乐的人们的环境中，遇到一个和我一样有点学习兴趣的人，真是让人感到耳目一新。”她温暖地对你笑了笑，“我知道这样问可能有点无礼，但让我用另一个问题来回答你的问题吧——你认为，是什么让一位维斯帕兰女王成为女王？是什么将她与那些平庸之辈区分开来呢？ 那很简单。就是…… [pc.isBimbo| 因为女王才是最性感的那个，在她身边，其他所有人都会显得平凡无趣。|与生俱来的权利；她之所以能成为女王，仅仅是因为她出生在王室之家。]. "[pc.isBimbo|从某种意义上说，确实是这样。她天生就拥有那样的外貌、那样的地位…… 权利|你真是观察力敏锐。”她的笑容变得更加灿烂了——说实话，这种笑容有点让人感到不适。“我觉得我们很快就会成为非常好的朋友。]Jyrranaz指向她桌子上那个小实验室，说道：“最近我产生了这样一个想法：是否可以‘赋予’一只雌性维斯帕兰动物那些女王级的特性，而不是让它们天生就具备这些特性。我一直在尝试各种不同的毒液配方，进行实验和研究，看看是否有一种特定的混合毒液注射后，能够让动物具备女王一样的特质。她毫不羞涩地将自己那两只渗液的乳房展现在你面前，那些紫色的液体从她的指缝中渗出，然后她将它们涂抹在自己的胸脯上。 “如你所见，确实取得了一些进展，”她满怀欲望地叹息着，同时轻轻捏了捏那个隐藏起来、仍在渗液的乳头，“但还没有取得突破性的进展。你问她，是什么激发了她去研究这个课题。她想要颠覆自己种族的固有秩序，这种想法确实相当大胆。 “嗯，我遇到了一个非常棒的女人，”Jyrranaz回答道，她的目光有些恍惚，手指还不自觉地敲打着牙齿。 她开始闲闲地啃着自己的指甲——其实那指甲比大多数黄蜂的刺还要锋利，你现在才意识到这一点——她的笑容也变得不那么友好了，而是带着一种更加…… 喜欢。 火红色的皮肤，漆黑的头发，身材高挑且充满力量……”她结结巴巴地说道，然后舔了舔嘴唇，“还有……” 你依然保持着戒备的姿势。卡西拉……？ “就是她！”吉兰纳兹兴奋地叫道，还拍了几下手。 你见过她吗？她难道不是最美丽的女人吗？如果真有人配当女王，那肯定就是我们……”她满怀憧憬地叹息着，一缕淡紫色的口水从她的嘴角滴落下来，“我的卡西拉……” 或许，是时候结束这个话题了。 很明显，你在蜂群中至少遇到了一个腐败的源头。 “这么快就找到了？”吉兰娜兹歪着头问道，“我本来希望你能多留一段时间。我需要一个人来测试另一批毒液，看看会产生什么效果。 我想自己先试试，不过上次的那次测试还让我有些后遗症，所以一个状态更好、没有受到影响的身体才是最理想的实验对象。” 你感谢她的提议，但其实你真的应该接受…… “我坚持要你试试，”她说着，朝你的方向伸了伸手指。 她那经过削尖的指甲的尖端，正滴着从她身体其他部位分泌出来的深紫色毒液。 这是一场激烈的战斗！

rows.original: [lastStanding.HPDefeated |Jyrranaz staggers backward, her balance thrown out of whack between the beating, her stuffed breasts, and her overfull thorax. She stumbles, resting onto her thick protruding stinger, before wincing in pain and throwing herself forward, onto both her hands and knees. It’s obvious to you both that the fight is over. She looks up at you, her mouth slack-jawed and panting like a dog, her purple drool dripping from the corners of her mouth. rows.original:
You crumple over yourself, defeated. The stings from Jyrranaz’s swings and stabs throb across your body, but you’re not in as much pain as you had thought you might be. The marks and wounds across your body dully ache with a resonating heat that seeps into your body, until the pain is replaced with numbness. Your vision swims a bit, and your heart... feels funny in your chest. If there was ever a bad sign, it’s when your heart doesn’t feel right in your chest.

        [party.som||You look to [comp.name] and see that [comp.heShe] isn’t faring much better; [comp.hesShes] on [comp.hisHer] knees, hands at [comp.hisHer] arms where Jyrranaz had gotten in her strikes. For a vesparan that isn’t as war-minded as her kin, she sure knows how to put up a fight.|You look to your companions and see that they stood about as much a chance as you did. They’ve all taken similar wounds, and they’re all palming at them with the same dull confusion as you. Jyrranaz’s done something to you all, and you’re not sure you want to know how this is going to end.]
        
        "Poor thing," Jyrranaz says, clicking her tongue as she kneels beside you. She grabs at your wrist, pulling your arm towards her, and you don’t have the strength to resist. "We could have skipped the formalities. Now you’ve gone and gotten yourself hurt. I may be thin for a vesparan, but you should know better than to underestimate one of us."
        
        She licks the nail of her index finger, wetting it with her saliva – not that it’s necessary, given how thickly coated it is with its own secreting venom. Then, she draws the tip of her claw across one of the gashes she had left on your bare [pc.skinNounSimple]. You flinch, expecting a deeper pain, but there’s none; the dull aching and seeping heat is gone at her touch.
        
        Your eyes widen, and you look at your wound, to her, then back to your wound. She notices your inquisitive gazing and smiles at you. "Given how violently you fought to keep from helping me with my testing, I wouldn’t call this a favor," she giggles. "Tell me honestly. How do you feel?"
        
        Given your position, you don’t lie, and tell her that you felt pain and heat before, but now it’s gone. When she traces her index finger down another, separate wound, the pain from that one leaves as well.
        
        "Oooh," she hums in ascension, delighted at your response. "That means that you, my subject, are more receptive to my venom than any other before you." She turns her head and looks into your eyes. "What’s your name?"
        
        You respond almost automatically. "[pc.name]."
        
        "Well, [pc.name]," she says, that same unnerving smile from before creeping across her face, "we’re about to be faster friends than you might have realized." [party.som||She looks to [comp.name]. "Let’s hope your friend takes to the venom as well as you do, for all our sakes, hmm? The more the merrier, as they say!"|She looks to your fallen companions, each of them watching you two with an uneasy nervousness. "Let’s hope they’re just as receptive as you are, for all our sakes, hmm? The more the merrier, as they say!"]

    You approach the door and brandish your pair of keys. Azyrran, standing by the doorside, takes a deep breath and steels herself. Her dusky digits curl around her lance, but she gives you a firm nod as you insert the keys and give them a twist. You hear a mechanism in the doors clinking around, and then the lock comes undone. 

    You're in."

rows.original:
Queen Nyzerrah rolls her neck gently, before giving you a bubbly little laugh. "Oh look at you! Such cuties! Azzy my sweetling, look at how you’ve grown!" Both you and the Hive Knight blink in surprise at the abrupt tonal shift, but she continues unabated with a bounce on her chitinous heels that has her massive tits quaking and oozing.

        Her bright smile turns into a deep frown a few moments later, and she huffs softly as she stalks towards the 'well-armed' side of her room. "Now then! Why have you come here and fought all of my lovelies? Hmm? They were just out there having a lovely time. There’s honey a plenty, and plenty of fucking to be had! Really, bees must have it so good." 
        
        You and Azyrran gulp in unison when her eyes scroll past the usual lance and shield of her people, and instead tightly grasps a greatspear that looks too heavy for either of you to even lift. After returning to the center of the room, Nyzerrah gives the spear a testing spin before resting it against the ground. "I totally have loads of questions by the way. But they can wait. I bet you have your reasons, but you’ve hurt my little babies! You must do as Queen Kasyrra did, and prove yourself first."
        
        Azyrran lets out a little gasp at that, wings fluttering nervously. "F-fight you?"
        
        The towering queen blinks for a moment before sighing and shaking her head. "Dear Azzy, I brought you up from a cutie little thing! You’ve gotten strong, but it looks like that was by fighting your sisters. That’s wrong, and bad. Now come here, you do as your mother tells you right now." Nyzerrah’s wings snap out and flutter a few times. "The beautiful Kasyrra may be queen of the lands beyond, but here in my home, I am the only royalty." You could swear you smell something, but the taste is gone from the back of your tongue before you can identify it.
        
        Azzy on the other hand is trembling, and moisture is building in the corners of her eyes. "[pc.HeShe]’s right in this, I know it..." and then her head turns to you. "I’m sorry, [pc.name]... I can’t fight her." 
        
        Your companion — your friend — sets her lance and shield up in a ready stance before winging her way over to the queen’s side... oh no.
        
        "I hope you win, [pc.name]. I really hope you do." Azyrran mumbles sadly.
        
        With a heavy weight building up in your stomach, you ready yourself for a fight. [party.som||[companion.name] looks similarly shocked by this sudden betrayal, but [companion.heShe] steels [companion.himHer]self for the fight to come. |Your companions look similarly shocked by this abrupt turnaround, but they steel themselves all the same. ]For a moment it looks like the handmaidens are going to join in, but they’re waved down with an idle motion. "Don’t trouble yourselves sweeties. We’ll be done soon!"
        
        Well, here we go...
rows.translation:
尼泽拉女王轻轻转动着脖子，然后发出一阵银铃般的笑声：“哦，看看你们！真是太可爱了！我的甜心阿齐，看看你都长这么大了！”你和那位蜂群骑士都惊讶地眨了眨眼，因为她的语气突然发生了变化。然而她并没有停下来，继续用她那坚硬的脚跟蹦跳着，结果她那巨大的胸部也随之晃动起来，仿佛要溢出来一样。

        几分钟后，她那灿烂的笑容立刻变成了深深的皱眉，她轻哼着，大步走向自己房间里那些“武装到牙齿”的蜜蜂们。“真是的！你们为什么要来这里打扰我的宝贝们呢？哼，它们刚才还在外面开心地玩耍呢，有丰富的花蜜，也有很多好玩的事情可以做……蜜蜂们肯定过得很开心吧。 
        
        当她的目光掠过族人惯用的长矛与盾牌，而是紧紧握住那根看起来重得你们俩根本无法举起的巨矛时，你和阿兹兰不约而同地倒吸了一口凉气。回到房间中央后，尼泽拉试性地旋转了几下那根巨矛，然后将其靠在地面上。“顺便说一句，我其实有好多问题想问……但那些都可以等一等。我敢打赌，你这么做肯定有你的原因，但你伤害了我的孩子们！你必须像卡西拉女王那样，先证明自己的能力才行。
        
        阿兹兰听到这话后轻轻喘了口气，翅膀紧张地扑动着。“要、要和你打架吗？”

这位高大的女王眨了眨眼，然后叹了口气，摇了摇头。“亲爱的阿兹，我可是把你从一只可爱的小生物养大起来的啊！ 你确实变强了，但看起来这是通过和你的姐妹们战斗才做到的。那样做是不对的，也是不好的。现在过来，立刻听从你母亲的命令吧。”尼泽拉的翅膀突然展开，扑腾了几下。“虽然美丽的卡西拉可能是那些遥远土地的女王，但在我的家里，只有我才是真正的王室成员。你甚至会觉得自己闻到了什么味道，但就在你试图辨认它之前，那种味道就已经从你的舌头上消失了。
        
        而阿齐则一直在颤抖，她的眼角渐渐聚集起了泪水。[pc.HeShe]我知道自己在这件事上是对的……”然后她把头转向你，“对不起。 [pc.name]……我根本无法与她对抗。”

你的同伴——你的朋友——拔出长矛，举起盾牌，摆好战斗姿势，然后飞奔向女王的身边……哦不。

“希望你能获胜。 [pc.name]我真心希望你能做到。”阿兹兰悲伤地低语道。

当你感到胃里沉甸甸的，你就已经做好了战斗的准备。 [party.som||[companion.name] 看起来他也对这种突如其来的背叛感到十分震惊。 [companion.heShe] 钢材 [companion.himHer]为即将到来的战斗做好充分准备。 |你的同伴们似乎也都对这种突如其来的变化感到震惊，但他们还是强忍住了自己的情绪。 ]有那么一瞬间，看起来那些女仆们也要加入进来，但有人随意地挥了挥手，让她们停下来：“别麻烦了，亲爱的们。我们很快就会弄好的！”

好吧，现在开始吧……

It’s not like I could just stay with you; I’d be out of the forests, and I’d get lonely at night. It hurts a lot for social creatures like us." rows.original: "Hey, [pc.name]!" You turn just in time to see Liaden coming into the milking chamber, covered in sweat and not a small amount of golden goo sticking to her once-white tunic. Her armor's scarred and dented in a few places, but she looks unharmed all things considered. "Just got here," she confirms, setting her axe against the door of the honey pool as she marches in. "Guess I was right. Soon as you finished with the queen, all the hornets turned tail. Like they knew somehow. Anyhoo, nobody tried fighting me when I climbed up in here. Gonna need a heck of a bath after all that; must've run twenty miles. C'mon, let's [silly |get 'er done |finish this ]." You march down from the lurid milking-room, throwing open the doors separating it from wherever the honey-troughs lead into... and the moment you do, you're almost knocked over by the wall of over-sweet scents billowing out of the room. Beneath you, connected to the milking room by sweeping stairs, is a room that is barely anything more than a massive pool of honey, overflowing with the vesparans' corrupted bounty. rows.original: Azzy arrives with armfuls of wax candles, and she and Liaden begin surrounding the pool with them and the incense burners Liaden had brought with her. When Azyrran finishes she brushes up against you as though charging herself up on the warmth, before noticing the crystal in your hands. "That's it?" "It is now," you shrug, dropping it into her waiting chitinous hands. "All this trouble from something so small. Are you sure this will work?" She turns her attention to Liaden when asking this time, whose only response is a shrug and a smile. "Wanna help me find out?" You watch them take up positions side-by-side at the lip of the corrupt pool, slowly lifting their arms up in simultaneous praise before bringing their hands together with the empty gem between them. There are a few moments of... well, nothing, until their breathing lines up and the tension bleeds out of their bodies. Their hands come together again before stretching up towards the unseen sky, and you could swear that incandescent sunlight bathes their outlines. The two lady-knights continue on, surprisingly quiet but for whispered words. Then abruptly — as though an afterthought — they drop the gem held up between their hands and let it tumble to the floor. Instead of crack or break, it 'ping's loudly and bounces right into the honey with a plop. Azyrran and Liaden both stare into the pool, dripping with sweat despite barely moving. "That was surprising..." the hive knight mumbles, before turning around to look at you. "What do you think?" "Uh..." You stare into the pool with the two, confused at the whole... nothing going on. Liaden smirks and slaps you on the back, nearly knocking you right in. "You're lookin' wrong. Take a deep breath and relax!" You do as instructed, breathing in through your nose and exhaling slowly out of your mouth. There's a taste in the back of your throat not dissimilar to a flowery meadow, although the ever-cloying sweetness of honey is obviously still present. When you take another breath however there's the sensation of... something. Peace? "I think we've got 'er," Liaden says proudly. "The murk's all washing away. Look!"
rows.translation: 阿齐带着一大把蜡烛来到现场，她和利亚登开始用这些蜡烛以及利亚登带来的香炉在池塘周围布置起来。当阿齐兰完成布置后，她轻轻擦过你的身体，仿佛在从你的体温中获取能量，直到这时她才注意到你手中的水晶。 就这样了吗？” “现在确实是这样了，”你耸了耸肩，将它交到了她那双等待着接收的手中。 “为了这么一件小事，竟然要费这么大的周折。你确定这真的能奏效吗？”这次她把问题转向了利阿登，而他的回答也只是耸耸肩，然后笑了笑而已。 想帮我弄清楚吗？” 你看到他们并排站在那片被污染的水池边，同时举起手臂表示赞美，然后将双手合拢，中间夹着那颗空宝石。 有那么几个瞬间……嗯，其实什么也没有发生，直到他们的呼吸变得一致，体内的紧张情绪也逐渐消散。他们的双手再次交叠在一起，然后伸向那看不见的天空，你甚至会觉得炽热的阳光正在照亮他们的轮廓。 那两位“女骑士”继续前行，周围异常安静，只有低声的交谈声传来。突然间——仿佛是事后才想到的——她们将手中举着的宝石扔了下去，让它滚落到地上。然而，那宝石并没有破裂或摔碎，而是…… ping它大声叫喊着，然后“扑通”一声直接掉进了蜂蜜里。 阿兹兰和利亚登都盯着那个水池，尽管几乎没怎么动，但他们身上却已经满是汗水。“真是太意外了……”那位蜂巢骑士低声说道，然后转过身来看着你。 你怎么看？” “呃……” 你望着那两个人在池塘边的身影，对整个局面感到困惑……什么事情都没有发生啊。利亚登 smirk了一下，然后拍了拍你的背，差点把你拍倒：“你看错方向了。 深呼吸，放松下来。” 你按照指示去做，通过鼻子吸气，然后慢慢地通过嘴巴呼气。你的喉咙后部会感受到一种味道，这种味道有点像鲜花盛开的草地，不过其中那股浓郁的蜂蜜甜味依然存在。 然而，当你再次呼吸时，会感受到一种……某种感觉。是平静吗？ “我想我们成功了，”利亚登自豪地说，“那些迷雾正在慢慢散去。看吧！

rows.original: Liaden and Azyrran sit at the edge of the honey-pool, paddling at it gently until the orb floating in it bobs over towards them. It's the paladin who gets her hands around it first, plucking it carefully up and shaking it off. "Look at it. Radiant as the sun." She's not wrong. Whatever the two war-maidens have done has paid off, leaving the honey gem pearly and translucent, and the overpowering fuck-scent in the room is starting to recede. She tosses you the gem, apparently unconcerned at the way it seems to steal the light around it. The orb glows faintly in your hand. "Not gonna lie, I'm a lil' disappointed the honey doesn't look any different... but I guess it's meant to be totally normal goo now." Laiden sighs and runs a hand through her hair, flicking away some of the honey clinging to her. "It'll probably take some time for the tainted honey to work itself outta everybody's system, but your hive should be on the right track now, Azzy." The hornet clasps Liaden's shoulders, and then sweeps in to give you a big hug. "Thank you! I can't tell you how relieved I am. My home has been saved! My family... I mean it, there's no way I could repay what you've done here. I'm going to go up and tell mo— the Queen, a-and hopefully..." She pauses and kneels down, scooping some of the honey up in her palms before taking a sip. When she smiles it seems impossibly bright, and the knight scoops up another palmful. "Hopefully she'll be cured soon." Liaden blushes. "Weren't nothing but my duty. Speaking of which... goddess knows what's been goin' on past here. If the demon can do all this to a hive just with a crystal and some honeyed words, what worse evils has she wrought?" "We'll find out," you assure her. "What'll you two do now?" "I'll need to watch over mother," Azzy says. "At least for a day. Perhaps after that, you could come and see us again?" Liaden hefts up her poleaxe. "As for me, I was really, really hoping to see Ser Riordan while I was here in the barony, but... with things being what they are, maybe I ought to hurry on to Maidenbridge? Mother might could use the help, if things've spread beyond the borders..." Azzy frowns. "It would be a shame to lose you." The paladin hesitates, looking between you and Azzy.
rows.translation: 莉亚登和阿兹兰坐在蜜池边，轻轻拨动着水面，直到漂浮在其中的那个圆球慢慢向他们漂来。首先是那位圣骑士率先抓住了它，小心翼翼地把它捞起来，然后轻轻摇晃了几下。 看吧，它亮得就像太阳一样。” 她说得没错。那两位女战士所做的一切确实取得了效果——那颗蜂蜜色的宝石变得晶莹剔透，而房间里浓重的怪异气味也开始逐渐消退。 她把那颗宝石扔给你，显然并不在意它似乎会抢走周围所有光芒的事实。那颗宝石在你手中发出微弱的光芒。“说实话，我有点失望……这宝石看起来跟普通的宝石没什么两样……不过我想，也许这样也挺好的吧。 意思是 现在一切都应该恢复正常了吧。” 莱登叹了口气，用手捋了捋头发，把粘在头发上的蜂蜜拨掉一些。“那些被污染的蜂蜜可能需要一些时间才能从每个人的体内排出，但你的蜂巢应该已经步入正轨了，阿齐。 大黄蜂抓住莉亚登的肩膀，然后紧紧地拥抱了她。“谢谢你！我真的无法用言语来表达我的感激之情。我的家终于得救了！我的家人……说真的，我永远也无法报答你们所做的一切。我马上要去告诉女王……希望她能……”她停顿了一下，然后跪了下来，用双手捧起一些蜂蜜，尝了一口。 当她微笑时，那笑容仿佛亮得不可思议，于是骑士又抓了一把蜂蜜递给她。“希望她能早日康复。” 莉亚登的脸颊顿时泛起了红晕。“那只是我的职责而已。说起来……天知道这里过去发生了什么。如果那个恶魔仅仅用一块水晶和一些甜言蜜语就能对整个蜂群做出这样的事情，那么她还可能犯下什么更可怕的罪行呢？ 我们会弄清楚的，”你安慰她，“那你们现在打算做什么呢？” “我得照顾母亲，”阿齐说，“至少要照顾一天。也许之后，你们可以再来看看我们吧？” 莉亚登拿起了她的战斧。“至于我，其实我真的很希望能在这个领地见到里奥丹爵士，但是……考虑到目前的形势，也许我应该赶紧去梅登布里奇？如果事情已经蔓延到了边境之外，母亲可能需要帮助…… 阿齐皱起了眉头：“失去你未免太可惜了。” 这位圣骑士犹豫了一下，目光在你们两人之间来回扫视。

rows.original:
"You should stay in town for a while at least," you suggest. "I'm sure Brother Sanders will want to meet you, too."

        "Y-you really think so?" Liaden says, a hint of nervousness in her voice. "I hope so. No, you're right, I ought to stick around. Things're pretty bad around here, maybe I can keep helping. The goddess sent me out here for a reason, I'm sure of it."
        
        Azzy buzzes happily. "Then maybe I'll see you again. You too, [pc.name]. Come back tomorrow, and I'll hopefully introduce you properly to my mother."
        
        "Right. Until later." You nod, patting the hornet on the head and regathering your [party.som

            |companion
            |companions
        ] before venturing forth. Liaden gives you a wave before jogging off ahead, back towards town no doubt.
rows.translation:
你至少应该再在城里待一段时间，”你建议道，“我相信桑德斯兄弟也会想见见你的。”

“你、你真的这么认为吗？”莉亚登的声音里带着一丝紧张，“但愿如此。不，你说得对，我确实应该留下来。这里的情况相当糟糕，也许我还能继续提供帮助。女神把我带到这里肯定是有原因的，我对此深信不疑。”

阿齐开心地嗡嗡叫道：“那么，也许我们还会再见面吧。你也是。 [pc.name]明天再来吧，到那时我应该就能正式把你介绍给我妈妈了。”

“好的，回头见。”你点了点头，轻拍了一下那只大黄蜂的头部，然后继续整理你的东西。 [party.som
            |个人物品
            |伴侣
            |同伴们
        ] 在出发之前，李亚登向你挥了挥手，然后便小跑着朝镇上方向去了。
rows.raw:
'
        "You should stay in town for a while at least," you suggest. "I'm sure Brother Sanders will want to meet you, too."

        "Y-you really think so?" Liaden says, a hint of nervousness in her voice. "I hope so. No, you're right, I ought to stick around. Things're pretty bad around here, maybe I can keep helping. The goddess sent me out here for a reason, I'm sure of it."
        
        Azzy buzzes happily. "Then maybe I'll see you again. You too, [pc.name]. Come back tomorrow, and I'll hopefully introduce you properly to my mother."
        
        "Right. Until later." You nod, patting the hornet on the head and regathering your [party.som
            |belongings
            |companion
            |companions
        ] before venturing forth. Liaden gives you a wave before jogging off ahead, back towards town no doubt.'

rows.original: The town could use another paladin around, and she deserves the chance to meet the man she came here to see.
rows.translation: 这个小镇确实需要再有一位圣骑士，而她也有机会见到她来这里想要见的那个人。
rows.raw: "The town could use another paladin around, and she deserves the chance to meet the man she came here to see."

rows.original:
"You should go while you can," you suggest. "You have responsibilities, don't you?"

        She nods. "You're right, of course. The Order sent us here for a reason. I might not see y'all again, so if not... it's been a pleasure, both of you."
        
        "Goddess go with you, Lady Liaden!" Azzy buzzes.
        
        The two share a parting hug, and then Liaden makes to leave. 
        
        "You should go, too," Azzy says. "I'll see you tomorrow, hopefully with mother feeling better!"
        
        "Right. Until later." You nod, patting the hornet on the head and regathering your [party.som
            |belongings
            |companion
            |companions
        ] before venturing forth.
rows.translation:
你还是趁现在赶紧走吧，”你建议道，“你毕竟有责任要履行，对吧？”

她点了点头。“你说得对，当然。教团把我们派到这里肯定是有原因的。也许我再也不会见到你们了，所以如果不能再见的话……能与你们俩共事真是我的荣幸。女神保佑你，莉亚登女士！”阿齐低声说道。

两人拥抱道别，随后莉亚登便离开了。

“你也应该走吧，”阿齐说，“明天见吧，希望到那时你母亲的病情已经好转了！好的，回头见。”你点了点头，轻轻拍了拍那只大黄蜂的头部，然后继续整理自己的东西。 [party.som
            |个人物品
            |伴侣
            |同伴们
        ] 在开始行动之前。

'

rows.original: Liaden should go and meet her mother as quickly as she can. This will remove Liaden from the game.
rows.translation: 莉亚登应该尽快去见她的母亲。 这样就会把李亚登从游戏中移除。.
rows.raw: "Liaden should go and meet her mother as quickly as she can. This will remove Liaden from the game."

rows.original: With the revisions to the Hornet Hive quest, the choice of Liaden's fate have been revised: you can either send her to Hawkethorne and proceed with her story, or send her to Maidenbridge to remove her from the game entirely.
rows.translation: 随着“黄蜂巢”任务的调整，莉亚登的命运选择也发生了变化：你可以选择将她送往霍克索恩，继续她的故事线；或者将她送到梅登布里奇，从而让她彻底从游戏中消失。
rows.raw: "\n    With the revisions to the Hornet Hive quest, the choice of Liaden's fate have been revised: you can either send her to Hawkethorne and proceed with her story, or send her to Maidenbridge to remove her from the game entirely."

rows.original:
Azyrran waits for you at the entrance to the hive with a bright smile on her face, a bouquet of pink and purple flowers in her arms. There's a guard on either side of the entrance, both grinning and sliding flowers into their pretty flaxen tresses. "[party.som|[pc.name]! I'm glad you've come back, are you ready to meet the queen?|[pc.name]! [companion1.name]! I'm glad you've come back, are you ready to meet the queen?|Welcome back everyone! I'm glad you've all returned... would you like to meet the queen?]"

    Well, after everything you've done so far, how could you not? Azyrran smiles and hugs the flowers to her chest, before holding them out to you. "Here, these are for you. I had some time to just... relax, and walk through the flowers with a couple of my sisters." The knight lets out a deep sigh, caramel cheeks taking on a tinge of pink. "They insisted on gathering up a bouquet for you, maybe it will look nice in your room later?"
rows.translation: 阿兹兰面带灿烂的笑容，在蜂巢的入口处等着你，她手中捧着一束粉紫相间的花朵。入口的两侧各站着一名守卫，他们也都微笑着，将那些花朵别在自己的金发上。[party.som|[pc.name]我很高兴你回来了，你准备好见女王了吗？|[pc.name]! [companion1.name]太好了，你终于回来了，准备好去见女王了吗？|欢迎大家回来！很高兴你们都回来了……想见见女王吗？]嗯，经历了你迄今为止所做的一切，你怎么可能不这么做呢？”阿兹兰微笑着，将那些花朵紧紧抱在胸前，然后递给你：“给你，这些都是送给你的。我抽了一些时间，只是……放松一下，和几位姐妹一起在花丛中散步。”骑士深深地叹了口气，他那棕褐色的脸颊上浮现出一丝红晕：“她们坚持要为你准备一束花，也许放在你的房间里会很不错吧？
rows.raw:
"
    Azyrran waits for you at the entrance to the hive with a bright smile on her face, a bouquet of pink and purple flowers in her arms. There's a guard on either side of the entrance, both grinning and sliding flowers into their pretty flaxen tresses. "[party.som|[pc.name]! I'm glad you've come back, are you ready to meet the queen?|[pc.name]! [companion1.name]! I'm glad you've come back, are you ready to meet the queen?|Welcome back everyone! I'm glad you've all returned... would you like to meet the queen?]"

    Well, after everything you've done so far, how could you not? Azyrran smiles and hugs the flowers to her chest, before holding them out to you. "Here, these are for you. I had some time to just... relax, and walk through the flowers with a couple of my sisters." The knight lets out a deep sigh, caramel cheeks taking on a tinge of pink. "They insisted on gathering up a bouquet for you, maybe it will look nice in your room later?""

rows.original:
You're practically dragged up to the queen's chambers by buzzing-wing-assisted steps, forced to skip to keep up with her before reaching the once-ominous door. As usual the scent of honey and flowers is strong on the air, but a distinct... undercurrent seems absent.
        
        When the door swings slowly open you identify the cause of that previous smell; the musk of back-to-back orgies, or otherwise similarly potent lovers. Because now you can see that the floors are clean, the furniture is polished and shiny, and the hive maiden's beds are properly made instead of laden with blissed-out sisters. In fact a few of her handmaidens are busily sauntering around the room cleaning up still; the queen's little war room looks to have been tidied up, and there's a nice big map on the wall that's been pinned with little black and white pearls. 
        
        More importantly, however, is the queen herself. At the height of her bimbotude it probably would have been impossible to see her without a dick on hand... or, cunt. She stands up from her seat and smiles so brightly your heart practically hammers its way into your throat, before gently adjusting her clothes — again another change, to see her wearing anything at all — and waving you over.
        
        Up close the change is more pronounced; her hair is a beautiful flaxen clear of any obsidian streaks, as well as being freshly cleaned and lustrous, her chest appears to have shrunk down to 'modest' G-cups that still noticeably slosh with honey, and lastly the look of her beautiful feminine face seems... prouder despite its mother-likeness. Her voice sings out to you, carried with a pheromonal rush that stirs your [pc.cockOrVag]. "[pc.name], I owe you a debt of gratitude."
        
        You close the final steps, and she pulls you into a hard hug that takes your breath away before releasing you. "The haze has cleared, at last... although it would appear it is not just having a mind sugary-er than honey that makes you appear so... delectable. Perhaps you'd like to stay in my hive instead? We could be ever such a wonderful pair."
        
        "Mother!" Azyrran whines, hugging your arm tightly.
        
        "Oooh fine..." Nyzerrah sighs, reaching out to stroke yours and her daughter's chins. "Regardless I believe there is nothing we can do for you now, but let it be known — if ever you have need of my daughters and I, we will wing to your aid at a moment's notice." Her expression turns momentarily serious, and she thumbs a hand on her chest. "May Lumia scorch our wings should we fail you in this."
        
        If Azyrran seems bothered by the queen tying both herself and all of the hive to her fate it doesn't show. If anything she stands a little straighter and prouder herself... until you sink your hands into her hair and give the knight a little rub that gets her squirming all over again. 
        
        Nyzerrah watches and smiles, taking a deep breath. "Ah, to breathe freely again." She trails off for a moment, reaching out to brush Azzy's hair too. "I am unbelievably proud of my dear Azyrran too, facing such loneliness until the one capable of... well — for lack of a better word — subjugating us came along." Before her eyes turn back onto you, at least. That warm, queenly expression becomes momentarily lustful, and her weighty insectile abdomen shifts from side-to-side. "Although I would hate to leave you empty-handed... perhaps you might be interested in a little quality time with a freshly rejuvenated queen?"
rows.translation:
在那些嗡嗡作响的翅膀的助力下，你几乎是被强行带到了女王的寝室前。为了跟上她的步伐，你不得不加快脚步，终于来到了那扇曾经令人不寒而栗的门前。和往常一样，空气中弥漫着浓郁的蜂蜜和花香，但似乎缺少了某种……特别的味道。
        
        当门缓缓打开时，你立刻明白了之前那股气味的来源——那是连续不断的激情狂欢，或者是其他同样热烈相爱的恋人们留下的痕迹。因为现在你可以看到，地板已经被清理得干干净净，家具也都被擦得闪闪发光，而那些年轻女孩的床铺也整理得整整齐齐，再也没有那些沉醉在幸福中的女孩们压在上面了。 事实上，她的几名女仆仍在房间里忙碌着打扫；女王的小作战室也已经被整理得井井有条，墙上还挂着一幅用黑白小珍珠钉好的大地图。 
        
        然而，更重要的是女王本人。在她的那种肥胖程度达到顶峰的时候，如果没有手拿阴茎……或者说是手拿阴部的话，根本不可能看到她的样子。她从座位上站起来，露出灿烂的笑容，那笑容简直会让你的心脏直接跳到喉咙里去；然后她轻轻整理了一下自己的衣服——这又是一次变化，因为现在我们终于能看到她穿上了什么衣服了——接着她朝你招手示意你过来。
        
        近距离观察，这些变化更加明显：她的头发呈现出美丽的亚麻色，没有一丝乌黑的颜色，而且经过彻底清洁后显得格外亮泽；她的胸部似乎变小了，变成了“标准”的G罩杯大小，不过当她移动时，里面的脂肪依然会明显地晃动；最后，她那张美丽而充满女性魅力的脸庞，看起来……更加自信了，尽管她的五官依然带着几分母性的温柔。她的声音仿佛在向你歌唱，其中蕴含的荷尔蒙信息会激起你内心的某种反应…… [pc.cockOrVag]. "[pc.name]我真的欠你一个人情。”

你完成了最后的步骤，而她突然紧紧地拥抱了你，那力度大得让你差点喘不过气来，直到最后才松开你。她说：“迷雾终于散去了……虽然看起来，让你变得如此……诱人的原因，并不仅仅是因为你有着比蜂蜜还要甜美的心灵。也许你应该留在我的‘蜂巢’里吧？我们一定会是一对非常美好的伴侣。
        
        妈妈！”阿兹兰哭喊着，紧紧抱住了你的手臂。

“好吧……”尼泽拉叹了口气，伸手轻抚了你和女儿的下巴。“无论如何，我想我们现在也无能为力了。但请记住——如果你需要我和我的女儿们，我们会立刻赶去帮助你。”她的表情突然变得严肃起来，将手掌放在胸前：“但愿如果我们在你需要的时候没能帮上你的忙，卢米娅会烧焦我们的翅膀。
        
        如果阿兹兰因为女王将自己以及整个蜂群都绑在了自己的命运之中而感到困扰，那么她的外表却丝毫没有表现出来。相反，她甚至站得更加挺拔、更加骄傲……直到你把手伸进她的头发里，轻轻揉了揉她的头，她才会又开始扭来扭去、显得很不自在。 
        
        尼泽拉注视着，微笑着，深深地吸了一口气。“啊，终于又能自由地呼吸了。”她停顿了一下，然后伸手轻轻抚摸着阿齐的头发。“我也为我的亲爱的阿齐兰感到无比骄傲——他在面对如此孤独的时候，依然坚持到了能够遇到那个属于他的人为止。嗯……好吧，实在找不到更好的词来形容了，就是这种‘征服我们’的行为吧。”至少在她再次将目光转向你之前是这样。她那温暖而高贵的神情瞬间变得充满欲望，她那结实而略带昆虫特征的腹部也开始左右摇晃起来。 虽然我实在不希望让你空手而归……但或许，你会对与一位刚刚恢复元气的女王共度一段美好的时光感兴趣吧？

rows.original: You smile and saunter close enough to be face-deep in her tits again, looking up from the warm, jiggly shelf at her pure black orbs. "It seems you're interested in a little quality time with me," you insist. "And you bet your beautiful body I am." Azyrran stammers beside you, while the queen draws you into a hard kiss. The taste is wonderful; flowers and honey, gentle perfume coupled with a feminine sweetness. When she parts from you, she nuzzles your neck and leaves golden-paint lip prints all over you.
rows.translation: 你微笑着慢慢靠近，直到再次将脸埋进她的胸脯中，然后从那温暖而富有弹性的胸脯上抬起头，凝视着她那纯黑色的双眸。“看来你很想享受一些高质量的相处时光呢…… 我你非要坚持这样，”你说。“而我，当然是用我美丽的身体来证明的。” 阿兹兰在你身旁结结巴巴地说着，而女王则紧紧吻住了你。那种味道美极了——像是花朵与蜂蜜的芬芳，温柔的香气中带着女性特有的甜美。当她放开你时，她还轻轻蹭了蹭你的脖子，在你的身上留下了金色的唇印。
rows.raw: ' You smile and saunter close enough to be face-deep in her tits again, looking up from the warm, jiggly shelf at her pure black orbs. "It seems you're interested in a little quality time with me," you insist. "And you bet your beautiful body I am." Azyrran stammers beside you, while the queen draws you into a hard kiss. The taste is wonderful; flowers and honey, gentle perfume coupled with a feminine sweetness. When she parts from you, she nuzzles your neck and leaves golden-paint lip prints all over you. '

rows.original: Honestly you're not feeling up to getting pounded by a freshly rehabilitated amazon queen after all is said and done, but there is something far more delightful that you have in mind anyway; making her blush. You pounce her and hug her tightly, right down into your [pc.chest] before nuzzling into her beautiful flaxen tresses. She squirms and lets the tiniest surprised yelp part her lips before she melts into the hug, letting out a sigh into your ear after a few moments more. "Mmm, my thanks. You are just too precious; are you sure I couldn't make you mine forever?" Alas, you have a land to conquer, you insist once the hug runs its course. "But you'd better come back and visit soon, do you hear me [pc.name]?" The glitter in her eyes, and the warmth of her smile is unmistakable... as is the ruddy pink blush creeping out of her sculpted cheekbones. Soon, indeed.
rows.translation: 说实话，说到底，你其实并没有心情去承受一位刚刚恢复健康的“亚马逊女王”的猛烈攻击……不过，你心里其实想着更有趣的事情——那就是让她脸红。 你猛地扑过去，紧紧地抱住了她，紧紧地贴在她身上…… [pc.chest] 在将头埋进她那美丽的亚麻色长发之前，她扭动了一下身体，然后让…… 最小的 她微微张开嘴唇，发出一声惊讶的叫声，随后便投入了你的怀抱。过了一会儿，她在你耳边轻声说道：“嗯，真的太感谢你了。你对我来说实在太珍贵了……你确定我不能永远把你留在我身边吗？” 可惜，当你们的拥抱结束之后，你坚持说你还有自己的土地需要去征服。 “不过你最好还是尽快回来看看我，听见了吗？ [pc.name]她眼中的光芒，她笑容中的温暖，都是如此明显……她那轮廓分明的脸颊上逐渐浮现出的红晕，也同样清晰可见。 确实，很快就会发生了。

rows.translation: 暂时就只是一个拥抱吧！

rows.original:
You accept the bouquet, stepping in and pressing your [pc.lips] up against Azzy's. You can actually feel the heat coming off of her cheeks, mouth opening instinctively so that you can dance tongue-to-tongue for a few hungry moments.

        By the time you part again she's turned into a caramel-hued tomato, twiddling her fingers together while you carefully stow the flowers away for later. "Y-you didn't have to do that..."
        
        She'd probably stammer for a few more minutes if not for you looping an arm through one of hers, guiding the knight through the door while the guards grin at you.
rows.translation:

等到你们再次分开时，她已经变成了一个呈焦糖色的“番茄”，双手不停地绞来绞去，而你则小心翼翼地把那些花朵收好，留待以后使用。 你、你其实没必要那么做的……”

要不是你挽着她的手臂，引导那位骑士穿过大门，而守卫们则冲你露出笑容，她恐怕还会结结巴巴地说上好几分钟。

rows.original: You return to the study where you found and fought Jyrranaz, the vesparan venom-chemist. Having had enough time to recover since your encounter, you see her standing at her desk, poring over her notes and studiously watching her equipment. The venom in the flask above the burner changes before your eyes from light-purple to light-blue. But apparently, that’s not the reaction she was hoping for, and she grunts to herself as she jots down some more notes. You step towards her. She looks over her shoulder at the sound of your footstep, and she glances at you before turning back to her work – and then double-takes once she realizes it’s you. "Oh," she says, turning her whole body to face you. "Um...." You tell her that you come in peace, if she does. You keep your hand from your [pc.weapon] and you wave your palm at her, showing you that you’re empty handed. Jyrranaz is tense, unsure what to make of the situation. After a moment, she exhales and relaxes. "Whatever. No sense in getting wound up." Her left hand goes to her boob, her fingers swishing over her leaking nipple to collect the venom dripping from it. "Stress is bad for the venom’s composition, you know." You ask if she’s made any breakthroughs in her research to find a potion that can turn any hornet-girl into a queen. "Oh, you remembered," she says, smiling at you with genuine warmth. "That’s sweet of you." At that, she turns to her desk and motions to the chemical setup she has going in front of her. "The answer is no, but I do have a lead. I’m experimenting with a new... ingredient." You tell her that you’re interested and ask her to continue. Whether or not it’s true, Jyrranaz clearly appreciates having someone to talk to about her work, and asking her about her work is a good way to get some brownie points. "Thank you for asking," she says sincerely. "We vesparan are a warrior race. Nobody of my kind ever shows any interest in my work, so even if you’re just humoring me, I appreciate it." [party.has azyrran|Your own hornet companion sighs and shakes her head. "It is unbecoming of a handmaiden... we are warriors, not scholars. But I do not blame you for pursuing your craft, Jyrra."] Her eyes narrow on yours, and she smiles the kind of smile that makes you feel like you two are old lovers and she’s about to try and rekindle that flame. "After I recovered from [var0|our battle|our, ah, first encounter], I noticed that the venom from my breasts had a thicker consistency and a more intense odor." Given that her study is constantly permeated with pheromones, you honestly couldn’t tell that it was even smellier than before. At least it’s the sexy kind of smelly! "Indeed," she laughs. "My new output didn’t last forever, though. After another few hour’s downtime, my venom’s consistency returned to normal." She points to the flask with the blue venom. "This stronger concoction is a step in the right direction, but it’s not the breakthrough I’m looking for. I’ll need more of this higher-potency venom to conduct more tests, if I hope to really achieve what I want." You ask if she knows what caused her boob-venom to change. Was it the fight? You’d rather avoid fighting Jyrranaz over and over in the name of science, and given how the last fight went, she probably feels the same. "More specifically, I think it was the adrenaline from the fight, and not necessarily the fight itself," she says, stepping into your space. "I’ll admit that I don’t exactly get a lot of exercise anymore, since I’ve taken to my higher calling. If we can really get my blood pumping like we did when we first met, I think I can more routinely get this higher-grade venom to test with." From the language her body’s giving you – eyes narrowed, warm smile, close body – you think she knows exactly what she needs to do to 'get her adrenaline going.’ But you play coy and ask if she has any... ideas. "What I’m saying–" She pauses and tilts her head in confusion. "I’m sorry. All this time, I never asked for your name." That’s true; you never introduced yourself. You give her your name. "What I’m saying, [pc.name], is that there are friendlier," she says haltingly, stepping into your body and wrapping her leg around yours, "and more mutually rewarding ways you and I could get my adrenaline pumping." She licks her lips, so close to yours. "And maybe some other fluids, too." It’s difficult to resist an offer like that, but you establish the need for just one ground rule: you’re in charge. None of her venom is going into you without your permission. The sex goes at your pace. Jyrranaz, in total compliance, slips to her knees in front of you. "I serve two queens already, [pc.name]," she says, her eyes wide up at you and her cheek resting on your thigh. "I can add [a] [pc.master] to the list." You place your hand on her head and call her a good girl. [party.has azyrran|"Two queens. Hrmph!" you hear from behind you.]
rows.translation: 你回到了那个书房——在那里，你遇到了那位研究维斯帕兰毒液的药剂师杰兰纳兹，并与她展开了战斗。 自从那次遭遇之后，你有足够的时间恢复体力。现在，你看到她正站在书桌前，仔细研究着自己的笔记，同时认真检查着她的实验设备。 燃烧器上方的那个烧瓶里的液体在你们眼前从淡紫色变成了淡蓝色。但显然，这并不是她所期望看到的反应，她低声嘟囔着，又记下了一些笔记。 你朝她走去。听到你的脚步声，她回头看了一眼，然后又继续忙自己的工作——直到确认是你，她才再次回头看你。 “哦，”她说着，整个人都转过来面对你。 嗯……” 你告诉她，如果你她愿意的话，你是带着和平的目的而来的。同时，你要确保自己的手不要做出任何不当的动作。 [pc.weapon] 你朝她挥了挥手掌，示意自己确实什么都没拿。 贾拉娜兹感到紧张，不知道该如何应对这种局面。过了一会儿，她呼了口气，放松了下来。“算了，没必要为此烦恼。”她的左手抚上了自己的胸部，手指轻轻滑动，将从乳头处滴落的毒液收集起来。 你知道，压力会破坏毒液的成分。” 你问她在研究中是否取得了任何进展，能否找到一种药剂，能让任何‘黄蜂女’变成蜂后。 “哦，你还记得这件事啊，”她微笑着对你说，眼神中充满了真诚的温暖。 你真太好了。”说着，她转向自己的办公桌，指了指面前那套正在运行的化学实验装置。“答案是否定的，但是…… 做 你先走一步吧。我正在尝试一种新的……材料。” 你告诉她你对此很感兴趣，并请她继续讲下去。无论这是不是真的，Jyrranaz显然很高兴有人愿意和她讨论她的工作，而询问她的工作内容也是获得她好感的好方法。 “谢谢你的关心，”她真诚地说，“我们Vesparan人是一个战斗民族。像我这样的族人，从来没有人会对我的工作表现出兴趣，所以即使你只是出于礼貌才这么问，我也非常感激。 [party.has azyrran|你自己的大黄蜂伙伴叹了口气，摇了摇头：“作为一名侍女来说，这样做实在不合适……我们可是战士，而不是学者。不过，我并不责怪你追求自己的梦想，Jyrra。] 她的目光紧紧地注视着你的眼睛，然后露出了那种会让你觉得你们俩其实是旧情人、她正打算重新点燃那份感情的微笑。“在我康复之后…… [var0|我们的战斗|我们的第一次相遇]我注意到，我乳房分泌的毒液变得更为浓稠，气味也更加浓烈了。” 考虑到她的研究环境里到处都弥漫着信息素，说实话，你根本无法分辨出这些变化究竟是由什么原因引起的。 甚至更难闻 比以前要好多了。至少是那种让人觉得“性感”的那种味道！ “确实如此，”她笑着说，“不过我的新‘分泌物’并没有持续太久。又休息了几个小时后，我的毒液才恢复到了正常的状态。”她指了指那个装着蓝色毒液的瓶子。 这种强化后的配方确实是朝着正确方向迈出的一步，但还不是我所需要的突破性成果。如果我真的想实现自己的目标，还需要更多的这种高效力毒液来进行进一步的实验。 你问她是否知道是什么导致了她的“胸部毒液”发生变化。是那场打斗吗？为了科学的研究，你肯定不希望一再与Jyrranaz发生冲突，而考虑到上一次打斗的结果，她大概也有同样的想法。 更确切地说，我觉得是战斗带来的肾上腺素作用，而不仅仅是战斗本身，”她说道，同时走进了你的空间。“我得承认，自从我开始追求自己更高远的使命之后，我真的很少运动了。 如果我们真的能像初次见面时那样让我兴奋起来，我想我就能更经常地获取这种高级毒液来进行测试了。 从她身体所表现出的语言——眯起的眼睛、温暖的笑容、贴身的动作——你可以看出，她非常清楚该怎么做才能让自己兴奋起来。但你却故作神秘，问她是否有什么…… 想法。 我的意思是……”她停顿了一下，困惑地歪了歪头，“对不起，这段时间我从来都没有问过你的名字。” 确实，你之前从未自我介绍过。现在你应该告诉她你的名字。 “我的意思是…… [pc.name]是不是有……呢？ 更加友好。她结结巴巴地说着，走进你的怀里，将她的腿缠在你的腿上，“还有更多…… 互利共赢 那些能让我们俩一起兴奋起来的方式 抽水。她舔了舔嘴唇，离你的嘴唇如此之近……也许还有其他一些液体也会被用到。” 这样的诱惑实在难以抗拒，但你必须制定一条基本规则：你必须掌握主动权。未经你的允许，她的任何身体分泌物都不得进入你的体内。整个性过程必须按照你的节奏来进行。 Jyrranaz完全服从你的命令，在你面前跪了下来：“我目前已经为两位女王服务了…… [pc.name]我可以补充一点，”她说，眼睛紧紧地望着你，脸颊靠在你的大腿上。 [a] [pc.master] 把名字写在名单上。” 你把手放在她的头上，称赞她是个好孩子。 [party.has azyrran|两个女王？哼！”你听到身后有人说道。]

rows.original:
You find Jyrranaz hard at work with her chemical tools on the table at the far side of the room. You clear your throat once to get her attention.
 
    "Oh!" she says when she realizes it’s you. Like a trained puppy, she finishes what she’s doing right away and comes barrelling towards you. "Hello again, [pc.name]! It’s good to see you."
     
    You tell her that it’s likewise, and you ask if she’s made any advancements on her potion.
     
    "I’m trying, but it’s difficult with... mmm," she pauses, her tongue snaking out from her lips to lick up her drooling venom, "such a limited amount of... high-grade venom." She’s quick to assume the position before you: on her knees, with her cheek resting against your thigh. "I could always use more, [pc.master]."
     
    You place your hand on her hand and tell her that you’ll see what you can do.
