rows.original: [var0 |Actually, before you get down to having any fun and helping her obtaining a healthier dose of her venom for her studies, you ask her how her progress has been with her work otherwise. "Stalled," she admits bitterly. "I've tried different mixtures, different potencies, different levels of heat, different qualities of ingredients, different ingredients entirely... nothing is giving me the results that I'm after." Sounds like you two ought to be at least thankful that she isn't mutating into some kind of super-vesparan, at least. "There's no danger of me becoming something I don't want to be," she says. "I'm already as pure-blooded as it gets. Any result that doesn't get me what I'm after has all the same effects as drinking a glass of water." That's reassuring, at least. "How about on your end?" she asks, changing the conversation slightly. "Have you and Lyric had any luck in locating an ingredient that could turn a kobold into a queen? Or, at least, a person into a kobold? |Funny that she asks – you may or may not not have something related to kobolds, exactly, but you recall Lyric saying something about dragons once existing, and that drinking their blood had transformative powers. "You're not about to suggest that you found a live dragon to blood let?" Jyrranaz asks. From the tone of her voice and the look on her face, she says it in jest. Well, it's a long story, but you happen to have something she and Lyric might be interested in. You withdraw the item in question: a red crystal, barely the size of your thumbnail, emanating a glow as if powered by candlelight. This is processed blood from a dragon, rarified by a witch that you trust. And if all the stories are to be believed, ingesting it will... Jyrranaz extends you her open palm, face upward, and you place the jewel in her hand. It's a small thing; she squints as she inspects it before handing it back. "You live an interesting life, [pc.master]," she admits. "Is Lyric with you? In your pack, as before?" Unfortunately, no. Lyric's in Hawkethorne at the moment. But is this okay? You thought that they wanted something related to kobolds, not dragons. "Actually, this is a much more preferable specimen," she answers quickly. "One such hurdle in my own studies into vesparan queens is the potency of my ingredients. There is nothing naturally more potent than the Hornet's Sting, which is useful for learning more of the common vesparan and their biology, but not of queens. Likewise, anything related to kobolds, but not kobold queens, would merely teach me what I already know." She pats your thighs reassuringly, but also with a bit of impatience. She has her own studies to get to – and thicker, richer, more potent venom for herself to start producing with the 'adrenaline' she gets with your activities. "Procure Lyric when you can, and we can get started on analyzing this crystalized bit of dragon's blood. In the meantime, I don't believe you've come here just to tell me all that." She believes correctly. |As a matter of fact, yes. You've located something called a {item}, and when taken raw or refined through alchemy, could turn a person into a kobold, just like Lyric. Jyrranaz's eyes flash with excitement at the news – but it quickly wanes. "Just like Lyric?" she repeats. Is that not what she wanted? She hums, biting into her lower lip. "I suppose it would be a start," she says slowly. "But... the purpose of my research is to advance a vesparan into something more than another vesparan. Having an ingredient that turns someone into simply another kobold seems..." So, she wants something stronger? "If there existed a vesparan item stronger than a Hornet Sting, I would be using that as my base ingredient instead. Which is why I'm always so keen on our 'activities' together, [pc.master]; the more potent venom I get from them is a more powerful ingredient than I can get on my own. Using a{n} {item} as a base ingredient would... only teach me what I already know, but for kobolds." So, she wants something stronger. That... narrows down your options, at least. You recall Lyric saying something about how dragons used to exist, and how drinking a dragon's blood had transformative properties... but where in the world are you going to find something like that? Anyway, you didn't come here just to talk shop. |Unfortunately, you haven't made much progress on that front. You promise that you've been looking, but... well, luck hasn't been on your side. "Well, I appreciate your efforts regardless, [pc.master]," she says, nuzzling into your thigh as she speaks. "At the end of the day, experimental science is really just luck anyway – we just only need it once, and then, we can replicate the results forever. Something will turn up eventually." Well, your only other hope is... you recall Lyric saying something about how dragons used to exist, and how drinking a dragon's blood had transformative properties. But where in the world are you going to find something like that? Anyway, you didn't come here just to talk shop. ]
rows.translation: [var0 |其实，在你们开始一起享受乐趣、帮助她获取更多用于研究的毒液之前，你不妨先问问她最近的工作进展如何。 “停滞不前了，”她苦涩地承认道。 我尝试过各种不同的配方、不同的浓度、不同的加热程度、不同品质的原料，甚至完全换用其他原料……但都没有得到我想要的结果。” 听起来，至少你们俩应该庆幸她没有变成什么超级维斯帕兰之类的东西吧。 我绝对不会有变成自己不想成为的那种人的风险，”她说，“我的血统已经纯净到了极致。任何无法让我得到想要的东西的结果，都跟喝一杯水没什么两样。 至少这一点还是让人感到安心的。” “那你那边呢？”她稍微改变了话题问道，“你和Lyric有没有找到什么方法，能让一只地精变成女王？或者，至少能让一个人变成地精？ |真有趣，她竟然会问这个问题——你可能拥有相关的东西，也可能没有。 地精没错，但你应该还记得Lyric曾经说过，龙曾经存在于世上，而饮用它们的血液会带来改变命运的力量。 “你该不会是说你真的找到了一条活龙，然后喝了他的血吧？Jyrranaz问道。从她的语气和表情来看，她是在开玩笑。 其实，这是个很长的故事，但你手头上恰好有某样东西，可能会引起她和Lyric的兴趣。你拿出了那个物品：一颗红色的水晶，大小几乎只有你的拇指指甲那么大，但却散发着仿佛被烛光照亮的微光。 这是由一条龙提供的血液，经过你信任的女巫的提炼处理。如果所有传说都是真的的话，服用这种血液将会…… Jyrranaz将手掌朝上伸向你，你便将那颗宝石放进了她的手中。 这只是件小事；她在仔细检查之后，眯着眼睛把它还了回来。“你的生活真是充满了各种有趣的事情…… [pc.master]是的，”她承认道，“Lyric现在和你在一起吗？还在你的队伍里，像以前一样吗？” “不幸的是，并不在。Lyric现在在Hawkethorne。但这样真的没问题吗？你本来以为他们想要的是与地精有关的东西，而不是龙啊。 其实，这个样本要理想得多，”她迅速回答道。“在我对黄蜂女王的研究中，成分的效力是一个重要的难题。自然界中没有什么东西比‘黄蜂之刺’更有效了——这种成分确实有助于我们深入了解常见的黄蜂种类及其生物学特性，但用来研究女王蜂就不够理想了。 同样地，任何与地精有关但并非地精本身的内容也属于这一范畴。 女王们这些话只不过是在重复我已经知道的事情罢了。” 她轻拍着你的大腿，语气既安慰人，又带着一丝不耐烦。她自己也有功课要做——而且，她还需要利用你这些活动带来的“兴奋感”，开始分泌出更加浓稠、更加效力强大的毒液。“有空的话尽快弄来‘Lyric’，我们就可以开始分析这种结晶状的龙血了。不过，我猜你来这里，肯定不只是为了跟我说这些吧。” 她的猜测果然没错。 |事实上，没错。你发现了一种名为{item}的物质，无论是直接使用还是通过炼金术提纯，都可以让一个人变成地精，就像Lyric那样。 Jyrranaz听到这个消息后，眼中闪过兴奋的光芒——但这种兴奋很快又消失了。“就像Lyric那样？”她重复道。 这不正是她想要的吗？ 她轻声哼着，咬着下唇说道：“我想，这至少是个开始吧……但是……我进行这项研究的真正目的，是让一个vesparan变成某种更强大的存在。 更多 比其他任何维斯帕兰人都要强大。如果有一种成分能够让人变成另一个普通的狗头人，那…… 所以，她想要更强大的东西？ “如果真的存在一种比‘黄蜂之刺’更强大的维斯帕兰物品，我肯定会用它作为基础原料。这就是为什么我总是如此热衷于我们之间的‘合作行动’。 [pc.master]从它们身上获取的毒性越强，所得到的成分就会越有效。如果以某种物品作为基础材料，那么……只会让我重新学到那些我已经知道的东西而已，但对于地精来说却并非如此。 因此，她需要一些更强大的东西。 那……至少也缩小了你的选择范围。你应该还记得Lyric说过，龙曾经是真实存在的，而饮用龙的血液会带来某种改变……但究竟在什么地方才能找到这样的东西呢？ 无论如何，你来到这里肯定不是为了聊工作的。 |不幸的是，你在这一方面并没有取得太大的进展。你承诺自己一直在寻找解决办法，但是……嗯，运气似乎并没有站在你这一边。 “不过，无论如何，我还是很感谢你的努力。 [pc.master]没错，”她边说边把头靠在你的大腿上，“归根结底，实验科学其实就是靠运气——我们只需要一次成功的实验，之后就可以永远重复这些结果。最终，总会有一些东西被发现的。嗯，你唯一的另一个希望就是……你应该还记得Lyric说过，龙曾经存在于这个世界，而饮用龙的血液会带来改变命运的力量。但是，你究竟要去哪里才能找到这样的东西呢？ 总之，你来这里肯定不是为了聊工作的。 ]

rows.original: It's been a small side-venture for everything to fall into place as they have: with Lyric and Jyrranaz meeting and finding common-ground, all the way up to you finding the very blood of a dragon to further their research and assist in Jyrranaz's goal to finding ways for the commonfolk to become more than they are. A lot of pieces had to come together just right for this to happen. That said, though... you can't shake the feeling that something huge is going to happen if you give the Dragonsblood to Jyrranaz and let her and Lyric study it. Something irreversible. And it'll probably happen to Lyric. If you go through with this, Lyric, as you know [lyric.himHer], will never be the same. Probably. Maybe you're being paranoid. But your gut tells you that you're not. Do you proceed?
rows.translation: 这一切能够顺利发展，其实都是一些小小的插曲和偶然因素共同作用的结果：从Lyric和Jyrranaz相遇并找到共同点，到你最终找到了那条龙的血脉，这些因素都为他们的研究提供了重要的帮助，也促进了Jyrranaz为实现让普通民众获得更多机会这一目标而努力。要想让这一切成为现实，确实需要很多条件恰好凑到一起。 话虽如此……还是有一种感觉挥之不去，那就是……似乎还缺少了什么什么。 巨大的 如果你把龙血交给Jyrranaz，让她和Lyric一起研究它，那么这件事就会发生。 有些事情是无法挽回的。而莱丽克很可能也会遭遇这种事情。 如果你真的决定这么做的话， 你知道的，歌词就是这样的。 [lyric.himHer]一切都将不再一样。 大概吧。也许你只是多虑了，但你的直觉告诉你，事实并非如此。 你还要继续吗？
rows.raw: " It's been a small side-venture for everything to fall into place as they have: with Lyric and Jyrranaz meeting and finding common-ground, all the way up to you finding the very blood of a dragon to further their research and assist in Jyrranaz's goal to finding ways for the commonfolk to become more than they are. A lot of pieces had to come together just right for this to happen. That said, though... you can't shake the feeling that something huge is going to happen if you give the Dragonsblood to Jyrranaz and let her and Lyric study it. Something irreversible. And it'll probably happen to Lyric. If you go through with this, Lyric, as you know [lyric.himHer], will never be the same. Probably. Maybe you're being paranoid. But your gut tells you that you're not. Do you proceed? "

rows.original: Actually, you have an update that she might be interested in– "Is that Jyrranaz?!" Lyric's voice, muffled from your pack, shouts into the laboratory. Your pack bounces, shifts, then falls over as Lyric excitedly wrestles with the mouth of the bag, trying to pry it open with [lyric.hisHer] fingers. After some effort, [lyric.heShe] gets it open, and [lyric.heShe] crawls from the mouth of the bag across the floor. "Ah," she hums, looking up at you with a knowing smirk. "I take it you must have found something related to our discourse over my research, and the possibility of finding information about vesparans and kobolds becoming queens via alternative methods?" You answer 'yes' to that mouthful. "Jyrranaz, we found it!" chitters Lyric excitedly, scrambling to [lyric.hisHer] feet and rushing towards the hornet-woman. With a sigh, she stands – she's not getting any of the 'adrenaline' she needs for her more-potent venom. Or the fun and exercise that comes with it. "We found it!" "What have you two found, Lyric?" At the question, you withdraw it: a red crystal, glowing faintly as if a firefly had been trapped inside. The tiny thing is barely the size of your thumbnail, and yet, the promise it contains thrums in your palm; its presence dominates the room between you three. "Dragon's blood!" Jyrranaz rears back, double-taking towards the jewel resting in your palm. "It's a long story," Lyric continues, "but we found a sample! And we can get more, through a bit of effort!" Jyrranaz's head crooks to one side as she regards the crystal – so tiny, yet in your hand may be the informational breakthrough that she's searching for. "May I?" she asks, handing out her palm, and you turn yours over, letting the tiny rock slip from your palm and into hers. She brings it to her face, and you can see the glow from inside the jewel illuminated in the blacks of her irises and glowing faintly against the heights of her cheeks. You don't know what it is she's looking for inside the crystal, but it has her undivided attention. "Fascinating," she whispers to herself. "Right?!" Lyric's tail thumps against the floor hard enough that the 'whap's nearly overpower [lyric.hisHer] voice. "I know it's not related to vesparan queens or anything, but... this could hold a breakthrough you've been looking for! Especially if it works on me!" Your eyes meet Jyrranaz's, and you both understand the implications of what [lyric.heShe] just said. You turn to Lyric and ask [lyric.himHer] again: is this really what [lyric.heShe] wants? Dragonsblood is a powerful transformative, and if it works and turns Lyric into a queen, then... that's one way. There's no telling if [lyric.heShe]'ll ever be a kobold again. "[pc.name], you didn't grow up in a kobold clan, so I guess you wouldn't get it," [lyric.heShe] starts, "but being a Village Mother is every kobold's dream. Even the boys[lyric.mf |! |! Well, I don't know if the boys want to be 'queens', exactly, but royalty all the same. ]" Lyric's body posture changes rather suddenly, as if [lyric.heShe] had just realized something. "Why?" [lyric.heShe] asks. "Is it not something you want for me?" [pc.isDK |You begrudgingly admit that it'll be... different. You doubt you'll be able to stuff an entire queen of a kobold into your pack to lug around. But you're not about to get in the way of Lyric's personal journey of self-improvement. [lyric.HisHer] gumption to accomplish [lyric.hisHer] goals is something that more people ought to strive for. |On the one hand, you admit that it'd be different. Kobold queens and Village Mothers aren't really known for being small enough to fit in travel bags. But this is something that [lyric.heShe] wants, and has been chomping at the bit to get started on since [lyric.heShe] first spoke with Jyrranaz. You're not about to get in the way of that. ] "Oh!" [lyric.heShe] chirps, [lyric.hisHer] back and tail straightening suddenly. "Well, if being a Village Mother means not being able to travel with you anymore, [pc.name], then no, I wouldn't take it." That [lyric.heShe] would make that decision – the ultimatum between becoming something [lyric.heShe] wants more than anything, and choosing to be with you – without thinking twice [pc.isDK |gives you just the slightest pause. Just the littlest one. |makes your heart skip a beat. ] Eventually, you tell [lyric.himHer] that you meant what you said, and that you two will figure something out. "Awesome!" [lyric.heShe] cheers, [lyric.hisHer] tail dusting the floor with how quickly it's wagging. [lyric.HeShe] turns to Jyrranaz expectantly. "So... now what? Where do we start? When do we start? How do we start[silly |? Who do we start ]?" At the question, Jyrranaz looks over her shoulder, towards the alembics and strewn papers across her desk. "There's no reason we can't start right now," she says as she scratches her chin. "[pc.name], if you don't mind, could you excuse me and Lyric for a while?" What, are you not allowed to watch? You're the one that found the Dragonsblood in the first place. "Oh, you're permitted to watch," she answers quickly. "But you may find it dreadfully dull. The scientific process is slow and meticulous." She lifts the jewel of Dragonsblood to her eye. "Assuming that this is, indeed, coagulated blood, we'll first need to find its melting point so that we can turn it back into a liquid. Then we'll need to distill it–" [pc.isBimbo |She's right, that sounds boring as fuck. You'd rather go do literally anything else. |She's made her point: while you understand every word she's said, you can already tell that it's going to go over your head in a hurry. ] When should you be back? "Impossible to say for certain," she hums, pinching the Dragonsblood between her fingers as she squints at it. "But... why not check back in twenty-four hours? If nothing else, we'll have a progress update by then." Sure, you can at least understand that much. "I'm hoping that you come back to some big news!" Lyric chirps, thumping [lyric.hisHer] tail against the floor excitedly. "Gosh, I haven't been this excited since I was first brought into the Undermountain! Hopefully this chapter of my life ends better than that one did, though." Didn't that 'chapter of [lyric.hisHer] life' end with [lyric.himHer] meeting you? "No," [lyric.heShe] smiles sweetly, "that was the start of the chapter after that."
rows.translation: 其实，你有一个更新消息，她可能会感兴趣的—— “那是Jyrranaz吗？！”Lyric的声音从你的背包里传出来，她在实验室里兴奋地喊道。你的背包被她用力拉扯，结果摇晃了几下，最后倒在了地上——Lyric实在太着急了，拼命地试图拉开背包的开口。 [lyric.hisHer] 手指。经过一番努力， [lyric.heShe] 把它打开，然后…… [lyric.heShe] 它从袋子的口部爬出来，爬满了整个地板。 “啊，”她轻声说道，抬头看着你，脸上带着会心的微笑，“看来你一定找到了与我们之前讨论过的内容有关的线索吧？就是关于我的研究，以及关于维斯帕兰人和地精如何通过其他方法成为女王的那些信息吧？” 你回答道：“是的。” “吉兰纳兹，我们找到了！”莱丽克兴奋地叫道，急忙爬过来…… [lyric.hisHer] 他双脚飞快地朝那个“黄蜂女人”冲去。然而，她只是叹了口气，站住了——她根本无法获得制造更强毒性毒液所需的“肾上腺素”，也无法享受到随之而来的乐趣和运动。“我们找到了它！” “你们俩找到了什么，Lyric？听到这个问题，你拿出了那个红色水晶：它散发着微弱的光芒，仿佛有一只萤火虫被困在了其中。这个小小的水晶几乎只有你的拇指指甲那么大，然而它所蕴含的力量却在你的手掌中跳动着；它的存在让你们三个人所在的整个房间都仿佛被它所笼罩。 龙之血液！” Jyrranaz猛地后退一步，目光紧紧地盯着你手掌中的那颗宝石。 “这是个漫长的故事，”Lyric继续说道，“但我们已经找到了一小份样本！只要再付出一些努力，我们就能获得更多的样本！” Jyrranaz将头偏向一侧，仔细端详着那颗水晶——如此微小，然而你手中的这颗宝石或许正是她一直在寻找的关键线索。“可以让我看看吗？”她问道，伸出了手掌。你也将手掌翻开，让那颗小小的宝石从你的手中落入她的手中。 她将那宝石贴近脸庞，你可以看到宝石内部散发出的光芒在她漆黑的虹膜中闪烁，也在她高挺的脸颊上投下淡淡的光晕。你不知道她在水晶中寻找什么，但那东西完全吸引了她的注意力。“真是太迷人了，”她轻声自语道。 对吧？！”莱瑞克的尾巴狠狠地砸在地板上，那‘砰’的声音几乎震耳欲聋。 [lyric.hisHer] 我知道这与维斯帕兰女王或其他什么事情都没有关系，但是……这可能会带来你们一直在寻找的突破！尤其是如果它对我有效的话！” 你的目光与杰拉纳兹相遇，你们都明白这一发现意味着什么。 [lyric.heShe] 就是这么说的。你去找Lyric问问看吧。 [lyric.himHer] 再说一次：这真的就是我们想要的吗？ [lyric.heShe] 想要什么？龙血具有强大的转化能力，如果它真的能让莱丽克变成一位女王，那么……这也是一个可能性。不过，谁也说不准会发生什么。 [lyric.heShe]我再也不会是那个地精了。[pc.name]你并不是在狗头人部落中长大的，所以我想你可能无法理解这一点吧。 [lyric.heShe] 开始说道：“但成为一名村庄的母亲，是每个地精的梦想。就连那些男孩们也是如此。[lyric.mf |! |嗯，我不确定那些男孩们是否真的想成为“女王”，但至少他们都想拥有皇室般的地位吧。 ]莱瑞克的身体姿势突然发生了变化，仿佛…… [lyric.heShe] 我刚刚意识到了一件事。“为什么？ [lyric.heShe] 问道：“这是……吗？ 不是 这是你想要为我做的事情吗？ [pc.isDK |你勉强承认，情况确实会……有所不同。你怀疑自己是否能够把一只体型庞大的 kobold 塞进背包里带着到处跑。但你也绝不会妨碍 Lyric 这段自我提升的个人旅程。 [lyric.HisHer] 完成任务的决心与能力 [lyric.hisHer] 目标应该是更多人应该努力追求的东西。 |一方面，你确实承认情况会有所不同。地精女王和村庄母亲们可并不以体型小巧、能够装进旅行包而闻名。不过，这件事…… [lyric.heShe] 一直都非常渴望开始做这件事，而且早就迫不及待想要行动了。 [lyric.heShe] 你首先与Jyrranaz进行了交谈。你不会去妨碍这件事的进展的。 ] 哦！ [lyric.heShe] 啾啾声， [lyric.hisHer] 突然间，一切都变得井井有条了。“嗯，如果成为‘村长夫人’就意味着不能再和你一起旅行了…… [pc.name]那么，不，我不会接受的。 [lyric.heShe] 做出那个决定——在成为某种东西与放弃成为那种东西之间做出的最后抉择。 [lyric.heShe] 它最渴望的，就是与你在一起——而且会毫不犹豫地做出这个选择。 [pc.isDK |只会让你稍作停顿——仅仅是短暂的停顿而已。 |会让你的心跳加速。 ] 最终，你会说出来。 [lyric.himHer] 你是认真的，你们俩一定能找到解决办法的。” “太好了！ [lyric.heShe] 干杯！ [lyric.hisHer] 它的尾巴摇得飞快，尘土都飞扬起来了。 [lyric.HeShe] 满怀期待地转向Jyrranaz，说道：“那么……现在该怎么做呢？从哪里开始？什么时候开始？又该如何开始呢？[silly |? 谁 我们开始吧？ ]听到这个问题，Jyrranaz回头看了看她桌子上那些蒸馏器以及散落的文件，然后说道：“我们完全没有理由不能现在就开始。”她一边说，一边挠了挠下巴。[pc.name]如果你不介意的话，能让我们和Lyric离开一会儿吗？” “什么，你不被允许观看吗？毕竟是你第一个发现Dragonsblood的啊。” “哦，你是可以观看的，”她迅速回答道。 但你觉得这个过程可能会非常枯燥无味。科学实验的过程总是缓慢而细致的。”她将那颗名为“龙血”的宝石举到眼前，“假设这确实是由凝固的血液制成的，我们首先需要确定它的熔点，这样才能将其重新变成液态。 那么我们就需要对其进行提炼了—— [pc.isBimbo |她说得对，那听起来简直无聊透了。你宁愿去做任何其他事情也不愿意干那个。 |她已经把意思表达清楚了：虽然你能听懂她说的每一句话，但你也很快就会发现，这些内容其实超出了你的理解范围。 ] 很难说准什么时候能回来，”她轻声说道，手指捏着那块龙血石，眯着眼睛仔细观察着它。“不过…… 为什么不在24小时后再查看一下呢？ 至少到那时，我们会发布一份进度更新报告。” “嗯，至少这个你是可以理解的。” “我真心希望你能带来一些重大的消息回来！”莱丽克兴奋地叫道，声音里充满了期待。 [lyric.hisHer] 兴奋地坐在地上，说道：“天啊，自从我第一次被带到幽暗山丘以来，我就再也没有这么兴奋过！不过，希望我这一生的这一章能够有一个比上一次更好的结局。” 那个“一生的这一章”…… [lyric.hisHer] 以死亡告终 [lyric.himHer] 不， [lyric.heShe] 她甜美地笑了，说道：“从那一刻起，那个故事的新篇章就开始了。

rows.original: You knock on the door leading to Jyrranaz's library. As soon as you do, you hear the sound of something crashing, as if something huge had just fallen over, followed by the rampant sound of something sharp scrambling across the floor. "No," you hear someone say in a hushed tone. You can't make out the context of what they're saying 'no' to, [lyric.mf |and although the voice is masculine, it's deeper than you'd expect of Lyric |and the voice is feminine, but it doesn't quite match either Lyric's or Jyrranaz's voice ] – is someone else in there? They clearly know that you're waiting at the door, though. After a few moments of more scrambling and more hushed whispers, the bolt to the door slides away, and the door opens – but only a crack. On the other side is Jyrranaz, with her hood down and her skin noticeably clean compared to when you usually see her with venom leaking from nearly every orifice. "[pc.name]," she says, nodding to you as if this were a casual encounter on the street. You respond with a dumb 'uh, hi,' and ask if everything is alright. It sounds like there's a scuffle going on in there. "No, actually, quite the opposite," she answers quickly. "Everything is fine. I'm just, uh..." She pauses, and from the look on her face, she has no intention of continuing that train of thought. "You're obviously here for an update on our progress with the Dragosnblood," she says, changing the subject. ... Sure, why not. One thing at a time. How has her research been with the Dragonsblood? "Quite illuminating, actually!" she answers, her voice raising an octave and her posture straightening. As soon as she's given the opportunity to talk about her work – and the apparent progress it's made – she turns into a different person entirely. "Lyric and I have made significant strides towards my goal of learning if it's possible to make a vesparan woman into a queen, thanks to your scientific contribution, [pc.name]. While the Dragonsblood is not the solution I've been searching for, it is a substantial step in progress towards my final goal." Is that to say that it had an effect on Lyric? Jyrranaz shuts her mouth immediately. Her eyes go wide and her lips curl in on themselves. She's acting like she told a secret that wasn't hers to tell. You ask her if Lyric is okay. Again, Jyrranaz doesn't answer right away. "[lyric.HeShe] asked me not to let you in." You ask her a second time if Lyric is okay. What has she done to your kobold? "Lyric is fine," she insists. Her mouth curls wryly, but you wouldn't call it a smile. "Your kobold might not be, though." [pc.dcb |What the fuck does that mean? You're starting to get annoyed, and now she's implying that your kobold might not be okay. You ask again, and you emphasize your tone to make it clear that you're not accepting any more runarounds: what in the Hell has happened to Lyric? |You're starting to get annoyed by her runarounds, and now that she's saying that 'your kobold' might not be okay, there's a sudden sense of urgency to the conversation. You ask again, and although you're not typically one to throw your authority around, you make it clear in your tone that you're not asking for riddles: what has happened to Lyric? |Oh gosh, what does that mean? Lyric is okay, but your kobold isn't? Is Lyric not a kobold? Do you have a kobold not named Lyric? You're not good with riddles and this is your precious little buddy you're talking about. Your poor heart can't stand the runarounds, so you ask Jyrranaz to tell you plainly: what's happened to your [lyric.mf |boy |girl ]? ] Despite the sudden [pc.dcb |intensity |authority |urgency ] in your voice, Jyrranaz, once more, does not answer. Instead, she leans back and turns her head to face into the room. "Lyric, are you okay?" she asks. "Yes, I'm fine," a voice answers back. It... sounds like Lyric, but there's a distinct drop in inflection in [lyric.hisHer] voice, as if [lyric.hisHer] diaphragm had gotten longer[pc.isDK |[lyric.mf |. What, did his balls suddenly drop or something? |. ] |. ] "I just– I–" There's another pause, followed by an exasperated, defeated sigh. "You're going to have to show [pc.himHer] eventually, Lyric," Jyrranaz says into her laboratory. "Yeah, I know," [lyric.heShe] responds. "Let [pc.himHer] in."
rows.translation: 你敲响了通往Jyrranaz图书馆的门。 就在你敲门的瞬间，你听到了什么东西摔碎的声音，仿佛有某个巨大的物体刚刚倒了下来，紧接着，你又听到有什么东西尖锐的东西在地板上快速移动的声音。“不，”你听到有人用低沉的声音说道。但你无法弄清楚他们是在拒绝什么。 [lyric.mf |虽然这个声音听起来是男性的，但它比你想象中Lyric的声音要低沉得多。 |这个声音是女性的，但它既不符合Lyric的声音特点，也不符合Jyrranaz的声音特点。 ] – 那里面还有其他人吗？ 不过，他们显然知道你正在门口等着。又过了几分钟的忙乱和低声交谈，门上的插销终于被拨开了，门也开了——但只是开了一条缝。站在门另一边的是Jyrranaz，她拉下了兜帽，皮肤也明显比平时干净了许多，因为平时你总能看到她的身体上几乎每个孔洞都在渗出毒液。[pc.name]嗯，”她说着，朝你点了点头，仿佛这只是街上的偶遇而已。 你只是呆呆地回了句“哦，嗨”，然后问她是否一切都还好。听起来里面似乎有人在吵闹。 “不，其实恰恰相反，”她迅速回答道。 一切都很好。我只是，呃……” 她停顿了一下，从她的表情来看，她并没有继续刚才那个话题的打算。 “你显然是为了了解我们关于‘Dragosnblood’项目的进展情况而来吧，”她说道，然后转移了话题。 当然，为什么不呢。一步一步来吧。她关于Dragonsblood的研究进展如何呢？” “其实相当有收获哦！”她回答道，声音提高了八度，姿势也变得挺直起来。一旦有机会谈论自己的工作，以及它所取得的明显进展，她就会完全变成另一个人一样。 多亏了你的科学贡献，我和Lyric在实现我的目标——探究是否有可能将一位维斯帕兰女性培养成一位女王——这一道路上取得了重大进展。 [pc.name]虽然“龙血”并不是我一直在寻找的解决方案，但它确实是一种可行的办法。 实质性的 我正在朝着最终目标稳步前进。” 这是不是意味着那件事对Lyric产生了影响？ Jyrranaz立刻闭上了嘴，眼睛瞪得大大的，嘴唇微微撇起，表现得就像自己泄露了一个本不该说的秘密。 你问她Lyric是否没事。 Jyrranaz又一次没有立刻回答。[lyric.HeShe] 她让我不要让你进来。” 你再次询问她，Lyric是否没事。她对你的地精做了什么？ “Lyric没事，”她坚持说道。她的嘴角微微扭曲，但那根本算不上是微笑。“不过，你的地精可能就不那么幸运了。 [pc.dcb |这他妈到底是什么意思？你已经开始感到恼火了，而现在她还在暗示你的狗头人可能出了问题。你再次询问，并且特意强调了自己的语气，就是要明确表示你不会再接受任何含糊其辞的回答：Lyric到底发生了什么事？ |她的拐弯抹角已经开始让你感到恼火了，而现在她又说“你的地精”可能不太对劲，这使得谈话突然变得紧迫起来。你再次询问，虽然你通常不会滥用权威，但你的语气明确地表明，你并不想听那些拐弯抹角的回答。 什么 这种事情也发生在Lyric身上了吗？ |哦天啊，这到底是什么意思？Lyric没问题，但你的那只地精却有问题？难道Lyric不是地精吗？还是说你其实有一只名字不是Lyric的地精？你实在不擅长解谜，而你说的就是你那可爱的小伙伴啊。你的心太脆弱了，受不了这些拐弯抹角的说法，所以才让Jyrranaz直接告诉你：你的那只地精到底发生了什么事…… [lyric.mf |男孩 |女孩 ]? ] 尽管情况突然发生了变化…… [pc.dcb |强度 |权威 |紧迫性 ] 用你那特有的语气，Jyrranaz，她又一次没有回答。相反，她向后靠在椅背上，转过头面向房间内部问道：“Lyric，你没事吧？” “嗯，我没事，”一个声音回应道。那声音…… 听起来不错。 就像Lyric一样，但是语调的变化幅度明显更小。 [lyric.hisHer] 仿佛在用声音表达出来一样 [lyric.hisHer] 隔膜变长了[pc.isDK |[lyric.mf |什么，他的胆量突然变小了还是怎么着？ |. ] |. ] 我只是……我只是……” 又是一阵沉默，随后传来一声无奈而沮丧的叹息。 “你得给我看看才行。 [pc.himHer] 最终，Lyric，”Jyrranaz在她的实验室里说道。 “嗯，我知道。 [lyric.heShe] 回答道：“让…… [pc.himHer] 进去。
rows.raw: " You knock on the door leading to Jyrranaz's library. As soon as you do, you hear the sound of something crashing, as if something huge had just fallen over, followed by the rampant sound of something sharp scrambling across the floor. "No," you hear someone say in a hushed tone. You can't make out the context of what they're saying 'no' to, [lyric.mf |and although the voice is masculine, it's deeper than you'd expect of Lyric |and the voice is feminine, but it doesn't quite match either Lyric's or Jyrranaz's voice ] – is someone else in there? They clearly know that you're waiting at the door, though. After a few moments of more scrambling and more hushed whispers, the bolt to the door slides away, and the door opens – but only a crack. On the other side is Jyrranaz, with her hood down and her skin noticeably clean compared to when you usually see her with venom leaking from nearly every orifice. "[pc.name]," she says, nodding to you as if this were a casual encounter on the street. You respond with a dumb 'uh, hi,' and ask if everything is alright. It sounds like there's a scuffle going on in there. "No, actually, quite the opposite," she answers quickly. "Everything is fine. I'm just, uh..." She pauses, and from the look on her face, she has no intention of continuing that train of thought. "You're obviously here for an update on our progress with the Dragosnblood," she says, changing the subject. ... Sure, why not. One thing at a time. How has her research been with the Dragonsblood? "Quite illuminating, actually!" she answers, her voice raising an octave and her posture straightening. As soon as she's given the opportunity to talk about her work – and the apparent progress it's made – she turns into a different person entirely. "Lyric and I have made significant strides towards my goal of learning if it's possible to make a vesparan woman into a queen, thanks to your scientific contribution, [pc.name]. While the Dragonsblood is not the solution I've been searching for, it is a substantial step in progress towards my final goal." Is that to say that it had an effect on Lyric? Jyrranaz shuts her mouth immediately. Her eyes go wide and her lips curl in on themselves. She's acting like she told a secret that wasn't hers to tell. You ask her if Lyric is okay. Again, Jyrranaz doesn't answer right away. "[lyric.HeShe] asked me not to let you in." You ask her a second time if Lyric is okay. What has she done to your kobold? "Lyric is fine," she insists. Her mouth curls wryly, but you wouldn't call it a smile. "Your kobold might not be, though." [pc.dcb |What the fuck does that mean? You're starting to get annoyed, and now she's implying that your kobold might not be okay. You ask again, and you emphasize your tone to make it clear that you're not accepting any more runarounds: what in the Hell has happened to Lyric? |You're starting to get annoyed by her runarounds, and now that she's saying that 'your kobold' might not be okay, there's a sudden sense of urgency to the conversation. You ask again, and although you're not typically one to throw your authority around, you make it clear in your tone that you're not asking for riddles: what has happened to Lyric? |Oh gosh, what does that mean? Lyric is okay, but your kobold isn't? Is Lyric not a kobold? Do you have a kobold not named Lyric? You're not good with riddles and this is your precious little buddy you're talking about. Your poor heart can't stand the runarounds, so you ask Jyrranaz to tell you plainly: what's happened to your [lyric.mf |boy |girl ]? ] Despite the sudden [pc.dcb |intensity |authority |urgency ] in your voice, Jyrranaz, once more, does not answer. Instead, she leans back and turns her head to face into the room. "Lyric, are you okay?" she asks. "Yes, I'm fine," a voice answers back. It... sounds like Lyric, but there's a distinct drop in inflection in [lyric.hisHer] voice, as if [lyric.hisHer] diaphragm had gotten longer[pc.isDK |[lyric.mf |. What, did his balls suddenly drop or something? |. ] |. ] "I just– I–" There's another pause, followed by an exasperated, defeated sigh. "You're going to have to show [pc.himHer] eventually, Lyric," Jyrranaz says into her laboratory. "Yeah, I know," [lyric.heShe] responds. "Let [pc.himHer] in." "

rows.original: Jyrranaz steps aside and lets you into the laboratory. There to greet you is strewn, discarded sheets of paper, each of them covered top to bottom in different formulas and diagrams, covering the floor and her several desks. Two bookcases separate the far wall from the laboratory proper, giving enough space between them and the wall for a person to peruse the shelves. On one of the desks is Jyrranaz's alembic, dressed with differently-shaped vials and glass pipes, and you notice that several of them are stained red as opposed to the usual purple. But there's no Lyric. You call [lyric.hisHer] name. You hear something large and sharp scuffling across the floor behind the bookcase to your right. "Yeah, uh," Lyric says meekly. "Just..." Then, nothing more. No more words, no more scuffling. You don't know what to expect when you round the edge of the bookcase. You believe them both when they say that Lyric is 'fine', but from how they're talking, [lyric.heShe] could be something truly hideous. A kobold that started transforming halfway into a proper (albeit tiny) dragon, but then got stuck halfway. Some kind of kobold-dragon-vesparan mix, with a thorax instead of a tail. Maybe [lyric.heShe]'s just a pile of flesh: they had distilled the Dragonsblood, which is a natural transformative, but Lyric's body was incompatible and simply broke down, and 'fine' just means that [lyric.heShe]'s not in pain. When you round the edge of the bookcase, between the wall of Jyrranaz's laboratory and the shelves... you double-take, agog. Your jaw drops open. You freeze in place. It's Lyric. Just... Lyric. Except [lyric.heShe]'s huge. Standing there with [lyric.hisHer] tail loosely wrapped around [lyric.hisHer] ankles, defensively curled inward, showing you [lyric.hisHer] shoulder, as if bracing for a strike. The Lyric you had left with Jyrranaz to work on chemistry was a four-foot tall little lizard covered in smooth scales, a rounded head, prominent-but-dulled horns, a thick, smooth tail that reached [lyric.hisHer] ankles, little nibbly teeth... This creature, unmistakably Lyric, stands towering, easily double the size of the kobold you had left behind. The horns on [lyric.hisHer] head had grown out, still dulled, but longer and more visually-commanding on [lyric.hisHer] skull. [lyric.HisHer] snout, originally a bit squashed like a cat's, has extended, with more threatening teeth, more like an alligator's. Lyric's tail has grown thicker to accommodate [lyric.hisHer] new immensity, now nearly as wide around as [lyric.hisHer] torso, although still only long enough to reach [lyric.hisHer] ankles, and the topside is covered in thick, jutting scales[lyric.mf | |. And, impossible not to notice, sitting on her chest are a pair of breasts that could make a minotaur woman blush with envy, each one nearly double the size of [lyric.hisHer] head ]. But... it's still Lyric. The same, green scales with the same yellow under-scales visible on [lyric.hisHer] neck. The same gentle, golden eyes with vertical slits[lyric.electrumRange 0 200 | |. Indulgently, the same huge ass, made even more substantial and, frankly, intimidating with [lyric.hisHer] increased size ]. Even the clothing is literally the same: the same green tunic with red trim and red undershirt, down to the bandages on [lyric.hisHer] wrists, notably tighter and more restrictive than they were before. The change is admittedly jarring. [pc.heightRange 0 90 108 |You've been so used to looking down when speaking to Lyric that, now that [lyric.heShe]'s double the height [lyric.heShe] was, having to crane your neck back to look up at [lyric.himHer] is a suddenly new experience |You've only ever known Lyric as a small kobold, some[pc.isDK |thing |one ] that you had to look down to speak to and some[pc.isDK |thing |one ] that could fit into your pack. And now, neither is true anymore: Lyric is so gigantic that you can hold a conversation with [lyric.himHer] eye-to-eye |Thankfully, [lyric.heShe]'s still shorter than you are, but the difference now is almost negligible compared to the tiny thing that could fit into your pack. It's almost hard to believe that this is Lyric ]. Hesitantly, Lyric lifts [lyric.hisHer] left palm and waves it at you in a nervous greeting. "H-Hi, [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] says – again, it's [lyric.hisHer] voice, but it's got a deeper lilt to it, almost like it's been weighted down. Wow. You ask [lyric.himHer] how [lyric.heShe] feels. Lyric takes a moment. [lyric.HeShe] takes a long, deep breath, testing the new limits of [lyric.hisHer] lungs. [lyric.HeShe] runs [lyric.hisHer] scaly claws over [lyric.hisHer] arms, feeling the swell of [lyric.hisHer] biceps underneath the strained, tightened fabric barely containing [lyric.hisHer] body. [lyric.HisHer] tail wags once, lifting up until the tip is well past [lyric.hisHer] neck, then lowering back down to the floor gently – despite the huge increase in mass, [lyric.heShe] moves it as fluidly as a finger. "Honestly?" [lyric.heShe] asks, [lyric.hisHer] lips breaking into a faint, but genuine, smile as [lyric.heShe] starts to relax. "Kind of absolutely incredible."
rows.translation: Jyrranaz退到一旁，让你进入了实验室。那里散落着一堆被丢弃的纸张，每张纸上都密密麻麻地写满了各种公式和图表，这些纸张铺满了地面以及她的几张办公桌。 两个书架将远墙与实验室本身隔开，在书架与墙壁之间留出了足够的空间，让人可以方便地翻阅架子上的物品。在其中一张桌子上，放着Jyrranaz的蒸馏器，上面装着各种形状不同的小瓶子和玻璃管，你注意到其中有几个瓶子的颜色是红色的，而不是通常的紫色。 但是并没有歌词。 你打电话吧。 [lyric.hisHer] 名字。你听到右边书架后面有什么东西沉重而尖锐地在地板上拖动的声音。“嗯，对，”莱丽克怯生生地说，“只是……” 然后，再也没有任何声音了。再也没有话语，也没有拖动的声音。 当你绕过书架的边缘时，你根本不知道会发生什么。他们都说莱丽克“没事”，但你从他们说话的语气来看…… [lyric.heShe] 那可能会是一种极其恐怖的东西。一种半路开始变成真正的（虽然体型很小）龙的 kobold，但转变过程却半途而止。某种介于 kobold、龙和 vesparan 之间的生物，它的身体有胸腔却没有尾巴。也许吧…… [lyric.heShe]它只不过是一堆肉而已：他们提取出了龙血这种具有天然转化作用的物质，但莱丽克的身体与之不兼容，因此才会出现这种反应。而“没事”只不过是意味着情况没有变得更糟而已。 [lyric.heShe]它并没有感到疼痛。 当你绕过书架的边缘，来到Jyrranaz实验室的墙壁与书架之间的地方时……你会猛地停住脚步，惊愕不已。你的下巴会掉下来，你会僵在原地。 那是Lyric。就是……Lyric。只不过…… [lyric.heShe]的 巨大的站在那里，与……一同 [lyric.hisHer] 尾巴松松地缠绕着 [lyric.hisHer] 脚踝呈防御性地向内弯曲，这样就能让你清楚地看到…… [lyric.hisHer] 耸起了肩膀，仿佛在准备迎接攻击。你交给Jyrranaz去研究其化学成分的那种生物，其实是一种四英尺高的小蜥蜴，全身覆盖着光滑的鳞片，头部呈圆形，角虽然明显但已经变得钝化了，尾巴粗壮而光滑，一直延伸到…… [lyric.hisHer] 脚踝，还有那些小小的尖牙…… 这种生物毫无疑问属于莱里克族，它体型高大，体积几乎是你们之前遇到的那些地精的两倍。它头上的角…… [lyric.hisHer] 头发已经长长了，虽然仍然显得有些呆板，但长度增加了，外观上也更加引人注目了。 [lyric.hisHer] 骷髅头。 [lyric.HisHer] 它的吻部原本有点像猫的吻部，现在变得更为延长，牙齿也更加凶猛，看起来更像鳄鱼的吻部了。Lyric的尾巴也变粗了，以便更好地适应各种环境。 [lyric.hisHer] 一种全新的广阔感，如今其范围几乎已经与……一样宽广了。 [lyric.hisHer] 躯干，虽然仍然只够达到……的长度而已。 [lyric.hisHer] 脚踝部位，而其上表面覆盖着厚厚的、凸出的鳞片[lyric.mf | |而且，绝对无法忽视的是，她胸前那对乳房大得足以让任何一位弥诺陶洛斯女性都感到嫉妒——每一侧的大小几乎是普通女性的两倍。 [lyric.hisHer] 头部 ]但是……它依然是莱丽克。还是那身绿色的鳞片，以及那些黄色的底纹，依然清晰可见。 [lyric.hisHer] 脖子。那双同样温柔、金色的眼睛，还有那竖状的瞳孔……[lyric.electrumRange 0 200 | |宽容地，那个同样巨大的东西，变得更为庞大，坦白说，也更加令人生畏了…… [lyric.hisHer] 增大的尺寸 ]就连服装也一模一样：同样的绿色长袍，红色边饰，还有红色的内衣，甚至连绑在身上的绷带也都一样。 [lyric.hisHer] 手腕处的束缚明显变得更加严格和限制性强了。 这种变化确实让人感到很不适应。 [pc.heightRange 0 90 108 |你已经习惯了在和Lyric说话时总是居高临下，以至于现在…… [lyric.heShe]是它高度的两倍 [lyric.heShe] 得把脖子往后仰才能看到。 向上 在……时候 [lyric.himHer] 这是一种全新的体验。 |你一直以来都只知道Lyric是一只体型较小的地精……[pc.isDK |东西 |一个 ] 那些你不得不低下头去与他们交谈的人，以及一些其他的人……[pc.isDK |东西 |一个 ] 那种能够放进你背包里的东西。但现在，这两种说法都不再成立了：Lyric实在太大了，大到你可以用它来进行对话了。 [lyric.himHer] 意见一致 |幸运的是， [lyric.heShe]它的长度仍然比你短，但与那个能放进你背包里的微小物品相比，这种差距已经几乎可以忽略不计了。真的很难相信，这就是Lyric。 ]莱丽克犹豫着，抬起了手。 [lyric.hisHer] 他紧张地用左手朝你挥了挥，表示问候：“嗨，你好…… [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] 也就是说，还是那句话…… [lyric.hisHer] 这声音听起来很普通，但却带着一种更为深沉的韵律，仿佛被赋予了某种重量一般。 哇…… 你问…… [lyric.himHer] 如何 [lyric.heShe] 这种感觉…… 莱丽克沉默了片刻。 [lyric.HeShe] 深吸一口气，挑战着自己新的极限…… [lyric.hisHer] 肺部。 [lyric.HeShe] 运行 [lyric.hisHer] 鳞片状的爪子 [lyric.hisHer] 举起手臂，感受着那种力量正在涌动…… [lyric.hisHer] 在那些因紧张而绷紧的肌肉组织下方，肱二头肌几乎快要被挤破了。 [lyric.hisHer] 身体。 [lyric.HisHer] 尾巴会摇动一次，然后向上扬起，直到尾巴的尖端远远地高出其他部分。 [lyric.hisHer] 将脖子缓缓低下，再轻轻回到地面——尽管体重增加了许多。 [lyric.heShe] 真的吗？ [lyric.heShe] 询问道， [lyric.hisHer] 嘴唇微微张开，露出一个淡淡的、但却是发自内心的微笑。 [lyric.heShe] 开始放松下来，心想：“简直太不可思议了。

There to greet you is strewn, discarded sheets of paper, each of them covered top to bottom in different formulas and diagrams, covering the floor and her several desks. Two bookcases separate the far wall from the laboratory proper, giving enough space between them and the wall for a person to peruse the shelves. On one of the desks is Jyrranaz's alembic, dressed with differently-shaped vials and glass pipes, and you notice that several of them are stained red as opposed to the usual purple. But there's no Lyric. You call [lyric.hisHer] name. You hear something large and sharp scuffling across the floor behind the bookcase to your right. "Yeah, uh," Lyric says meekly. "Just..." Then, nothing more. No more words, no more scuffling. You don't know what to expect when you round the edge of the bookcase. You believe them both when they say that Lyric is 'fine', but from how they're talking, [lyric.heShe] could be something truly hideous. A kobold that started transforming halfway into a proper (albeit tiny) dragon, but then got stuck halfway. Some kind of kobold-dragon-vesparan mix, with a thorax instead of a tail. Maybe [lyric.heShe]'s just a pile of flesh: they had distilled the Dragonsblood, which is a natural transformative, but Lyric's body was incompatible and simply broke down, and 'fine' just means that [lyric.heShe]'s not in pain. When you round the edge of the bookcase, between the wall of Jyrranaz's laboratory and the shelves... you double-take, agog. Your jaw drops open. You freeze in place. It's Lyric. Just... Lyric. Except [lyric.heShe]'s huge. Standing there with [lyric.hisHer] tail loosely wrapped around [lyric.hisHer] ankles, defensively curled inward, showing you [lyric.hisHer] shoulder, as if bracing for a strike. The Lyric you had left with Jyrranaz to work on chemistry was a four-foot tall little lizard covered in smooth scales, a rounded head, prominent-but-dulled horns, a thick, smooth tail that reached [lyric.hisHer] ankles, little nibbly teeth... This creature, unmistakably Lyric, stands towering, easily double the size of the kobold you had left behind. The horns on [lyric.hisHer] head had grown out, still dulled, but longer and more visually-commanding on [lyric.hisHer] skull. [lyric.HisHer] snout, originally a bit squashed like a cat's, has extended, with more threatening teeth, more like an alligator's. Lyric's tail has grown thicker to accommodate [lyric.hisHer] new immensity, now nearly as wide around as [lyric.hisHer] torso, although still only long enough to reach [lyric.hisHer] ankles, and the topside is covered in thick, jutting scales[lyric.mf | |. And, impossible not to notice, sitting on her chest are a pair of breasts that could make a minotaur woman blush with envy, each one nearly double the size of [lyric.hisHer] head ]. But... it's still Lyric. The same, green scales with the same yellow under-scales visible on [lyric.hisHer] neck. The same gentle, golden eyes with vertical slits[lyric.electrumRange 0 200 | |. Indulgently, the same huge ass, made even more substantial and, frankly, intimidating with [lyric.hisHer] increased size ]. Even the clothing is literally the same: the same green tunic with red trim and red undershirt, down to the bandages on [lyric.hisHer] wrists, notably tighter and more restrictive than they were before. The change is admittedly jarring. [pc.heightRange 0 90 108 |You've been so used to looking down when speaking to Lyric that, now that [lyric.heShe]'s double the height [lyric.heShe] was, having to crane your neck back to look up at [lyric.himHer] is a suddenly new experience |You've only ever known Lyric as a small kobold, some[pc.isDK |thing |one ] that you had to look down to speak to and some[pc.isDK |thing |one ] that could fit into your pack. And now, neither is true anymore: Lyric is so gigantic that you can hold a conversation with [lyric.himHer] eye-to-eye |Thankfully, [lyric.heShe]'s still shorter than you are, but the difference now is almost negligible compared to the tiny thing that could fit into your pack. It's almost hard to believe that this is Lyric ]. Hesitantly, Lyric lifts [lyric.hisHer] left palm and waves it at you in a nervous greeting. "H-Hi, [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] says – again, it's [lyric.hisHer] voice, but it's got a deeper lilt to it, almost like it's been weighted down. Wow. You ask [lyric.himHer] how [lyric.heShe] feels. Lyric takes a moment. [lyric.HeShe] takes a long, deep breath, testing the new limits of [lyric.hisHer] lungs. [lyric.HeShe] runs [lyric.hisHer] scaly claws over [lyric.hisHer] arms, feeling the swell of [lyric.hisHer] biceps underneath the strained, tightened fabric barely containing [lyric.hisHer] body. [lyric.HisHer] tail wags once, lifting up until the tip is well past [lyric.hisHer] neck, then lowering back down to the floor gently – despite the huge increase in mass, [lyric.heShe] moves it as fluidly as a finger. "Honestly?" [lyric.heShe] asks, [lyric.hisHer] lips breaking into a faint, but genuine, smile as [lyric.heShe] starts to relax. "Kind of absolutely incredible." "

rows.original: "I told you that you didn't have anything to worry about, Lyric," Jyrranaz says. You've been so caught up in Lyric and [lyric.hisHer] transformation that you almost forgot that she was there with you two. You ask Lyric what it was that [lyric.heShe] was afraid of. "I mean," [lyric.heShe] stutters. [lyric.HeShe]'s still curled into a defensive ball, hiding as much of [lyric.hisHer] features as [lyric.heShe] can and to make [lyric.himHer]self appear smaller than [lyric.heShe] is, but there's no hiding all of that. "I was... I was worried that you might not like it, [pc.name]." Didn't you two have this conversation before you left? That you weren't going to get in the way of Lyric's dream of becoming [lyric.mf |royalty, the first king of the kobolds |a kobold queen ]? "This is still kinda different," [lyric.heShe] whines. [lyric.HeShe] reaches up and wraps [lyric.hisHer] comparatively-gigantic right hand around [lyric.hisHer] snout, giving it a squeeze. "The most I was expecting was to be, you know, me, but bigger. That's what my Village Mother told [lyric.mf |all the girl kobolds my age |me ] would happen. But this!" [lyric.heShe] says, shaking [lyric.hisHer] elongated muzzle back and forth. [lyric.HeShe] pivots [lyric.hisHer] body and lifts [lyric.hisHer] tail, gripping onto it by the tip. "And this!" [lyric.heShe] almost shouts accusatorily, wrangling [lyric.hisHer] own tail like [lyric.heShe] was trying to control a rabid animal. [lyric.mf |He lets it go, and both of his hands go to the lower hem of his tunic, which is just barely low enough to cover his crotch. "And–!" he starts, his fingers curling around the fabric, but then he stops himself. "Well... maybe not in front of company." |She lets it go, and both of her hands go shamelessly to her breasts, easily the size of F-cups and yet still looking somewhat modest against her gigantic frame. "And don't get me started on these! They're so heavy, and I didn't know the buttons on their tops could be that sensitive. [pc.cupRange flat D |I don't know how you do it, Jyrranaz. |[pc.name], how do you do it? ]" Jyrranaz just laughs in response. ] [pc.isDK |Look, you know you can be an abrasive asshole sometimes. You know that because you like it. But this was never about what you wanted, this was about what [lyric.heShe] wanted. Your kobold wanted to know if it was possible to become a queen[lyric.mf |, or whatever he wants to call himself ], and, well... [lyric.heShe] and Jyrranaz happened to catch you in-between your other indulgences. "Hmm," Jyrranaz hums, smirking as she tilts her head and rests her chin on her index finger. You can tell that she doesn't believe every word. Which is fine – you didn't ask her. |You assure Lyric that this was never about you: this was about [lyric.himHer]. Well, and Jyrranaz's research, but the reason why you went about and found a crystalized hit of blood from a dragon was for your kobold. No matter whether Lyric became a fully-fledged, winged dragon of yesteryear, or a 'proper' Village [lyric.mf |Father |Mother ], or if nothing happened at all, [lyric.heShe] would still be the same Lyric that you pulled out of the snow. ] Lyric's body remains coiled around itself, but the more you speak, the more you can see that [lyric.hisHer] face softens as [lyric.hisHer] smile broadens. If Lyric hadn't told you the moment you met that [lyric.heShe] loved you, [lyric.heShe] wouldn't have needed to tell you now: the look on [lyric.hisHer] face says it for [lyric.himHer]. [lyric.HeShe] has a brand new body, something that [lyric.heShe] got essentially overnight. There's a lot to be confused and unsure about. Even something as basic as walking is going to be weird and awkward for a while. But you're going to be there to help [lyric.himHer] get used to it – after all, this is [lyric.hisHer] dream body[pc.isDK |. You're especially looking forward to what those hips can do later ]. [pc.isDK |Lyric's cheeks blush a deep yellow, but the rest of y |Y ]our words have an apparent effect on [lyric.himHer]. By the time you're done, Lyric is standing tall, facing toward you fully. [lyric.HisHer] tail remains tied somewhat tightly around [lyric.hisHer] legs, but you'd sooner guess that's because [lyric.heShe] doesn't quite have a handle on its enormity just yet. "Staying with you was the best idea I ever had, [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] says. [lyric.HisHer] hands fold together at [lyric.hisHer] abdomen, with [lyric.hisHer] thumbs twiddling around each other aimlessly. [lyric.HeShe] fidgets, looking like [lyric.heShe] wants to do more than just tell you how much you mean to [lyric.himHer], but [lyric.heShe]'s afraid to make a move, particularly with company.
rows.translation: 我早就告诉过你，你没有什么好担心的，Lyric，”Jyrranaz说道，“你一直太过于纠结于这些事情了…… [lyric.hisHer] 那种变化如此之大，以至于你几乎忘记了她当时也在你们身边。 你问Lyric，究竟是什么导致了这种变化…… [lyric.heShe] 我是说， [lyric.heShe] 结结巴巴地说。 [lyric.HeShe]它仍然蜷缩成球状，尽可能地隐藏自己。 [lyric.hisHer] 具有……的特点 [lyric.heShe] 能够并且愿意去做 [lyric.himHer]让自己看起来更渺小 [lyric.heShe] 是的，但有些事情是无法隐瞒的。 那个我……我是担心你可能会不喜欢它。 [pc.name]你们在离开之前不是已经谈过这个吗？说过你们不会妨碍Lyric实现成为……的梦想。 [lyric.mf |罗亚尔蒂，地精一族的第一位国王 |一位地精女王 ]这还是有点不一样的。 [lyric.heShe] 抱怨连连。 [lyric.HeShe] 伸出手来将其包裹起来。 [lyric.hisHer] 相对巨大的右手 [lyric.hisHer] 我捏了捏它的鼻子，说道：“我原本最多也就以为会变成一个比我自己更大一点的版本罢了。我妈妈也是这么告诉我的。 [lyric.mf |所有和我同龄的女孩地精们 |我 ] 这本该发生才对。但现在的状况却是…… [lyric.heShe] 颤抖着说道， [lyric.hisHer] 长长的枪管来回摆动。 [lyric.HeShe] 支点 [lyric.hisHer] 身体与力量 [lyric.hisHer] 尾巴，紧紧抓住它的末端。“还有这个！ [lyric.heShe] 她几乎是带着指责的口吻大声喊叫着，激烈地争论着。 [lyric.hisHer] 像自己的尾巴一样 [lyric.heShe] 他当时正在试图控制一只发狂的动物。 [lyric.mf |他松开了手，两只手同时伸向自己长袍的下摆——那下摆刚好够遮住裆部。“然后——！”他刚开口，手指便缠住了布料，但随即又停住了。“嗯……或许在别人面前还是不要这样吧。 |她松开了手，两只手毫不羞涩地伸向自己的胸部——那些胸部显然属于F罩杯的大小，但在她那庞大的身躯上，却显得有些“低调”。 “更别提这些了！它们太重了，而且我之前根本不知道它们顶部的那些按钮其实是可以…… 那个 敏感的。 [pc.cupRange flat D |我不知道你是怎么做到的，Jyrranaz。 |[pc.name]你是怎么做到的？ ]Jyrranaz just laughs in response. ] [pc.isDK |听着，你心里明白，有时候你确实会表现得像个讨人厌的混蛋。你清楚这一点，因为你就喜欢这样。但这次的事情，根本和这些无关…… 你 正是人们所需要的，这正是人们所期望的。 [lyric.heShe] 想知道是否有可能成为女王……你的地精真的很想知道这一点。[lyric.mf |或者他想用什么称呼自己都行。 ]嗯，还有…… [lyric.heShe] 而Jyrranaz恰好在你在其他事情上沉溺的时候抓到了你。 “嗯，”Jyrranaz哼了一声，一边笑着说，一边歪着头，把下巴搁在食指上。你能看出她根本不相信你的话。 每个 嗯，这也无所谓——反正你又没有问她。 |你向Lyric保证，这件事从来都与你无关：这一切都是为了…… [lyric.himHer]嗯，还有Jyrranaz的研究，但你之所以费尽心思去寻找那颗龙的血晶，其实是为了你的狗头人。无论Lyric最终是变成了一只真正的、有翅膀的古代巨龙，还是变成了一只“普通的”村庄…… [lyric.mf |父亲 |母亲 ]或者，如果根本什么事情都没有发生的话…… [lyric.heShe] 那依然会是你从雪中挖出来的那首歌。 ] 莱丽克的身体依然蜷缩着，但你说得越多，就越能发现这一点。 [lyric.hisHer] 面容变得柔和起来 [lyric.hisHer] 笑容会让人显得更加开朗。如果Lyric没有在你初次见到她的那一刻就告诉你这一点的话…… [lyric.heShe] 爱你。 [lyric.heShe] 现在其实没必要告诉你这个：你脸上的表情已经说明了一切。 [lyric.hisHer] 表情已经说明了一切。 [lyric.himHer]. [lyric.HeShe] 拥有一个全新的外观，某些方面确实发生了变化。 [lyric.heShe] 这一切几乎是在一夜之间发生的。有很多事情会让人感到困惑和不确定。就连像走路这样最基本的事情，在一开始也会让人觉得奇怪和笨拙。但你会在那里帮助你度过这个阶段。 [lyric.himHer] 习惯吧——毕竟，这就是现实。 [lyric.hisHer] 理想中的完美身材[pc.isDK |你尤其期待那些臀部之后能做出什么动作来。 ]. [pc.isDK |莉莉克的脸颊变成了深黄色，而她身体的其他部分…… |Y ]我们的话语显然产生了某种影响。 [lyric.himHer]当你完成操作时，Lyric将会直立站立，完全朝向你的方向。 [lyric.HisHer] 尾巴仍然被紧紧地绑在后面。 [lyric.hisHer] 虽然有腿，但你更可能会认为那是因为…… [lyric.heShe] 和你在一起，真的是我做过的最正确的决定。 [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] 说。 [lyric.HisHer] 双手交叠在……处 [lyric.hisHer] 腹部，以及 [lyric.hisHer] 无所事事地闲荡着。 [lyric.HeShe] 坐立不安，显得很焦躁。 [lyric.heShe] 并不满足于仅仅做这些事情，而是想要做得更多。 告诉 你真的非常重要。 [lyric.himHer]但是 [lyric.heShe]害怕采取行动，尤其是在有他人的情况下。

rows.original: [pc.isDK |You've never been very good with the mushy shit. ]In a bid to change the topic[pc.isDK | |, and maybe ease the tension in Lyric a bit ], you ask Jyrranaz what sort of progress this helps her make with her research. Kobolds and vesparans may have similar societal constructs, but their biology can't be more different. "You'd be surprised, actually," she answers. "After all, the reason why kobold and vesparan social constructs are what they are is because of similarities in their biology. Just because I'm not small and covered in scales, or a kobold doesn't have a stinger and produces honey, doesn't mean we're complete strangers." "Which leads me into your question," she continues as she turns toward her workbench. It's the same workbench you normally see her at, and aside from a red tint on the vials of her alembic, it's the same tools and same stacks of paper strewn about. But she reaches for one of them and pulls it out, lifting it to your face, and although she's waving it about too quickly for you to read and you can't make sense of any of the diagrams, you can at least tell that the ink on the paper is fresh. "The answer is: quite a lot." Lyric stands beside you, [lyric.hisHer] tail wagging excitedly as Jyrranaz reveals the results of their shared experimentation. Although [lyric.heShe]'s only in your periphery vision, [pc.heightRange 0 96 108 |you're suddenly made acutely aware of just how... small you feel beside [lyric.himHer] now. A day ago, you'd never have thought that you would be the tiny one compared to Lyric... |it doesn't feel like Lyric that's standing next to you. Despite that speech about Lyric being the same kobold [lyric.heShe] always was, there's... nonetheless a drastic change. One that'll take a while to get used to. |it's hard not to notice the vibrations of something nearly as tall and heavy as you when they stand next to you – especially when their tail is swishing back and forth as hard as it is. Despite that whole speech about Lyric still being Lyric, this may take some getting used to... ] "I won't get into the weeds since you're not a chemist yourself, [pc.name], but the short answer is that the Dragonsblood having the effect it had on Lyric is strong evidence that a catalyst of high enough quality – and high enough purity – could have an effect on, theoretically, anybody, provided their species had a biological equivalent-but-'greater'." Jyrranaz's eyes constantly flit between yours and the paper she's holding as her free hand's index finger traces along the diagrams she's drawn. Of course, none of it means anything to you. "I don't know what it'd do if you found a similar catalyst for, say, a Root Of Man. I don't know what a 'biological greater' is for a human. But if it's possible for a kobold, then it's possible for a vesparan." But Lyric said earlier that [lyric.heShe] doesn't resemble what [lyric.heShe] expected to be if [lyric.heShe] became kobold 'royalty'. Does that mean that Lyric is, biologically, a Kobold [lyric.mf |King |Queen ]? Or a Village [lyric.mf |Father |Mother ]? Lyric's tail wags harder at the question. Or, maybe, because it was you that asked it. Jyrranaz notices and nods to [lyric.himHer]. "I wouldn't want to ruin the fun for Lyric by answering that question for [lyric.himHer]," she responds. [lyric.HeShe] stands on [lyric.hisHer] scaly tip-toes, bounding on them once[lyric.mf | |. You can hear the fabric of her tunic strain to keep her breasts from bursting out – or ripping the whole thing apart ]. "Okay, so," [lyric.heShe] starts, extending both [lyric.hisHer] arms and splaying [silly |all eight of [lyric.hisHer] fingers and both [lyric.hisHer] thumbs |all ten of [lyric.hisHer] fingers ]. "On the one hand, no, I'm not a Village Mother, per se. This isn't the correct result. I'm..." [lyric.HeShe] pauses, clicking out a few syllables on [lyric.hisHer] tongue, unable to find the right word to continue. "I'm not really a 'kobold' anymore. Which is kind of weird to suggest. I've never not been a kobold; I don't know what it's like to not be a kobold, you know?" You fold your arms behind your back as you wait for [lyric.himHer] to finish [lyric.hisHer] tangent. [lyric.HeShe] picks up on your body language quickly. "Right, sorry. What I mean is, I feel like I'm closer to a dragon than I am to a kobold like I am right now. But, like... not all the way? Dragons were the size of buildings, and had wings, and walked on all fours. I'm not quite that, but I'm not quite a kobold, either." Wouldn't that suggest that Jyrranaz's findings are incorrect? "Well, kobolds and dragons are relatives on the evolutionary line. Close relatives, actually. While it's true that I didn't become, well, what you call 'royalty', it's also not really surprising – the ingredient we used wasn't called 'Koboldsblood', after all!" [lyric.HeShe] laughs, and it's a hearty, full-chested laugh, a far cry from the lighter, flightier giggles that [lyric.heShe] used to make. "So the fact that it worked on me is actually really good news! Because if we can get results like these," [lyric.heShe] says, grimacing on that last word as [lyric.heShe] flexes [lyric.hisHer] right bicep as hard as [lyric.heShe] can. Despite being double the height, the flex does virtually nothing. "Then it means that Jyrranaz getting results with something that resonates with her biology even better than the Dragonsblood did with mine is possible!" "I just have to find it," Jyrranaz hums in frustration as she rubs at her chin. ... You apologize, but you still don't totally understand. What progress has Jyrranaz made in her research to become a vesparan queen? From where you're standing, all they really learned was how to [pc.isBimbo |turns kobolds into total [lyric.mf |hunks |babes ]. |accelerate a kobold's... evolution, into dragons? If you have that right? ] "The literal answer is nothing," Jyrranaz admits. Despite the dour response, her mouth crooks into a wry smile. "But, optimistically, it means that my research hasn't been for nothing. There is a way to do it. A common vesparan drone can become a queen." She goes back to rubbing her chin. "If there's an ingredient for kobolds, then there must be an ingredient for vesparans, even if I have to synthesize it. Hence... I just have to find it."
rows.translation: [pc.isDK |你在处理这类感情纠葛的事情上从来都不在行。 ]为了转移话题……[pc.isDK | |或许还能缓解Lyric内心的紧张情绪。 ]你问Jyrranaz，这种研究能帮助她在自己的课题上取得什么样的进展。虽然地精和维斯帕兰人的社会结构可能相似，但他们的生物学特征却存在着巨大的差异。 “其实你会感到惊讶的，”她回答道，“毕竟，地精和维斯帕兰人之所以会形成这样的社会结构，背后是有其原因的…… 因为 它们的生物学特征有很多相似之处。仅仅因为我不是体型小且浑身长满鳞片的生物，或者一只地精没有刺并且会分泌蜂蜜，并不意味着我们是完全陌生的。” “这就引出了你的问题，”她一边说着，一边转向自己的工作台。 这就是你平时经常看到她使用的那个工作台。除了她蒸馏器中的小瓶子带有红色色调外，所有的工具和散落在周围的纸张都和以前一样。但她拿起了其中一份资料，举到你的面前。虽然她挥动得太快，你根本看不清上面的文字，也无法理解那些图表的含义，但至少你可以看出，纸上的墨水还是新鲜的。 答案是：非常多。” Lyric站在你身边， [lyric.hisHer] 当Jyrranaz宣布他们共同进行的实验结果时，狗兴奋地摇着尾巴。虽然…… [lyric.heShe]它只出现在你的视野边缘。 [pc.heightRange 0 96 108 |你会突然强烈地意识到，在与他人相比时，自己是多么……渺小。 [lyric.himHer] 现在。就在一天前，你绝对想象不到会发生这样的事。 你 与Lyric相比，它简直就是个小不点…… |不行。 感受到 就像站在你身边的Lyric一样。尽管有人说过Lyric和那些哥布林没什么两样…… [lyric.heShe] 一直以来都是这样，但……还是发生了巨大的变化。这种变化需要一段时间才能让人适应。 |当这样一只与你身高相仿、体重也差不多的大型动物站在你身边时，你很难不注意到它身体所散发出的震动——尤其是当它的尾巴不停地来回摆动时。尽管人们总说Lyric依然是原来的Lyric，但这一点可能还是需要一些时间来适应…… ] 既然你本身也不是化学家，我就不详细解释这些复杂的内容了。 [pc.name]但简而言之，龙血对莱丽克产生的影响充分证明了：只要催化剂的品质足够高、纯度足够高，理论上来说，它就可以对任何生物产生作用——前提是这些生物的体内必须存在与之对应的生物机制，而且这种机制的效力必须更强。Jyrranaz的目光不停地在你的眼睛和她手中拿着的纸张之间切换，她的空闲手的食指则沿着她画出的图表移动。当然，这些对你来说根本没有任何意义。‘如果你能找到类似的催化剂，比如说用于‘人类之根’的催化剂，那会怎么样呢？ 我不知道“生物上的优势”对人类来说意味着什么。但如果这种优势对地精来说是可能的，那么对维斯帕人来说也应该也是可能的。 不过，莉莉克之前说过…… [lyric.heShe] 与……完全不同 [lyric.heShe] 预计会如此 [lyric.heShe] 成为了地精贵族。那么，从生物学角度来看，Lyric实际上就是地精吗？ [lyric.mf |国王 |女王 ]还是一个村庄？ [lyric.mf |父亲 |母亲 ]听到这个问题，莱瑞克的尾巴摇得更加厉害了。或许，也是因为这个问题是你提出的吧。吉兰纳兹注意到了这一幕，于是点了点头表示同意。 [lyric.himHer]我可不想通过回答那个问题来破坏Lyric的乐趣。 [lyric.himHer]是的，”她回答道。 [lyric.HeShe] 位于……之上 [lyric.hisHer] 鳞片状的脚趾，一次就跳了上去。[lyric.mf | |你可以听到她那件长袍的布料在拼命绷紧，生怕她的胸部会撑破这件衣服，或者干脆把整件衣服扯得粉碎。 ]好吧，那么， [lyric.heShe] 开始，同时向两侧延伸 [lyric.hisHer] 四肢摊开 [silly |全部八个 [lyric.hisHer] 手指和两只手 [lyric.hisHer] 拇指 |全部十个 [lyric.hisHer] 手指 ]一方面，不，严格来说，我并不是什么‘村长妈妈’。这个结果并不正确。我其实是…… [lyric.HeShe] 暂停一下，逐个念出这几个音节。 [lyric.hisHer] 舌头却找不到合适的词语来继续说下去。“其实，我现在已经不算真正的‘地精’了。这么说起来有点奇怪……因为我从来都没有真正属于过他们。 不是 我曾经是一只地精；我不知道不是一只地精会是什么感觉，你懂吧？” 你双臂交叉在背后，等待着接下来的发生。 [lyric.himHer] 完成 [lyric.hisHer] 切线。 [lyric.HeShe] 能迅速捕捉到你的肢体语言。 “好吧，抱歉。我的意思是，我觉得我现在与龙的距离，比与地精的距离要近一些。但是……也还不是完全一样吧？龙可是有建筑物那么大，还有翅膀，而且是四肢着地行走的生物。 我算不上那个，但我也算不上地精。” 那么，这难道不意味着Jyrranaz的研究结果是错误的吗？ “嗯，地精和龙在进化谱系上确实是亲戚关系，而且关系还相当密切。 虽然我确实没有成为你们所说的“王室成员”，但这也并不奇怪——毕竟我们使用的材料根本就不是所谓的“地精之血”啊！ [lyric.HeShe] 笑声浑厚而响亮，与那些轻快、随意的咯咯笑声截然不同…… [lyric.heShe] 所以，这种方法对我有效，其实是个非常好的消息！因为如果我们能够取得这样的效果…… 这些," [lyric.heShe] 他说着，说到最后一个词时露出了苦笑。 [lyric.heShe] 展示实力 [lyric.hisHer] 用力收缩右二头肌 [lyric.heShe] 可以。尽管那个装置的高度是原来的两倍，但它几乎没有任何效果。‘这意味着，Jyrranaz找到某种能与她的生理结构更加匹配的装置，从而取得效果，这是完全有可能的！’” “我只需要找到它就行了，”Jyrranaz沮丧地喃喃道，一边揉着下巴。 ……你道了歉，但仍然没有完全理解。Jyrranaz到底取得了哪些进展呢？ 她 进行研究，以便成为…… 维斯帕兰 女王？从你的角度来看，他们真正学到的不过是如何…… [pc.isBimbo |将地精彻底转化为…… [lyric.mf |帅哥们 |美女们 ]. |加速狗头人的进化，使其变成龙？如果你拥有这样的能力的话…… ] 从字面上来说，答案是什么都没有，”Jyrranaz承认道。尽管她的回答显得有些沮丧，但她的嘴角还是浮现出一丝苦笑。“不过，从乐观的角度来看，这也意味着我的研究还没有失败。 为了 没什么。就这样。 是 一种实现方法。一种常见的维斯帕兰无人机。 可以 成为女王吧。”她又开始摸着下巴思考，“如果有一种材料是专门用于制作地精的，那么…… 必须 这是制造维斯帕兰人所需的材料，即使我必须自己合成它。所以……我只需要找到它就行了。
rows.raw: " [pc.isDK |You've never been very good with the mushy shit. ]In a bid to change the topic[pc.isDK | |, and maybe ease the tension in Lyric a bit ], you ask Jyrranaz what sort of progress this helps her make with her research. Kobolds and vesparans may have similar societal constructs, but their biology can't be more different. "You'd be surprised, actually," she answers. "After all, the reason why kobold and vesparan social constructs are what they are is because of similarities in their biology. Just because I'm not small and covered in scales, or a kobold doesn't have a stinger and produces honey, doesn't mean we're complete strangers." "Which leads me into your question," she continues as she turns toward her workbench. It's the same workbench you normally see her at, and aside from a red tint on the vials of her alembic, it's the same tools and same stacks of paper strewn about. But she reaches for one of them and pulls it out, lifting it to your face, and although she's waving it about too quickly for you to read and you can't make sense of any of the diagrams, you can at least tell that the ink on the paper is fresh. "The answer is: quite a lot." Lyric stands beside you, [lyric.hisHer] tail wagging excitedly as Jyrranaz reveals the results of their shared experimentation. Although [lyric.heShe]'s only in your periphery vision, [pc.heightRange 0 96 108 |you're suddenly made acutely aware of just how... small you feel beside [lyric.himHer] now. A day ago, you'd never have thought that you would be the tiny one compared to Lyric... |it doesn't feel like Lyric that's standing next to you. Despite that speech about Lyric being the same kobold [lyric.heShe] always was, there's... nonetheless a drastic change. One that'll take a while to get used to. |it's hard not to notice the vibrations of something nearly as tall and heavy as you when they stand next to you – especially when their tail is swishing back and forth as hard as it is. Despite that whole speech about Lyric still being Lyric, this may take some getting used to... ] "I won't get into the weeds since you're not a chemist yourself, [pc.name], but the short answer is that the Dragonsblood having the effect it had on Lyric is strong evidence that a catalyst of high enough quality – and high enough purity – could have an effect on, theoretically, anybody, provided their species had a biological equivalent-but-'greater'." Jyrranaz's eyes constantly flit between yours and the paper she's holding as her free hand's index finger traces along the diagrams she's drawn. Of course, none of it means anything to you. "I don't know what it'd do if you found a similar catalyst for, say, a Root Of Man. I don't know what a 'biological greater' is for a human. But if it's possible for a kobold, then it's possible for a vesparan." But Lyric said earlier that [lyric.heShe] doesn't resemble what [lyric.heShe] expected to be if [lyric.heShe] became kobold 'royalty'. Does that mean that Lyric is, biologically, a Kobold [lyric.mf |King |Queen ]? Or a Village [lyric.mf |Father |Mother ]? Lyric's tail wags harder at the question. Or, maybe, because it was you that asked it. Jyrranaz notices and nods to [lyric.himHer]. "I wouldn't want to ruin the fun for Lyric by answering that question for [lyric.himHer]," she responds. [lyric.HeShe] stands on [lyric.hisHer] scaly tip-toes, bounding on them once[lyric.mf | |. You can hear the fabric of her tunic strain to keep her breasts from bursting out – or ripping the whole thing apart ]. "Okay, so," [lyric.heShe] starts, extending both [lyric.hisHer] arms and splaying [silly |all eight of [lyric.hisHer] fingers and both [lyric.hisHer] thumbs |all ten of [lyric.hisHer] fingers ]. "On the one hand, no, I'm not a Village Mother, per se. This isn't the correct result. I'm..." [lyric.HeShe] pauses, clicking out a few syllables on [lyric.hisHer] tongue, unable to find the right word to continue. "I'm not really a 'kobold' anymore. Which is kind of weird to suggest. I've never not been a kobold; I don't know what it's like to not be a kobold, you know?" You fold your arms behind your back as you wait for [lyric.himHer] to finish [lyric.hisHer] tangent. [lyric.HeShe] picks up on your body language quickly. "Right, sorry. What I mean is, I feel like I'm closer to a dragon than I am to a kobold like I am right now. But, like... not all the way? Dragons were the size of buildings, and had wings, and walked on all fours. I'm not quite that, but I'm not quite a kobold, either." Wouldn't that suggest that Jyrranaz's findings are incorrect? "Well, kobolds and dragons are relatives on the evolutionary line. Close relatives, actually. While it's true that I didn't become, well, what you call 'royalty', it's also not really surprising – the ingredient we used wasn't called 'Koboldsblood', after all!" [lyric.HeShe] laughs, and it's a hearty, full-chested laugh, a far cry from the lighter, flightier giggles that [lyric.heShe] used to make. "So the fact that it worked on me is actually really good news! Because if we can get results like these," [lyric.heShe] says, grimacing on that last word as [lyric.heShe] flexes [lyric.hisHer] right bicep as hard as [lyric.heShe] can. Despite being double the height, the flex does virtually nothing. "Then it means that Jyrranaz getting results with something that resonates with her biology even better than the Dragonsblood did with mine is possible!" "I just have to find it," Jyrranaz hums in frustration as she rubs at her chin. ... You apologize, but you still don't totally understand. What progress has Jyrranaz made in her research to become a vesparan queen? From where you're standing, all they really learned was how to [pc.isBimbo |turns kobolds into total [lyric.mf |hunks |babes ]. |accelerate a kobold's... evolution, into dragons? If you have that right? ] "The literal answer is nothing," Jyrranaz admits. Despite the dour response, her mouth crooks into a wry smile. "But, optimistically, it means that my research hasn't been for nothing. There is a way to do it. A common vesparan drone can become a queen." She goes back to rubbing her chin. "If there's an ingredient for kobolds, then there must be an ingredient for vesparans, even if I have to synthesize it. Hence... I just have to find it." "

rows.original: You and Lyric bid farewell to Jyrranaz, and you make your way out of the hive. Like you guessed, Lyric has a hard time putting one foot in front of the other: [lyric.hisHer] stride is long and awkward, having to adjust for the sudden difference in height and the extra weight in [lyric.hisHer] tail[lyric.mf | |, not to mention the... excess ballast on her chest ]. Lyric clings to you the entire journey out of the hive, [lyric.hisHer] hands gripping tightly onto you as [lyric.heShe] slowly stumbles [lyric.hisHer] way out. The entire time, though, [lyric.heShe]'s laughing and giggling like [lyric.hisHer] legs have been broken and these are the first steps [lyric.heShe]'s been taking for years. [pc.heightRange 0 96 |Despite you being so much smaller than [lyric.himHer] now, and despite [lyric.himHer] leaning on you for support the entire way, [lyric.heShe]'s surprisingly light against you – still not light by any stretch of the imagination, but lighter than you expected |Even after [lyric.hisHer] [silly |glowup |growth spurt ], you're still taller than [lyric.himHer], but not by a lot. Even still, [lyric.heShe] feels lighter against you than you expected, even as [lyric.heShe] leans against you for support ]. When you're out in the [dayNight |daylight |darkness of night ] at the entrance to the hive, Lyric finally gains the confidence to pull away from you. Standing straight up is easy enough; it's anything else that's a challenge. "Okay," [lyric.heShe] says, taking a quick breath in and out through [lyric.hisHer] nose. [lyric.HeShe] flexes [lyric.hisHer] fingers, [lyric.heShe] curls [lyric.hisHer] toes, and [lyric.heShe] takes a step forward– And quickly loses balance. But, as if by second nature, [lyric.hisHer] tail whips and flexes behind [lyric.himHer]self, readjusting [lyric.hisHer] posture as [lyric.heShe] starts to fall forward. After a stumble and a few uneasy steps, [lyric.heShe]'s back upright in a standing position without having fallen over. [lyric.HeShe] tries again, and stumbles again. [lyric.HeShe] tries again, and stumbles a little less. [lyric.HeShe] tries again, and stumbles even less than that. It takes several minutes of adjusting and readjusting, and [lyric.hisHer] eyes never leave [lyric.hisHer] own feet the entire time... but, soon, [lyric.heShe] finds [lyric.hisHer] stride. After all, [lyric.heShe]'s not learning to walk – [lyric.heShe]'s learning to walk again. And soon after walking, [lyric.heShe]'s running, then sprinting full-tilt down the beaten path away from the hive. [lyric.HeShe] pumps [lyric.hisHer] arms as [lyric.hisHer] legs run as quickly as [lyric.heShe] can lift them, kicking up dirt with [lyric.hisHer] elongated claws with every step. [lyric.HisHer] long, girthy tail extends directly out from [lyric.hisHer] coccyx as [lyric.heShe] runs, and when [lyric.heShe] makes a turn, it pivots and swings behind [lyric.himHer]self for counterbalance. As natural as it is to walk and run, you don't know how quickly anyone else would be able to sprint like that after undergoing a transformation so drastic. Once [lyric.heShe]'s got [lyric.hisHer] fill of feeling the wind across [lyric.hisHer] scales, [lyric.heShe] adjusts course and starts making [lyric.hisHer] way back to you – and doesn't stop sprinting, colliding straight into you, wrapping [lyric.hisHer] arms around your body. [pc.heightRange 0 60 96 |You're small enough compared to [lyric.himHer] now that [lyric.heShe] scoops you into [lyric.hisHer] embrace, holding you closely and twirling you both around as [lyric.heShe] laughs like a kid. So this is how it felt. |You're knocked off-balance and despite the size difference, you're too heavy for Lyric to lift, but nonetheless, [lyric.heShe] pulls back on impact so that you two don't crash into the ground. [lyric.HeShe] laughs like a kid as [lyric.heShe] twirls and spins with you in [lyric.hisHer] arms. It might be a whole new body... but it's still Lyric. |Despite [lyric.hisHer] new size, [lyric.heShe]'s still small compared to you – but all that new mass, with all that momentum, crashing right into you still knocks you off-balance a bit. Lyric's arms wrap tightly around you as [lyric.heShe] spins and twirls you both, laughing like a kid all the while, acting as if you've given [lyric.himHer] a whole new lease on life. It might be a whole new body... but it's still Lyric. ] [lyric.HeShe] lets out a long, exuberant sigh when [lyric.heShe] finally finds it in [lyric.himHer]self to let you go. "I've wanted to do that since we saw each other in Jyrranaz's lab," [lyric.heShe] admits, [lyric.hisHer] cheeks turning slightly yellow as the blood rushes to [lyric.hisHer] face. "But, you know, there was company... and I didn't know how to take more than a step without tripping over myself, and I didn't know how heavy I'd be, and–" [pc.isDK |You place your whole palm against Lyric's mouth and tell [lyric.himHer] that it's fine, you get it. In fact, if anything, you're appreciative that [lyric.heShe] didn't do it in front of Jyrranaz. You're not great with public affection. |You place your index finger against Lyric's snout to shush [lyric.himHer], and you tell [lyric.himHer] that [lyric.heShe] doesn't need to explain every little thing. This is a big change for [lyric.himHer] and [lyric.hisHer] mind is running a mile a minute. You tell [lyric.himHer] to take a second to breathe. ] Lyric takes a deep breath through [lyric.hisHer] nostrils, and [lyric.hisHer] body visibly relaxes. With a steady hand, [lyric.heShe] reaches up and gently grips onto your wrist, guiding your hand to [lyric.hisHer] cheek so [lyric.heShe] can nuzzle against it. A deep, throaty churring reverberates from [lyric.hisHer] throat as [lyric.hisHer] eyes drift closed, but only for a few seconds. "None of this would have been real if it weren't for you, [pc.name]," [lyric.heShe] says, [lyric.hisHer] eyes narrowing as they lock onto yours. "The day you and I met was the best day of my life. And I say that knowing that I nearly froze to death." [lyric.HeShe] pauses, holding your hand against [lyric.hisHer] cheek, simply... enjoying the moment with you. Despite Lyric being half-dragon, [lyric.hisHer] eyes are of the same kobold: they're the same golden windows into [lyric.hisHer] soul, laying bare to you everything that [lyric.heShe] is that [lyric.hisHer] words couldn't express. Lyric could have transformed into a 'proper', building-sized dragon, and deep down, you would have known that [lyric.heShe] was the same kobold that you thawed from the ice all that time ago. "I said that I loved you when we first met. Like, when we first first met,' [lyric.heShe] says softly. "Maybe I was a little quick with it, but... I don't regret saying it. You saved my life, after all. And now, I'm... more than I ever was, because of you. After orcs stole my family, and the Undermountain kobolds cast me out, it was you that picked me up and built me up stronger than ever." [lyric.HeShe] nuzzles your palm again; you shift your thumb to stroke along [lyric.hisHer] upper cheekbone. "I love you, [pc.name]. You don't have to say it back. I just want you to know that I do." [pc.isDK |Good, because you're not going to. But... you don't object when Lyric pulls you in for a second hug. |Before you even have the opportunity to respond one way or the other, Lyric pulls you in for a second hug. Bigger, tighter, and longer. Maybe reciprocating the hug would be answer enough. ]
rows.translation: 你和Lyric向Jyrranaz道别，然后离开了那个蜂巢。正如你所猜测的，Lyric走路时显得非常吃力，一步都迈得不太稳。 [lyric.hisHer] 步伐显得既笨拙又漫长，因为必须适应突然的高度差异以及额外的重量所带来的影响。 [lyric.hisHer] 尾巴[lyric.mf | |更不用说她胸前那些多余的赘肉了…… ]在整个离开蜂巢的旅程中，这首旋律始终伴随着你。 [lyric.hisHer] 双手紧紧地握住你…… [lyric.heShe] 蹒跚而行 [lyric.hisHer] 然而，自始至终， [lyric.heShe]她笑得前仰后合，咯咯直笑…… [lyric.hisHer] 虽然曾经遭受过重创，但这些才是重新开始的第一步。 [lyric.heShe]这已经持续了好几年。 [pc.heightRange 0 96 |尽管你的体型要小得多…… [lyric.himHer] 现在，尽管如此…… [lyric.himHer] 在整个过程中，我都一直依赖你的支持。 [lyric.heShe]它的重量出奇地轻——虽然远称不上真正轻，但确实比你想象中的要轻。 |即使过了那么久…… [lyric.hisHer] [silly |闪耀起来 |快速增长期 ]你还是比他高。 [lyric.himHer]但差距并不大。即便如此， [lyric.heShe] 它的重量比你预想的要轻，即便如此…… [lyric.heShe] 依靠你寻求支持 ]当你身处户外时…… [dayNight |日光 |夜幕降临 ] 在蜂巢的入口处，Lyric终于鼓起了勇气，开始与你拉开距离。站直身体对于它来说并不困难；但其他的一切却都充满了挑战。 “好吧， [lyric.heShe] 说着，她快速地吸了几口气，然后又呼了出来。 [lyric.hisHer] 鼻子。 [lyric.HeShe] 展示实力 [lyric.hisHer] 手指， [lyric.heShe] 卷发 [lyric.hisHer] 脚趾，还有…… [lyric.heShe] 向前迈出一步—— 却立刻失去了平衡。但仿佛这是他的本能反应一般， [lyric.hisHer] 尾巴在身后甩动并不断弯曲。
