rows.original:
After you arrive, things are thankfully very peaceful; Gwyn takes you into one of the rooms and gets you all comfortable, helping you relax and rest while the earliest hours of the pregnancy starts. As a midwife, she works diligently to keep you fed and hydrated. The lupine woman works her magic the entire time you're in labor, too, but even she can't negate the fatigue that sets in after you pop out your new baby: a healthy hornet drone. Gwyn brought and provided honey, milk, and anything else the child wanted to help lighten the burden but his explosive growth kept it from truly getting too quiet.
            
            "Sleep well?" Gwyn grins and pats your leg through your blanket. "You can keep resting here. When he came out of you he was small... but he grew sooooo big already! It's a surprise he stuck around!."
            
            The little boy is bigger than hornets should be when hatching but he's still almost immediately up and about by the time you come to, crawling and buzzing his wings while exploring the room. The little fella finally makes his way over to the bed, peeking over the side at you with a smile. Tired as you are, you can't help reach out and rustle the little guy's head of [rand
                |blonde
                |black
            ] hair. Both of his antennae bob when he smiles, reaching up to grab your fingers. If Gwyn says so, then you might as well shut and rest your eyes for a bit...
rows.translation:
当你到达后，幸运的是，一切都非常平静。格温带你进入其中一个房间，为你安排好一切，让你能够放松休息，因为怀孕的最初阶段刚刚开始。作为一名助产士，她认真负责地确保你得到充足的食物和水分补给。 在你们整个分娩的过程中，那位身着狼人服装的女人也一直在使用她的魔法，但即便如此，也无法消除你们生下那个健康的小宝宝后所感受到的疲惫——那个小宝宝简直像一只活力四射的黄蜂一样。格温带来了蜂蜜、牛奶，以及孩子可能需要的任何东西，试图帮助减轻你们的负担，但孩子那惊人的生长速度使得家里的气氛始终无法真正变得安静下来。
            
            睡得好吗？”格温微笑着，隔着毯子轻拍你的腿。“你可以继续在这里休息。当他从你体内出来的时候还很小……但现在已经长得这么大啦！他能留在这里真是太不可思议了！”

这个小男孩的体型比黄蜂孵化出来时应该有的要大，但当你醒来的时候，他几乎已经能立刻活动了——他在房间里爬来爬去，还扑腾着翅膀探索周围的环境。 那个小家伙终于走到了床边，笑着从床边探出头来看着你。尽管你已经很累了，还是忍不住伸手轻轻揉了揉他的小脑袋。 [rand
                |金发女郎
                |黑色
            ] 头发。每当他微笑时，他的两根触角都会微微摆动，还会伸过来抓住你的手指。如果格温这么说的话，那你还不如闭上眼睛休息一会儿吧……
rows.raw:
"
            After you arrive, things are thankfully very peaceful; Gwyn takes you into one of the rooms and gets you all comfortable, helping you relax and rest while the earliest hours of the pregnancy starts. As a midwife, she works diligently to keep you fed and hydrated. The lupine woman works her magic the entire time you're in labor, too, but even she can't negate the fatigue that sets in after you pop out your new baby: a healthy hornet drone. Gwyn brought and provided honey, milk, and anything else the child wanted to help lighten the burden but his explosive growth kept it from truly getting too quiet.
            
            "Sleep well?" Gwyn grins and pats your leg through your blanket. "You can keep resting here. When he came out of you he was small... but he grew sooooo big already! It's a surprise he stuck around!."
            
            The little boy is bigger than hornets should be when hatching but he's still almost immediately up and about by the time you come to, crawling and buzzing his wings while exploring the room. The little fella finally makes his way over to the bed, peeking over the side at you with a smile. Tired as you are, you can't help reach out and rustle the little guy's head of [rand
                |blonde
                |black
            ] hair. Both of his antennae bob when he smiles, reaching up to grab your fingers. If Gwyn says so, then you might as well shut and rest your eyes for a bit...
            "

rows.original:
An entire day of relaxing and resting later, you finally wrestle yourself out of bed and gather your things. Gwyn and your new little one are waiting outside, albeit the lupine is the only one awake between the two. As big as a toddler, the drone is dozing on her lap while she strokes his head. Since she's not able to get up, the two of you pass a wave to one another before you head outside. By the time you come back, you're sure he'll have left.
                
                Time to get back to the adventurer's grind.
rows.translation:
经过一整天的放松休息，你终于勉强从床上爬起来，收拾好自己的东西。格温和你的小宝宝正在外面等着你，不过在这两个人当中，只有那只小狼狗是醒着的。那只小狼狗已经有幼儿那么大了，现在正趴在格温的腿上打瞌睡，而格温则轻轻抚摸着它的头。 既然她无法起床，你们俩在出门之前互相招手示意一下吧。等你们回来时，他肯定已经离开了。

是时候继续开始冒险者的日常任务了。
rows.raw:
"
                An entire day of relaxing and resting later, you finally wrestle yourself out of bed and gather your things. Gwyn and your new little one are waiting outside, albeit the lupine is the only one awake between the two. As big as a toddler, the drone is dozing on her lap while she strokes his head. Since she's not able to get up, the two of you pass a wave to one another before you head outside. By the time you come back, you're sure he'll have left.
                
                Time to get back to the adventurer's grind.
                "

rows.original:
The foot of the great hive complex gives way to an open lip, extended out over the river valley canyon from a pair of vaulted archways, allowing entrance to the hornets' domain. There are no doors per se — you doubt the militant hornets were too concerned with uninvited guests considering the remote nature of their home. 

    [flags.HIVE_GOLEM
        |A small group of hornet warriors are milling around nearby. You can probably get a ride back to the forest floor from them when you're ready.
        |Now that you're here, you realize that there's no easy way back across...
    ]
rows.translation:
这个巨大的蜂巢群的入口处是一处开口，由一对拱形结构延伸出来，横跨河谷峡谷，从而通往这些黄蜂的领地。这里并没有真正的门——考虑到它们居住在如此偏远的地方，想必这些好战的黄蜂根本不会在意不速之客的闯入。 

    [flags.HIVE_GOLEM
        |有一小群黄蜂战士在附近游荡。等你准备好的时候，他们应该可以帮你回到森林地面。
        |现在你来到了这里，才会意识到，再也没有什么简单的办法可以让你回到去了……
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    The foot of the great hive complex gives way to an open lip, extended out over the river valley canyon from a pair of vaulted archways, allowing entrance to the hornets' domain. There are no doors per se — you doubt the militant hornets were too concerned with uninvited guests considering the remote nature of their home. 

    [flags.HIVE_GOLEM
        |A small group of hornet warriors are milling around nearby. You can probably get a ride back to the forest floor from them when you're ready.
        |Now that you're here, you realize that there's no easy way back across...
    ]"

rows.original:
You turn your attention to a handful of busty workers milling around the exit to the hive, who quickly scramble to attention and [flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|give you cheery salutes. "Ready to go back across the ravine, [pc.name]? Mother says we're to provide transport, if you need it!"|wiggle their hips, unleashing a minor pheromone cloud as they size you up. "Heyyy, cutie! Mom says if you wanna go back across the ravine, we gotta take ya!"]

        [pc.hasWings
            |[party.solo
                |You wave them off and stretch your own wings. You'll be fine. The hornets giggle and step back, giving you plenty of room to get a running leap before you spread your wings and fly. It's a short trip across the deep but narrow ravine, and you land with aplomb on the other side.
                |[party.Yall] will need some help getting across, even if you yourself have wings. You leave the hard work to the hornets and take wing yourself, launching off across the ravine and landing on the other side a moment later. An easy flight for you, though it takes a moment for your friends[party.som|||s] to arrive in the arms of [party.has brint|several struggling workers|a particularly strong worker]. You wave the honeypot goodbye once she's done and turn towards the forest ahead...
            ]
            |[party.Yall] will need a little help getting across, yeah. [party.som|The biggest and strongest (and bustiest) hornet worker in the group strides forward and flexes for you, hard enough to make her bare chest bead with nectar. "I can take ya!" she offers, circling around you. "Just hold onto something!"|A couple of hornets march over and circle around you, hands brushing your hips. "Just hold on to something..." one of them giggles.|The group hops to it, telling you to hold onto something as they get their arms around your waist and start buzzing their wings.] A moment later and you're airborne, whisked across the narrow but deep ravine. You land heavy on the other side, dropped a foot up by your eager hornet valet before [party.hasCompanions|they turn|she turns] back to the hive.
        
            "Byeeeee!"
        ]
rows.translation:
你的注意力被一群身材丰满的女工们吸引住了，她们正在蜂巢的出口处忙碌着。那些女工们立刻停下了手中的动作，纷纷注意到了你的存在。 [flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|向你们致以诚挚的问候。“准备再次穿越那条峡谷了…… [pc.name]妈妈说，如果你们需要的话，我们可以提供交通工具！|她们扭动臀部，同时释放出一丝微量的信息素，仔细打量着你。“嘿，可爱的小家伙！妈妈说如果你想再穿过那条沟壑的话，我们就得带你一起去哦！]

        [pc.hasWings
            |[party.solo
                |你挥手让它们离开，然后张开自己的翅膀。你会没事的。那些黄蜂咯咯地笑着退了回去，为你留下了足够的空间，让你可以迅速跃起，然后展翅飞翔。穿过那条又深又窄的峡谷只需要很短的时间，你便稳稳地落在了对岸。
                |[party.Yall] 即使你自己长了翅膀，也需要一些帮助才能顺利飞过去。你把繁重的任务交给了大黄蜂，自己则振翅飞起，穿过峡谷，片刻之后就降落在了对岸。对你来说，这是一次轻松的飞行——不过你的朋友们却需要花费一些时间才能完成同样的距离。[party.som|||s] 投入某人的怀抱 [party.has brint|几名处境艰难的工人|一个特别勤奋的工作者]等她完成后，你挥手告别了那个蜜罐，然后朝着前方的森林走去……
            ]
            |[party.Yall] 确实需要一些帮助才能让别人理解，没错。 [party.som|群体中最大、最强壮（也是胸部最丰满的）那只黄蜂工蜂迈步向前，用力展示自己的肌肉，以至于她裸露的胸部上都渗出了花蜜。“我能对付你！”它一边说，一边绕着你飞圈。“只要抓紧什么东西就行了！|几只大黄蜂飞过来，在你周围盘旋，它们的触角轻轻触碰着你的臀部。“最好抓紧什么东西……”其中一只大黄蜂咯咯地笑了起来。|这群小生物立刻围了上来，它们让你抓紧某个东西，然后用自己的手臂环住你的腰，同时开始振动翅膀。] 片刻之后，你便腾空而起，掠过了那条狭窄而深邃的峡谷。你在对岸重重落地，正好落在了那只热切等待你的“大黄蜂侍从”不远处…… [party.hasCompanions|他们转身离开。|她转身了。] 再见啦！
        ]
rows.raw:
'
        You turn your attention to a handful of busty workers milling around the exit to the hive, who quickly scramble to attention and [flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|give you cheery salutes. "Ready to go back across the ravine, [pc.name]? Mother says we're to provide transport, if you need it!"|wiggle their hips, unleashing a minor pheromone cloud as they size you up. "Heyyy, cutie! Mom says if you wanna go back across the ravine, we gotta take ya!"]

        [pc.hasWings
            |[party.solo
                |You wave them off and stretch your own wings. You'll be fine. The hornets giggle and step back, giving you plenty of room to get a running leap before you spread your wings and fly. It's a short trip across the deep but narrow ravine, and you land with aplomb on the other side.
                |[party.Yall] will need some help getting across, even if you yourself have wings. You leave the hard work to the hornets and take wing yourself, launching off across the ravine and landing on the other side a moment later. An easy flight for you, though it takes a moment for your friends[party.som|||s] to arrive in the arms of [party.has brint|several struggling workers|a particularly strong worker]. You wave the honeypot goodbye once she's done and turn towards the forest ahead...
            ]
            |[party.Yall] will need a little help getting across, yeah. [party.som|The biggest and strongest (and bustiest) hornet worker in the group strides forward and flexes for you, hard enough to make her bare chest bead with nectar. "I can take ya!" she offers, circling around you. "Just hold onto something!"|A couple of hornets march over and circle around you, hands brushing your hips. "Just hold on to something..." one of them giggles.|The group hops to it, telling you to hold onto something as they get their arms around your waist and start buzzing their wings.] A moment later and you're airborne, whisked across the narrow but deep ravine. You land heavy on the other side, dropped a foot up by your eager hornet valet before [party.hasCompanions|they turn|she turns] back to the hive.
        
            "Byeeeee!"
        ]'

rows.translation: 回到古老的森林中去吧。

rows.original: Now that you're here, you realize that there's no easy way back across...
rows.translation: 现在你来到了这里，才会意识到，再也没有什么简单的办法可以让你回到去了……
rows.raw: "Now that you're here, you realize that there's no easy way back across..."

rows.original:
You stand on a narrow platform seperating the inner chambers from the outer wall, some ten feet away. The outer walls of the hornet hive are honeycombed with countless deep hex chambers, well out of reach from where you're standing. They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You could go south from here, back into the hive interior. You could also climb upwards, higher into the hive.
rows.translation:
你站在一个狭窄的平台上，这个平台将内室与外壁分隔开来，距离外壁大约有十英尺远。黄蜂巢的外壁布满了无数深邃的六边形腔室，但从你现在的位置来看，那些腔室根本够不着。那些腔室里似乎充满了黄蜂幼虫，那些小小的生命体正在等待着姐姐们的照料与关怀。而蜂蜜……它们永远都渴望蜂蜜。

你可以从这里向南走，重新回到巢穴的内部；你也可以向上攀爬，继续向巢穴的更高处前进。
rows.raw:
"
    You stand on a narrow platform seperating the inner chambers from the outer wall, some ten feet away. The outer walls of the hornet hive are honeycombed with countless deep hex chambers, well out of reach from where you're standing. They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You could go south from here, back into the hive interior. You could also climb upwards, higher into the hive."

rows.original: Which level would you like to go to?
rows.raw: "\n        Which level would you like to go to?"

rows.original:
The smell of honey and sex permeates the room wall-to-wall; jars and amphora filled with honey line the walls, each the byproduct of the hive's[flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|| corrupted] bounty. A cliff-like balcony cuts out into a massive open chamber, giving a great view to a massive pool of the viscous delicacy. Stairs on the sides of the balcony lead down to the honey pool.
    
    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED
        |[var0
            |The prince is nearby ordering drones and honey-filled hornet girls alike around. Every once in a while, he shoots you a blushy look; it seems he's still embarrassed after [flags.NYZE_FUCKED|you made him cum|his defeat].
            |That rough sex left your little Drone Princeling all tuckered out. You'll need to give Nyze a day to unwind and catch his breath.
        ]
        |The defeated prince is nearby, crowded by hornet girls all hungrily fucking him. You're not going to get another shot at him until things calm down.
    ]
rows.translation:
房间里弥漫着蜂蜜与性爱的气息；墙壁上排列着一排排装满蜂蜜的罐子和双耳瓶，而这些蜂蜜都是蜂巢的产物。[flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|| 已损坏] 一处悬崖般的阳台延伸进一个巨大的开放空间，人们可以在这里欣赏到那一大片黏稠美味的液体。阳台两侧的楼梯通向那片“蜂蜜池”。
    
    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED
        |[var0
            |王子就在附近，指挥着无人机和那些身上涂满蜂蜜的黄蜂少女们四处行动。偶尔，他会向你投来一丝羞涩的目光——看来他到现在仍然觉得有些尴尬。 [flags.NYZE_FUCKED|你让他达到了高潮。|他的失败].
            |那种激烈的性行为让你的小“无人机王子”累坏了。你需要给Nyeze一天时间来放松身心，恢复精力。
        ]
        |那个被击败的王子就在附近，被一群蜂女围住，她们都在疯狂地与他交配。在局势平静下来之前，你不会再有机会攻击他了。
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    The smell of honey and sex permeates the room wall-to-wall; jars and amphora filled with honey line the walls, each the byproduct of the hive's[flags.HIVE_PURIFIED|| corrupted] bounty. A cliff-like balcony cuts out into a massive open chamber, giving a great view to a massive pool of the viscous delicacy. Stairs on the sides of the balcony lead down to the honey pool.
    
    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED
        |[var0
            |The prince is nearby ordering drones and honey-filled hornet girls alike around. Every once in a while, he shoots you a blushy look; it seems he's still embarrassed after [flags.NYZE_FUCKED|you made him cum|his defeat].
            |That rough sex left your little Drone Princeling all tuckered out. You'll need to give Nyze a day to unwind and catch his breath.
        ]
        |The defeated prince is nearby, crowded by hornet girls all hungrily fucking him. You're not going to get another shot at him until things calm down.
    ]"

rows.original: [flags.HIVE_CLEARED|Since the hive is at ease, maybe he's a bit more open to discussion.|It won't hurt to talk to Nyze for a while, now that he's calmed down a bit.]
rows.translation: [flags.HIVE_CLEARED|既然蜂群处于平静状态，或许他会更愿意进行讨论。|现在尼泽已经冷静了一些，和他聊一会儿也没什么坏处。]
rows.raw: "[flags.HIVE_CLEARED|Since the hive is at ease, maybe he's a bit more open to discussion.|It won't hurt to talk to Nyze for a while, now that he's calmed down a bit.]"

rows.original:
Leading down from the lurid milking room east of here is a huge hex chamber, completely dominated by a vast pool filled to the brim with fragrant, sweet honey. Rivers of the stuff run down in channels from the milking room, flowing like molasses into the waiting pool. A narrow lip of waxy floor runs around the edge of the chamber, letting worker-hornets harvest their hive's bounty by the bucket-load. 

    [flags.HIVE_WHIP||The hornet prince's whip is floating on top of the honey pool, now that the goo has been taken care of. Easy pickings, if you want it.]
    
    [flags.HIVE_CORRUPT|Liaden is sitting by the poolside, giggling as a gaggle of the ditzy hornet workers gather around her and work her nipples, milking streams of sweet honey into the pool — just as if she was part of the hive!]
rows.translation:
从这里东边那间色彩鲜艳的采蜜室往下，是一条巨大的六边形通道。通道的尽头是一个巨大的水池，里面盛满了芳香甜美的蜂蜜。蜂蜜从采蜜室中通过各种渠道流淌下来，就像糖蜜一样汇入这个水池中。水池边缘有一圈狭窄的蜡质地面，工蜂们可以借助这些地面将蜂蜜一桶桶地收集起来。 

    [flags.HIVE_WHIP||现在那些黏稠的物质已经被清理掉了，黄蜂王子的鞭子正漂浮在蜂蜜池的表面。如果你想要的话，这简直就是手到擒来。]
    
    [flags.HIVE_CORRUPT|莉亚登坐在泳池边，咯咯笑着，一群傻乎乎的“黄蜂工人”围在她身边，轻轻触碰她的乳头，将甜美的蜂蜜挤进泳池里——仿佛她真的是这个蜂群的一员一样！]
rows.raw:
"
    Leading down from the lurid milking room east of here is a huge hex chamber, completely dominated by a vast pool filled to the brim with fragrant, sweet honey. Rivers of the stuff run down in channels from the milking room, flowing like molasses into the waiting pool. A narrow lip of waxy floor runs around the edge of the chamber, letting worker-hornets harvest their hive's bounty by the bucket-load. 

    [flags.HIVE_WHIP||The hornet prince's whip is floating on top of the honey pool, now that the goo has been taken care of. Easy pickings, if you want it.]
    
    [flags.HIVE_CORRUPT|Liaden is sitting by the poolside, giggling as a gaggle of the ditzy hornet workers gather around her and work her nipples, milking streams of sweet honey into the pool — just as if she was part of the hive!]"

rows.original: Help yourself to the prince's whip. He clearly doesn't need it anymore.
rows.translation: 尽管拿走王子的鞭子吧，他显然已经不再需要它了。
rows.raw: "Help yourself to the prince's whip. He clearly doesn't need it anymore."

They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You could go south from here, back into the hive interior. You could also climb upwards, higher into the hive, or back down towards the entrance.

你站在一个狭窄的平台上，这个平台将内部空间与外墙分隔开来，距离外墙大约有十英尺远。黄蜂巢的外墙上布满了无数深邃的六边形洞室，但从你现在的位置来看，那些洞室根本够不着。 它们似乎充满了那些像黄蜂幼虫一样的小生命，这些小小的生命体正在等待着姐姐们给予它们关爱与呵护。而蜂蜜……它们永远都渴望得到蜂蜜。

The outer walls of the hornet hive are honeycombed with countless deep hex chambers, well out of reach from where you're standing. They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You could go south from here, back into the hive interior. You could also climb upwards, higher into the hive, or back down towards the entrance."

rows.original: Which level would you like to go to?
rows.raw: "\n        Which level would you like to go to?"

rows.original: [flags.HIVE_CLEARED |You stand in Jyrranaz's isolated lair, removed from the rest of the handmaidens' chambers and surrounded by glasswork and scrolls amassed in every corner, even sticking out of the walls. The sorceress herself is busily working, but smiles faintly as you draw near. |You survey to the study where you found and fought Jyrranaz, the vesparan venom-chemist. [var0 |Weirdly, she isn’t anywhere to be found – everything is where you left it, from the haphazard pieces of parchment scattered around the place, to the books on her shelves, to her chemistry set on the table in the corner, but Jyrranaz herself is missing. Likely to tend to her wounds; you doubt she’d leave her life’s work unattended for long. |And she’s exactly where you left her: comatose on the floor, leaking venom from just about every orifice it can leak from. She’s snoring, so you know she’s alive.[flags.JYRR_FUCKED| Frankly, it’s almost flattering to know that you could fuck someone into a coma like that.] ] There isn’t anything left for you here right now. Maybe you could come back later, once the queen is dealt with? ]
rows.translation: [flags.HIVE_CLEARED |你站在吉兰纳兹那与世隔绝的隐居之地，这里远离其他女仆们的居所，四周摆满了玻璃制品和卷轴，这些物品甚至延伸到了墙壁之外。这位女巫正忙于工作，但当你靠近时，她露出了淡淡的微笑。 |你在那次调查中发现了并击败了那位研究维斯帕兰毒液的化学家——杰拉纳兹。 [var0 |奇怪的是，她却不见了——所有东西都还在你离开时的样子：那些散落在各处的羊皮纸碎片，她书架上的书籍，还有角落桌子上的化学实验装置，但Jyrranaz本人却不见了。很可能她去处理自己的伤势了；你不会认为她会把自己的毕生心血置之不理太久吧。 |她依然处于你离开时的状态：昏迷不醒地躺在地上，身体的每一个孔窍都在渗出毒液。她还在打鼾，这说明她还活着。[flags.JYRR_FUCKED| 说实话，能想到自己居然能让别人因此陷入昏迷，这种感觉还挺让人受用的。] ] 现在这里已经没有什么事情可以让你做的了。 也许等处理完女王的事情之后，你再回来吧？ ]
rows.raw: " [flags.HIVE_CLEARED |You stand in Jyrranaz's isolated lair, removed from the rest of the handmaidens' chambers and surrounded by glasswork and scrolls amassed in every corner, even sticking out of the walls. The sorceress herself is busily working, but smiles faintly as you draw near. |You survey to the study where you found and fought Jyrranaz, the vesparan venom-chemist. [var0 |Weirdly, she isn’t anywhere to be found – everything is where you left it, from the haphazard pieces of parchment scattered around the place, to the books on her shelves, to her chemistry set on the table in the corner, but Jyrranaz herself is missing. Likely to tend to her wounds; you doubt she’d leave her life’s work unattended for long. |And she’s exactly where you left her: comatose on the floor, leaking venom from just about every orifice it can leak from. She’s snoring, so you know she’s alive.[flags.JYRR_FUCKED| Frankly, it’s almost flattering to know that you could fuck someone into a coma like that.] ] There isn’t anything left for you here right now. Maybe you could come back later, once the queen is dealt with? ]"

rows.original:
You gave Jyrranaz the Dragonsblood crystal, and she and Lyric have locked themselves away in her laboratory to perform some tests, and she told you to come back later.

They still need about
rows.translation:
你把龙血水晶交给了Jyrranaz，之后她和Lyric就把自己关在她的实验室里进行一些实验了，她们让你晚点再来。

他们还需要大约……
rows.raw: "You gave Jyrranaz the Dragonsblood crystal, and she and Lyric have locked themselves away in her laboratory to perform some tests, and she told you to come back later.\n\nThey still need about "

rows.original: hours before they'll have some update on their progress for you.
rows.translation: 几小时后，他们会向大家公布他们进展的最新情况。
rows.raw: " hours before they'll have some update on their progress for you."

rows.original: Which level would you like to go to?
rows.raw: "\n        Which level would you like to go to?"

rows.original: You stand in an interior section of the hive, a hexagonal room seeming to serve little purpose besides connecting other chambers. The walls are catacombed with smaller hexes, some filled with honey or baubles, others empty. Several have been waxed over, keeping their contents safe and hidden. Open archways connect to chambers south, north, and west. The western passage is adorned with a pair of crossed spears, and unlike most of the vaulted arches you've passed, this one actually has a door set in it.
rows.translation: 你站在蜂巢的内部区域，这是一个六边形的房间，除了连接其他房间外，似乎并没有其他用途。墙壁上布满了较小的六边形结构，有些里面装满了蜂蜜或小装饰品，而有些则空空如也。其中有几个地方被涂上了蜡，这样就可以将里面的物品妥善保存起来，避免被发现。敞开的拱门通向南边、北边和西边的房间。西边的通道上装饰着一对交叉的长矛，与你之前经过的许多拱门不同，这个拱门确实是…… 门 全力以赴吧。
rows.raw: "\n You stand in an interior section of the hive, a hexagonal room seeming to serve little purpose besides connecting other chambers. The walls are catacombed with smaller hexes, some filled with honey or baubles, others empty. Several have been waxed over, keeping their contents safe and hidden. Open archways connect to chambers south, north, and west. The western passage is adorned with a pair of crossed spears, and unlike most of the vaulted arches you've passed, this one actually has a door set in it."

rows.original: [pc.cl thief|Hah, a simple lock can't stop a thief like you!|Go ahead and open the sealed chamber.]
rows.translation: [pc.cl thief|哈，这么简单的锁根本挡不住你这样的小偷！|去吧，打开那个密封的房间吧。]
rows.raw: "[pc.cl thief|Hah, a simple lock can't stop a thief like you!|Go ahead and open the sealed chamber.]"

rows.original: The western door is secured with a bronze padlock. You'll need to find the key.
rows.translation: 西侧的门用一把青铜挂锁锁住了。你需要找到那把钥匙。
rows.raw: "The western door is secured with a bronze padlock. You'll need to find the key."

rows.original:
These must be the handmaidens' quarters, lavishly adorned with silk bedding and amphoras of honey-mead. [flags.HIVE_SAVED
        |Said handmaidens seem to have shrugged off the worst of their bimbofication alongside their mother, and though they play a little grab-ass with each other, they're mostly busy preparing for guard duty or patrols. They salute you, and smile warmly, when you approach.
        |Several blissed-out former amazons are sprawled out on the beds, idly masturbating or sucking on each others' tits. They barely pay you any mind.
    ]
rows.translation:
这些地方肯定是女仆们的住处，里面摆满了华贵的丝绸被褥，还有装满蜂蜜酒的双耳瓶。 [flags.HIVE_SAVED
        |那些女仆们似乎已经摆脱了与她们的母亲一起时所表现出的那些愚蠢行为。虽然她们之间会互相闹着玩，但大多数时间都在准备执行守卫任务或进行巡逻。当你靠近时，她们会向你敬礼，并露出温暖的笑容。
        |几个处于极度兴奋状态的前亚马逊员工躺在床上，无所事事地自慰，或者互相吮吸对方的乳房。她们几乎根本不会注意你。
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    These must be the handmaidens' quarters, lavishly adorned with silk bedding and amphoras of honey-mead. [flags.HIVE_SAVED
        |Said handmaidens seem to have shrugged off the worst of their bimbofication alongside their mother, and though they play a little grab-ass with each other, they're mostly busy preparing for guard duty or patrols. They salute you, and smile warmly, when you approach.
        |Several blissed-out former amazons are sprawled out on the beds, idly masturbating or sucking on each others' tits. They barely pay you any mind.
    ]"

rows.original:
The armory is full of wooden racks loaded down with long bronze war-spears and bronze-faced circular shields, not unlike Azyrran's own kit. Some stands near the far wall have breastplates, greaves, and leather skirts displayed on wax mannequins, too.
    
    [flags.HIVE_SHIELD
        |There's an empty shrine here, dedicated to the Rosebloom Shield.
        |Your eyes are inevitably drawn to a single display stand on the far side of the armory, where a shield has been propped up surrounded by candles and wild roses picked from the nearby forest. It's almost like a shrine of sorts...

        [party.has azyrran|"The Rosebloom Shield," Azyrran explains, gesturing towards it. "Our hive's founder, Queen Lyzzerahn, carried it when she came north. It's said that no one could stand against her for long, for her presence was so overbearing that her enemies would drop their weapons and fall to their knees and worship her like a goddess of battle. [flags.HIVE_SAVED|Mother does not fight with a shield, and you have helped our tribe so... I think that you would be a worthy wielder, if you desire it.|In mother's current state... I don't think she would object if you took our ancestral shield up to help in our quest to bring her to her senses.]]
        
        The shield gives off a powerful, flowery fragrance even from across the room. You could take it, if you wished.
    ]
rows.translation:
军械库里摆满了木架，上面堆满了长长的青铜战矛和青铜面圆形盾牌，这些装备与阿齐兰自己使用的装备颇为相似。靠近远墙的某些架子上，还用蜡制人偶展示了胸甲、护腿和皮制裙装。
    
    [flags.HIVE_SHIELD
        |这里有一座空荡荡的神龛，它是专门用来供奉“玫瑰绽放之盾”的。
        |你的目光不由自主地被军械库远端的一个展示架吸引住了——那里有一面盾牌被架了起来，周围摆满了蜡烛以及从附近森林里采摘的野玫瑰。它看起来简直就像是一座小小的圣坛……

        [party.has azyrran|罗丝布卢姆之盾，”阿兹兰一边解释一边指向那面盾牌，“我们蜂群的创始人——莉泽兰女王在北上时带着它。据说，没有人能够长时间与她对抗，因为她的存在太过强大，以至于她的敌人都会放下武器，跪倒在地，像崇拜战斗女神一样崇拜她。 [flags.HIVE_SAVED|母亲从不使用盾牌进行战斗，而你也为我们的部落做出了很多贡献……因此，我认为如果你愿意的话，你一定会是一位出色的盾牌使用者。|以母亲目前的状况来看……我觉得如果你使用我们的祖传盾牌来帮助我们让她恢复清醒，她应该不会反对的。]]
        
        即使隔着整个房间，这个盾牌依然散发着浓郁而芬芳的气息。如果你愿意的话，完全可以拿走它。
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    The armory is full of wooden racks loaded down with long bronze war-spears and bronze-faced circular shields, not unlike Azyrran's own kit. Some stands near the far wall have breastplates, greaves, and leather skirts displayed on wax mannequins, too.
    
    [flags.HIVE_SHIELD
        |There's an empty shrine here, dedicated to the Rosebloom Shield.
        |Your eyes are inevitably drawn to a single display stand on the far side of the armory, where a shield has been propped up surrounded by candles and wild roses picked from the nearby forest. It's almost like a shrine of sorts...

        [party.has azyrran|"The Rosebloom Shield," Azyrran explains, gesturing towards it. "Our hive's founder, Queen Lyzzerahn, carried it when she came north. It's said that no one could stand against her for long, for her presence was so overbearing that her enemies would drop their weapons and fall to their knees and worship her like a goddess of battle. [flags.HIVE_SAVED|Mother does not fight with a shield, and you have helped our tribe so... I think that you would be a worthy wielder, if you desire it.|In mother's current state... I don't think she would object if you took our ancestral shield up to help in our quest to bring her to her senses.]]
        
        The shield gives off a powerful, flowery fragrance even from across the room. You could take it, if you wished.
    ]"

rows.translation: 拿上那面装饰着花纹的青铜盾牌吧。

rows.original:
You stand on a narrow platform separating the inner chambers from the outer wall, some ten feet away. The outer walls of the hornet hive are honeycombed with countless deep hex chambers, well out of reach from where you're standing. They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You have reached the highest peak of the hive, and the ceiling narrows above you towards a singular opening point, allowing the [dayNight|sun|moon]light to stream inside. You can climb back down towards the entrance, or head south towards the interior of the hive — towards the queen's chambers.
rows.translation:
你站在一个狭窄的平台上，这个平台将内部腔室与外壁分隔开来，距离外壁大约有十英尺远。黄蜂巢的外壁布满了无数深邃的六边形腔室，但从你现在的位置来看，这些腔室根本够不着。那些腔室里似乎充满了黄蜂幼虫，那些小小的生命体正在等待着它们姐姐们的照料与关怀。而蜂蜜……它们永远都渴望得到蜂蜜。

你已经来到了这个黄蜂巢的最高处，头顶的天花板逐渐变窄，最终汇聚成一个小小的开口…… [dayNight|太阳|月亮]光线从内部照射进来。你可以爬回入口处，或者向南方向前进，进入蜂巢的内部——前往蜂后的巢室。
rows.raw:
"
    You stand on a narrow platform separating the inner chambers from the outer wall, some ten feet away. The outer walls of the hornet hive are honeycombed with countless deep hex chambers, well out of reach from where you're standing. They seem to be full of larval hornet-folk, tiny bundles of life waiting for the motherly touch of their elder sisters. And honey... always craving honey.

    You have reached the highest peak of the hive, and the ceiling narrows above you towards a singular opening point, allowing the [dayNight|sun|moon]light to stream inside. You can climb back down towards the entrance, or head south towards the interior of the hive — towards the queen's chambers."

rows.original: Which level would you like to go to?
rows.raw: "\n        Which level would you like to go to?"

rows.original: You stand in an interior section of the hive, a hexagonal room seeming to serve little purpose besides connecting other chambers. The walls are catacombed with smaller hexes, some filled with honey or baubles, others empty. Several have been waxed over, keeping their contents safe and hidden. Open archways connect to chambers north and south.
rows.translation: 你站在蜂巢的内部区域，这是一个六边形的房间，除了连接其他房间外，似乎并没有其他用途。墙壁上布满了较小的六边形结构，有些里面装满了蜂蜜或小装饰品，而有些则是空的。其中有几个地方被涂上了蜡，这样就可以将里面的物品妥善保存起来，避免被发现。敞开的拱门将这个房间与南北两侧的其他房间连接了起来。
rows.raw: "\n    You stand in an interior section of the hive, a hexagonal room seeming to serve little purpose besides connecting other chambers. The walls are catacombed with smaller hexes, some filled with honey or baubles, others empty. Several have been waxed over, keeping their contents safe and hidden. Open archways connect to chambers north and south."

rows.original:
You stand outside a massive pair of [flags.HIVE_QDOOR||sealed, ]honey-gold doors to the south, separating the room you're in — a lavish antechamber adorned with silks and pillows and long divans — from the chambers of the queen. Waxy pillars support the room along all six walls, displaying banners and silky drapery that help assure you that you'll soon stand in the presence of true royalty. 

    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED||[
        flags.HIVE_QDOOR
        |Azyrran stands next to the door, anxiously waiting for your go-ahead. "I'm ready when you are, [pc.name]..."
        |Azyrran rocks on her heels beside the door, glancing between it and you. "We need two keys to open the queen's chambers without her consent: the Honey Key and the Venom Key. If you don't have them, we'd need a ram and several hours to batter down these doors..."
    
        [party.has brint|Brint chuckles. "Wanna bet?"
        
        Easy, big guy.]
    ]]
rows.translation:
你站在一对巨大的……之外。 [flags.HIVE_QDOOR||密封的。 ]南侧装有蜂蜜金色的大门，将你此刻所在的这个装饰着丝绸、靠垫和长榻的豪华前厅与女王的寝室分隔开来。六面墙都配有蜡质柱子作为支撑，墙上悬挂着旗帜和丝绸帷幔，这一切都让人确信：你很快就会见到真正的王室成员了。 

    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED||[
        flags.HIVE_QDOOR
        |阿兹兰站在门边，焦急地等待你的指令。“等你准备好了，我就开始。 [pc.name]..."
        |阿兹兰站在门边，脚跟轻轻点地，目光在门和你之间来回扫视。“如果没有女王的同意，我们需要两把钥匙才能打开她的寝室：蜂蜜钥匙和毒液钥匙。如果你没有这些钥匙，我们就得用撞锤花上几个小时才能把门撞开……
    
        [party.has brint|布林特轻笑道：“想打赌吗？”

“当然想，大块头。]
    ]]
rows.raw:
"
    You stand outside a massive pair of [flags.HIVE_QDOOR||sealed, ]honey-gold doors to the south, separating the room you're in — a lavish antechamber adorned with silks and pillows and long divans — from the chambers of the queen. Waxy pillars support the room along all six walls, displaying banners and silky drapery that help assure you that you'll soon stand in the presence of true royalty. 

    [flags.HIVE_CLEARED||[
        flags.HIVE_QDOOR
        |Azyrran stands next to the door, anxiously waiting for your go-ahead. "I'm ready when you are, [pc.name]..."
        |Azyrran rocks on her heels beside the door, glancing between it and you. "We need two keys to open the queen's chambers without her consent: the Honey Key and the Venom Key. If you don't have them, we'd need a ram and several hours to batter down these doors..."
    
        [party.has brint|Brint chuckles. "Wanna bet?"
        
        Easy, big guy.]
    ]]"

rows.original: You have the keys, and Azyrran stands ready. Open the doors when you're ready...
rows.translation: 你掌握了钥匙，阿兹兰也已做好准备。当你准备好的时候，就打开那些门吧……
rows.raw: "You have the keys, and Azyrran stands ready. Open the doors when you're ready..."

rows.original: You need the Venom Key and the Honey Key to open the queen's chambers from the outside.
rows.translation: 你需要毒液钥匙和蜂蜜钥匙才能从外部打开女王的密室。
rows.raw: "You need the Venom Key and the Honey Key to open the queen's chambers from the outside."
